title: Application Consultant Trainee
description:
**Are you ready to kick-start your career with our European Trainee Program?** 




 We are on the lookout for trainees to join us on our growth journey.
 



  





 Do you want to work with customer-oriented programming across many industries and transform our customers problems into creative technical solutions on a daily basis? Are you technically curious and want to gain more experience in programming? If the answer is yes, then this is the job for you!
 



  





**Building the future for our customers** 




 Lime CRM is a platform with infinite possibilities to customize according to the needs and ways of working of our end users. Your job involves everything from installation, adaptation and development of additional services connected to our CRM system.
 



  





 To be a great Application Consultant at Lime, you have already identified that coding is something you enjoy. But not to worry, we don’t expect you to be an expert in everything before you start – this is a journey where you will develop along the way!
 



  





 Your days will not be just about coding. It’s a 75/25 split between programming and technical project management. One day you develop in SQL and manage integrations using SSIS and Rest API. The next day you might work on tailored customization in Python, HTML, or JavaScript. When you are not coding you are joining costumer’s meetings, workshops, or internal meetings to create solutions for our end users. You will work at one of our awesome offices with a team that together creates the best experiences for our users.
 



  





**An Application Consultant at Lime…** 




 · Creates mappings of data structures between objects.
 



 · Develops front-end components that interact with Lime.
 



 · Contributes to solution design and development of integrations with third-party systems.
 



 · Codes automatic triggers that run based on user actions in the system.
 



 · Reviews code, write tests for your own or others’ code. Quality assurance.
 



 · Plans and estimate of time use related to tasks and projects. High independence in how you control and plan your tasks.
 



 · Works with different programming languages such as Python, SQL and Typescript.
 



 · Has full professional proficiency in Swedish and English.
 



 · Has a relevant academic degree within IT, Engineering, Information Systems, or equivalent.
 



  





**What is the European Trainee Program?** 




 With our trainee program, we promise you a unique opportunity to kick start your career. Faced with interesting challenges from day one, your learning curve will rise rapidly. Throughout the program, you will be mentored by a senior colleague providing support.
 



  





 The trainee program kicks off with two weeks at our HQ in Lund, Sweden. Together with all trainees from our different offices, you will get intense training and education as well as plenty of time for team building and having fun. After the intro period, you head back to your local office and start working hands-on with everything you have learned, combined with more education throughout the year.
 



  





**Are you our next star?** 




 The trainee program starts in January and August every year. Apply asap!
 



  





 Welcome to Lime!

title: Projektledare digitalisering - hälso- och sjukvård
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
 Hos Sopra Steria är du mer än en projektledare – du är en nyckelperson i utvecklingen av framtidens digitala hälso- och sjukvård. I denna roll arbetar du i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och IT, med fokus på att stödja våra kunder i deras digitaliseringsresa inom vård och omsorg.
   

  

 Du leder och driver uppdrag kopplade till införande, utveckling och förbättring av IT-stöd i komplexa vårdmiljöer. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med vårdverksamhet, IT-organisationer, leverantörer och andra intressenter, där din förmåga att skapa struktur, engagemang och framdrift är avgörande.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett starkt team av konsulter med djup kompetens inom digitalisering av vård och omsorg, i en miljö som präglas av kunskapsdelning, kvalitet och samhällsnytta.
   

  

**Dina ansvarsområden**
* Leda och driva projekt och uppdrag inom digitalisering av hälso- och sjukvård
* Stötta kunder vid införande, uppgraderingar och förändringsarbete kopplat till IT-stöd
* Fungera som brygga mellan vårdverksamhet, IT och systemleverantörer
* Säkerställa att lösningar möter både verksamhetskrav och tekniska förutsättningar
* Planera, följa upp och rapportera leveranser enligt etablerade modeller
* Bidra med din erfarenhet i förbättrings- och utvecklingsinitiativ inom vårddigitalisering


**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av att arbeta inom hälso- och sjukvård och som trivs i en rådgivande och ledande roll nära kund, t.ex. som projektledare, applikationsspecialist, förvaltningsledare eller verksamhetsnära expert.
   

  

**Du Har Sannolikt**
* Deltagit i eller drivit förändrings- och/eller utvecklingsprojekt inom hälso- och sjukvården.
* God förståelse för vårdprocesser och informationsflöden
* Vana att arbeta i komplexa organisationer med många intressenter
* Förmåga att kommunicera tydligt och skapa förtroende på alla nivåer
* Relevant högskole- eller universitetsutbildning
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av arbete som konsult
* Kunskap i Cambios produktportfölj
* Erfarenhet av införande av systemstöd i större organisationer, t.ex. Cambios journalsystem Cosmic.
* Erfarenhet av förändringsledning eller agila arbetssätt
* Certifiering inom projektledning (t.ex. PMI, Prince2 eller motsvarande)


**Varför välja Sopra Steria?**
* En plats där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad – Vi bygger smarta och hållbara lösningar som förbättrar samhälle och verksamheter med användarupplevelsen i centrum.
* Stark företagskultur med Power of Sharing – Vi tror på kraften i kunskapsdelning, transparens och samarbete. Hos oss når vi längre tillsammans.
* Toppbetyg som arbetsplats – Great Place to Work har rankat oss år efter år som en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser och vi har mottagit utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad.
* Del av en europeisk ledare inom digital transformation – Med över 50 000 experter i många länder kan vi både påverka stora projekt och ge dig möjligheter att växa globalt.
* Värderingar som genomsyrar allt vi gör – Vi sätter kundens behov i fokus, prioriterar respekt, professionalitet, nyfikenhet och en kollektiv förmåga att agera positivt och skapa hållbara resultat tillsammans.


**Ansökan**
 Nu vill vi gärna höra lite om dig! Ansök enkelt genom att antingen ladda upp ditt CV eller länka direkt till ditt LinkedIn-konto via annonsen. Om det fortfarande finns något du funderar över är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Marie Berg, marie.berg@soprasteria.com eller Talent Acquisition Partner Svante Larsson, svante.larsson2@soprasteria.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att få höra ifrån dig!
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.

title: IT Service Owner – Customer Portal
description:
Do you thrive on driving digital transformation and creating seamless user experiences? Here’s your chance to take ownership of a key IT service that shapes how our customers interact with us.
   

  

**Why Sandvik?**
 You join a global team committed to innovation and collaboration, where your ideas truly make an impact. Here, you get to:
   

  

* Be part of a large-scale digital transformation journey.
* Work with cutting-edge solutions in a global environment.
* Collaborate with passionate experts across IT and business.


**Your mission**
 You take the lead in managing and developing our Customer Portal IT service, ensuring it delivers value and reliability. Acting as the main point of contact for My Sandvik customer portal - our digital interface for customers - you work closely with stakeholders across the organization to align roadmaps and drive improvements.
   

  

 What you’ll do:
   

  

* Own the full lifecycle of the Customer Portal IT service and related applications.
* Coordinate stakeholders, internal teams, and suppliers to ensure reliable delivery and meet agreed SLAs.
* Manage IT service budgets, forecasts, and performance reporting.
* Drive continuous improvement, governance, and compliance with security and application standards.


**Location**
 The role is based at our sites in Stockholm (World Trade Center) or Tampere.
   

  

**Your profile**
 You have a background in IT or business administration and solid experience in leading IT services in a Service Owner or Service Manager role. You’re comfortable managing budgets, contracts, and suppliers, and you know your way around information security and roadmap planning. Experience with application management and development in an agile setup is a big plus.
   

  

 You also bring:
   

  

* Strong understanding of IT service management principles, preferably ITIL.
* Skills in financial planning, forecasting, and contract management.
* Ability to lead teams and coordinate with multiple stakeholders.
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken.


 You’re a natural communicator who builds trust easily and keeps things organized. You spot opportunities for improvement and act on them, and you’re approachable and solution-oriented in everything you do.
   

  

**Our culture**
 At Sandvik, we’re tech driven, innovative and entrepreneurial. We believe that success is a team effort so we value diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive culture where people can be themselves and reach their full potential. So, we invest in supporting each other, learning together and celebrating our differences. Visit our stories hub, LinkedIn or Facebook to get to know us further.
   

  

**Contact information**
 For further information about this position, please contact Riitta Pernu, hiring manager, riitta.pernu@sandvik.com
   

  

 We’ve already decided on which advertising channels and marketing campaigns we wish to use and respectfully decline any additional contacts in that matter.
   

  

 Union contacts – Sweden
   

  

* Cecilia Mickelsson, Unionen, +46 (0)70-616 90 89
* Fredrik Andersson, Akademikerföreningen, +46 (0)70-266 78 50
* Olle Hansson, Ledarna, +46 (0)70-650 57 43


 Recruitment Specialist: Lotta Amnebjer Nordqvist
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Send your application no later than May 3, 2026. Click apply and include your resume and cover letter in English. Please note that we don’t accept applications by e-mail. Job ID R0090564.
   

  

 To learn more about our recruitment process, please visit our career site or contact HR Services at hrservices.sweden@sandvik.com.
   

  

*Business area Mining is a global leading supplier of equipment and tools, parts, service, digital solutions and sustainability-driving technologies for the mining and construction industries. Applications include rock drilling, rock cutting, loading and hauling, tunneling and quarrying. In 2025, sales were approximately SEK 63 billion with about 18,400 employees.*

title: Software Engineer | Data Solutions
description:
**About Brite** 
 Founded in 2019, Brite Payments is a Swedish fintech and a leader in Instant Account-to-Account (A2A) payments. With connections to over 3,800+ banks, Brite enables consumers to pay directly from their bank account (also known as Pay by Bank) in real-time.
   

  

 With no signup or card details required, users authenticate using their bank’s usual ID method, which is not only convenient and secure but provides merchants with fast fund settlement, zero chargebacks, and reduced costs.
   

  

 Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, Brite operates across 27 European markets, utilising local payment rails, open banking, and our own proprietary infrastructure, Brite Instant Payments Network (IPN).
   

  

 Want to join us on our journey? The future is Brite!
   

  

**The mission**
**Join the Data Solutions team at Brite! We aren't just maintaining pipelines; we are architecting the future of our data ecosystem. Having launched just a year ago, we occupy the perfect sweet spot: we’ve moved past the initial "blank page" phase, yet we are entirely free from legacy debt. If you have a passion for building high-impact data products from the ground up using a modern, serverless stack on GCP, this is your stage.**
****What we’re looking for****
**We need a builder who thrives in an iterative environment. You won't just be executing tickets; you’ll be shaping our technical DNA. We value:**
* True Ownership: You don’t just write code; you and the team own the solution from ideation to deployment.
* Analytical Rigor: You enjoy deconstructing complex data problems to find elegant, scalable solutions.
* The Power of "We": You believe that while individual talent is great, the best architecture is born from collaboration and collective brainpower.


**Requirements**
* Experience: 5+ years of Software Engineering experience, specifically building and deploying cloud-native services.
* The Stack: Deep proficiency in Python and a "modern-first" approach to development.
* Autonomy: A proactive mindset and the ability to navigate a high degree of freedom with responsibility.
* Presence: A desire to collaborate in person with our team at our Stockholm office. We are working on-site at least 3 days per week.


****Meritorious****
* Experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and its ecosystem.
* A background in serverless architectures and building for the cloud.


****Why join Brite?****
**If you’re looking for a role where your work has a direct line of sight to the company’s success, you’ve found it. We offer an environment defined by innovation, zero "red tape" legacy, and a culture of mutual respect.**
**Join us and build the next generation of data solutions at Brite.**

title: Enterprise Architect Director
description:
Do you want to work in a global company where you can contribute to a more sustainable food production? DeLaval is a leading developer, manufacturer, and supplier of solutions for dairy farmers around the world. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers do more with less.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
 DeLaval is seeking a senior Enterprise Architect Director to own, define, and govern the enterprise architecture of the DeLaval Group. The role has end-to-end accountability for ensuring that DeLaval’s business strategy is consistently translated into a coherent, secure, and scalable technology landscape across all business domains and geographies.
   

  

 The Enterprise Architect Director acts as the company’s architectural authority, balancing long-term strategic direction with near-term execution, and ensuring that digital investments deliver measurable business value while reducing complexity and technical risk.
   

  

 This role provides enterprise-wide leadership through mandate, governance, and influence. It does not initially include direct line management but carries clear functional leadership across a federated architecture community.
   

  

**Scope and Mandate**
 The Enterprise Architect Director has enterprise-level accountability for enterprise architecture principles, target states, and roadmaps; architecture governance, decision frameworks, and compliance; alignment between business strategy, operating model, and technology; and architectural coherence across ERP, CRM, CPQ, digital, IoT, data, and integration platforms. The Chief Enterprise Architect reports to the CIO.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Enterprise Architecture Strategy
* Define and continuously evolve DeLaval’s enterprise architecture strategy and target architecture.
* Translate business strategy, growth ambitions, and industry trends into actionable architectural roadmaps.
* Ensure architectural decisions support scalability, security, sustainability, and time-to-market.
* Architecture Governance & Decision-Making
* Own and operate DeLaval’s enterprise architecture governance model.
* Define architecture artefacts, principles, standards, and reference architectures.
* Govern solution design and major initiatives.


**Technology & Platform Leadership**
* Set enterprise direction for core business platforms, integration and API strategy, cloud and infrastructure architecture, and digital and IoT platforms.
* Drive simplification, reuse, and reduction of technical debt.


**Information & Data Architecture**
* Own the enterprise information and data architecture.
* Define enterprise information models, data domains, and principles.
* Establish readiness for analytics and AI.


**Business & Stakeholder Collaboration**
* Act as a strategic advisor to the CIO and senior leaders.
* Bridge business and IT.


**Architecture Community Leadership**
* Provide functional leadership to solution and domain architects.
* Establish an enterprise architecture community of practice.


**Success Measures**
* Reduced complexity, faster delivery, increased reuse, stronger business alignment, and improved data quality.


**Strategic Impact**
 This role is central to DeLaval’s evolution into a digitally enabled, data-driven enterprise.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 To be successful in this role we believe that you have:
   

  

* Several years of experience in enterprise or solution architecture.
* Strong ability to translate business strategy into architecture roadmaps.
* Experience with ERP, CRM, digital platforms, IoT, cloud, and data architecture.
* Solid understanding of architecture frameworks and governance (e.g., TOGAF).
* Skilled in driving simplification, standardization, and reducing technical debt.
* Strong stakeholder skills and ability to lead through influence.
* Excellent communicator who can bridge business and IT.
* Proven experience in driving projects and leading transformation.


**Working at DeLaval**
 Our core values Passion, People, Professionals and Partnerships connect individuals across entities and geographies. Success is far more than knowledge – it is strongly related to behaviour. At DeLaval we are all guided by our three behaviours: Set Direction, Make Things Happen and One DeLaval.
   

  

 We Offer You a Workplace Like No Other, Where State-of-the-art Technology Goes Hand In Hand With Animal Welfare. DeLaval Is a Part Of The Tetra Laval Group Together With Tetra Pak And Sidel. In Addition, We Offer
   

  

* Secure employment and benefits from the collective agreement (occupational pension, work-related accident insurance).
* Parental leave compensation (approx. 10 percent of the employee's monthly salary).
* Wellness allowance of SEK 4 000/year.
* Private healthcare insurance.
* Flexible working hours and reduced working hours.


**Additional information**
 This is a full-time permanent position based at DeLaval’s headquarters in Tumba, south of Stockholm. We offer a hybrid workplace model, allowing flexibility to work remotely.
   

  

 We review applications ongoing. We do not accept applications via email, however if you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don’t hesitate to contact us.
   

  

**Contact**
 Hiring manager: Jesper Särnholm, CIO and Vice President of Information Technology, jesper.sarnholm@delaval.com
   

  

 Recruiter: Mathias Gunnstedt, Mathias.Gunnstedt@delaval.com
   

  

**About DeLaval**
 Our vision is to make sustainable food production possible. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers, dairy farmers, do more with less by providing world-leading milking equipment and solutions.
   

  

 Today, DeLaval has approximately 4,500 passionate professionals operating in more than 100 markets around the world. DeLaval is part of the Tetra Laval Group.  See more at corporate.delaval.com

title: Gruppchef till GIS-verksamheten
description:
Har du idéer för framtiden och drivs du av utmaningar? I Haninge får du utvecklas tillsammans med trygga kollegor som vill göra skillnad redan idag. Just nu pågår ett av de mest ambitiösa förändringsarbetena i vår kommuns historia. Vi bygger en ny stad, cirka 20 minuter från Söder. Följ med på vår resa. 
   

  





  
   

  





 Som Gruppchef för GIS-verksamheten kommer du att spela en avgörande roll i vårt spännande förändringsarbete i Haninge. Vi står inför en unik möjlighet att forma en ny stad, och vi söker en ledare som är både flexibel och ambitiös, med en stark förmåga att samarbeta och kommunicera effektivt. Vill du vara en del av vår resa? Då ser vi fram emot din ansökan!
   

  





**Om oss**




 I GIS-verksamheten kommer du få möjlighet att inte bara bidra till vår nuvarande vision, utan också aktivt forma framtiden i Haninge. Medarbetarna är mycket skickliga och har en stor samlad kompetens inom GIS-området.
   

  





 Vi sitter i ljusa trevliga kontorslokaler med parkeringsmöjligheter och närhet till köpcentrum, restauranger, naturområde med bad, skid- och löpspår, samt till Handens pendeltågsstation, endast 20 minuter från Söder. Vi har fri tillgång till gym i kommunhuset, friskvårdsbidrag, samt möjlighet till semesterväxling och lediga klämdagar. Det finns även möjlighet till distansarbete på upp till 40%. Vi är en lärande organisation och erbjuder goda möjligheter till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling.
   

  





**Rollen**




 I din roll kommer du att leda ett dedikerat team där problemlösande analysförmåga och helhetssyn är nyckeln till framgång.
   

  





 Som Gruppchef för GIS-verksamheten kommer du att ha en central roll i utvecklingen av vår kommun. Du ansvarar för att leda och inspirera ditt team, vilket innebär att du skapar en kultur där effektiva arbetssätt och samarbete står i fokus. Ditt ledarskap kommer att vara avgörande för att nå våra mål och driva GIS-området framåt.
 


* Föreslå och implementera strategiska initiativ inom GIS-området för att stödja kommunens utveckling.
* Utveckla och coacha ditt team för att maximera deras potential och prestationer.
 
 Identifiera och lösa problem genom analytisk och systematisk problemlösning.
* Kommunicera tydligt och effektivt med såväl interna som externa intressenter för att säkerställa transparens och engagemang.
* Vara en teknisk förebild och omvärldsbevaka inom området samt prioritera inom våra fokusområden.



 Ditt mod och din förmåga att tänka långsiktigt kommer att vara ovärderlig när du navigerar i dessa spännande tider av förändring.
   

  





 Du rapporterar till Haninge kommuns IT-chef och sitter i kommunens IT-ledningsgrupp.
   

  





**Vem vi söker**




 Vi söker dig som är en inspirerande ledare och vill göra skillnad i vår GIS-verksamhet. Som idealkandidat för rollen som Gruppchef är du både flexibel och stabil, vilket gör att du kan hantera förändringar och utmaningar med lätthet. Du är prestationsorienterad, har en stark ambition och drivkraft och är modig nog att ta beslut som skapar värde för de vi är till för.
   

  





 En viktig del av din roll blir att samarbeta och kommunicera effektivt med både teammedlemmar och olika intressenter, så din samarbetsförmåga och kommunikativa färdigheter är avgörande. Du besitter en helhetssyn och en problemlösande analysförmåga som gör att du kan navigera komplexa situationer och hitta långsiktigt stabila lösningar.
   

  





 Som en lojal ledare, inspirerar du ditt team att växa och utvecklas, samtidigt som du strävar efter gemensamma mål.
   

  





 Vi tror att din passion för ledarskap och vilja att göra skillnad kommer att göra dig till ett ovärderligt tillskott i vårt arbete.
   

  





**Kvalifikationer** 



* En gedigen bakgrund inom GIS och ledarskap, med erfarenhet av att leda team och GIS-utveckling
* Du trivs med att hantera förändringar och kan anpassa dig efter nya förutsättningar.
* Har en stark vilja att nå gemensamma mål och övervinna utmaningar.
* Har förmåga att fatta beslut även i komplexa situationer.
* Du brinner för att skapa goda relationer och samarbeta med kollegor på olika nivåer.
* Har förmåga att inspirera och motivera andra och konkretisera mål och budget.
* Besitter en helhetssyn och förstår hur GIS-verksamheten knyter an till kommunens övergripande mål.
* Har en problemlösande analytisk förmåga, vilket gör att du kan identifiera utmaningar och hitta effektiva tekniska lösningar inom GIS.



 Om du känner igen dig i dessa kvalifikationer och brinner för att göra skillnad i en utvecklingsprocess av högsta rang, ser vi fram emot din ansökan!
   

  





 I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av både bakgrundskontroll samt säkerhetsprövning
   

  





*I den här rekryteringen har vi redan gjort våra val av annonskanaler och samarbetspartners. Vi undanber oss vänligt men bestämt all form av hjälp med rekryteringen från utomstående aktörer.*




 Haninge kommun ser mångfald som en styrka och välkomnar alla sökande. Vår kompetensbaserade rekryteringsmetodik syftar till att fokusera på individens kompetens och därigenom även motverka diskriminering.

title: Data Warehouse Officer - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support.
   

  

 The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for Group Information Systems Directorate (GIS), Data & Corporate Solutions Department (DCS), Data Management Division (DM), Data Engineering Unit (DE), at its headquarters in Luxembourg, a
 ****Data Warehouse Officer\*****
**.**
**This is a full-time permanent position at grade 5.**
* internal benchmark Officer IT Applications


***Panel interviews are foreseen as from June 2026***
 Purpose
   

  

 You will design, develop, optimise, and maintain ETL processes that supply the EIB Group’s Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms with high‑quality data. You will play a key role in improving the performance, reliability and accuracy of these data pipelines, supporting the Bank’s strategic initiatives and ensuring alignment with industry best practices, technological developments and evolving regulatory standards.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Data Engineering Unit and works in close cooperation with IT and the Data Governance units. You will cooperate with counterparties from all directorates using the Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms.
   

  

 You will work on a daily basis with key external parties (software vendors, providers of outsourced services, peer groups) to optimise service levels and to stay abreast of best practice.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

* Ensure that the EIBG Data Warehouse and Data Lake platforms are in line with the IT policies and that qualitative and quantitative objectives are achieved and define a unified approach for developing ETL within the applications;
* Organise, structure and lead complex business requirement analysis; producing business cases to propose the best possible IT solution while remaining cost effective for the EIBG;
* Lead IT projects under own responsibility and ensuring their delivery within the planned time, scope and budget by anticipating issues and taking mitigation actions;
* Write up the project documentation such as project charter, functional design, test scripts, progress report, reviewing all technical deliverables to meet Data Warehouse Solutions unit objectives;
* Build and maintain ETL jobs according to best practices and establish metrics to monitor data extraction improvements;
* Apply technical knowledge and expertise to define, test, implement and maintain data extractions in line with requirements and in cooperation with reporting officers, data officers, data owners, source system and Data warehouse Solutions unit IT custodians;
* Provide timely support services to end-users, which includes issues resolution, root cause analysis, propose and development improvements;
* Provide expert advice and recommendations and participate on issues related to Data Warehouse and Data Lake activities with focus on data extraction improvements and associated processes to align the EIB Group with best practice;
* Participate in special initiatives that can go beyond the strict boundaries of own domain and that have a specific scope and timing, to ensure the realisation of the initiative within the set scope, time and budget.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in Information Technology, Mathematics, Finance or related fields.
* At least 5 years of relevant experience in IT, including experience covering data extraction management, ideally gained within the Data Warehouse/ Data Lake fields in the financial services sector and in an international context.
* Excellent knowledge of project management principles, methods and practices.
* Strong working experience in Public Cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure, …).
* Strong technical knowledge of ETL tools (such as IBM Infosphere Datastage, Talend, Informatica, …) and reporting tools (MS-Power BI or equivalent).
* Strong technical knowledge of Data Lake solutions (such as MS-Data Fabric, Amazon Data Lake, Databricks, Snowflakes,…).
* Experience with creating, testing and implementing business rules for feeding an Enterprise data warehouse.
* Experience with establishing data extraction performance metrics and preventative controls for continuous improvement.
* Proven track record of data extraction improvement and result orientation.
* Good knowledge of big data storage systems (Azure storage account, Lakehouse, Amazon S3)
* Excellent knowledge of English and/or French (\*\*\*), with a good command of the other. (Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage).


 Competencies
   

  

**Find Out More About EIB Core Behavioural Skills Here**
*(\*\*\*) Unless stated explicitly as a required qualification, a good command of French is not a pre-requisite for hire. As both English and French are however official working languages of the EIB, proficiency in both languages is a pre-requisite for your future career development. Any language clause in your contract must be fulfilled in order for you to be eligible for a promotion (either via the annual appraisal cycle or via an internal selection process). Proficiency is understood to mean the attainment of* 
*level 5 of the Inter Institutional language courses, corresponding to B1.2 of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFRL). The Bank offers appropriate training support.*
 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

*This is an open campaign to consecutively fill open positions. The campaign will remain open until position is filled. Applications will be reviewed in order of receipt.*

title: Head of Engineering
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1.1 billion smokers in the world and around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives, and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering better nicotine alternatives online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands across seven markets, serving more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com and Nicokick.com we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish-style snus and other smoke-free products online.
   

  

 With our headquarters on Östgötagatan in Stockholm, we are around 300 colleagues, mainly based in Sweden but working across markets globally. We are an innovative and fast-moving company on an exciting expansion journey, helping more and more smokers switch to smoke-free alternatives.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 We’re looking for a Head of Engineering to lead our core engineering organization in Stockholm and shape the next stage of Haypp Group’s technology landscape. In this senior leadership role, you are responsible for the engineering area powering our wider technical ecosystem – including platform, services, integrations, and the architecture that enables us to scale across markets, brands, and regulatory environments.
   

  

 You lead through five direct reports (two Engineering Managers, one Product Manager, and two Product Owners) and are part of the Tech management team, reporting to the CTO alongside the Head of Data and Head of Group IT. This is a role at the intersection of technology, people, and business. You are expected to combine strategic leadership with strong technical judgment, staying close enough to architecture and system design to guide direction, challenge trade-offs, and ensure engineering excellence.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
  
   

  

* Lead and develop the engineering organization through your direct reports
* Own and evolve the technical direction and architecture across the e-commerce ecosystem
* Ensure scalable, secure, reliable and maintainable systems across markets and platforms
* Drive technical excellence and high standards in engineering delivery and quality
* Collaborate closely with Product and business stakeholders to translate needs into technical execution
* Balance trade-offs between speed, cost, risk, stability and long-term sustainability
* Build a scalable organization with strong leadership, structure and capabilities for future growth
* Contribute as part of the Tech management team to overall technology strategy and direction


**What We Are Looking For**
  
   

  

* Proven senior leadership experience in leading and scaling engineering organizations, either through other managers or directly, regardless of specific title
* Experience driving impact in complex, business-critical digital products or platforms with high transaction volumes and strong requirements on scalability, availability, reliability, and security. Experience from transaction-heavy B2C environments is especially valued (e.g. e-commerce, marketplaces, fintech, or similar)
* A solid technical foundation, with the ability to engage credibly in high-level architectural discussions, system design decisions, and technology trade-offs
* A strong understanding of how technical decisions influence business outcomes, customer experience, and organizational effectiveness
* A clear, authentic leadership approach with the ability to build trust, alignment, and strong collaboration across teams and functions
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex technical topics into clear and relevant insights for non-technical stakeholders


**YOU WILL PROBABLY THRIVE HERE IF YOU**
  
   

  

* Are motivated by building scalable systems, teams and organizations in a regulated environment
* Like working at the intersection of technology, product and business strategy
* Thrive in environments where long-term architecture and short-term execution must coexist
* Value clarity, trust and empowered teams over micromanagement


**What We Offer**
 We are a value-driven company with our values We Team Up, Innovation Drives Us, Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy, and Going the Extra Mile at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

 At Haypp Group you can always expect supportive colleagues who want to achieve things together and a culture where everyone’s voice matters. We encourage ideas from all parts of the organization and are not afraid to try new things. At the same time, we celebrate achievements and recognize the hard work that goes into reaching them.
   

  

 Because our people are our most important differentiator, we offer generous benefits including:
   

  

  
   

  

* Premium ITP1 occupational pension plan
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Regular social activities and team events


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, we would love to hear from you. Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity and welcomes applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or marital status.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or about working at Haypp Group, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Anna Persson at anna.persson@hayppgroup.com.
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Masterdataspecialist till SJ
description:
Var med på resan och driv SJs fordonsdata i systemet SAP. SJ gör nu sina största investeringar någonsin i nya tåg, det innebär spännande och moderna uppgifter i rollen som masterdataspecialist.
   

  

**Din kommande roll**
 Som masterdataspecialist får du en central funktion i arbetet med SJs fordonsdata. Du ansvarar för att förvalta och utveckla grunddata inom underhåll, leverantörssamverkan, tjänster och material för fordon och komponenter. Rollen är bred och innebär att du både hanterar löpande uppdateringar och beställningar, och att du stöttar verksamheten i att omsätta behov och önskemål i tydliga krav för IT‑utveckling.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära verksamheten i ett tvärfunktionellt samarbete - från data till drift, där du också får se den direkta effekten av välskött masterdata på fordons­tillgänglighet och punktlighet. I ett modernt system som SAP- är kvalitetssäkrad masterdata en nyckel för effektiva processer, smarta arbetssätt och tillförlitlig analys.
   

  

 Du arbetar i en grupp med flera andra masterdataspecialister och kommer bland annat att arbeta med att:
   

  

* Uppdatera och distribuera underhållsplaner både internt och mot underhållsleverantör.
* Daglig kontakt med IT-förvaltning och användare av systemet.
* Ingå i utvecklingsprojekt.
* Utveckla processer och den förvaltning du arbetar med.


**Förväntningar på den vi söker**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av masterdatahantering och ett tydligt tekniskt intresse med förståelse av hur tekniska system hänger ihop. Du är strukturerad och noggrann, något som är avgörande när du arbetar med att driva fordonsdata. Samtidigt behöver du kunna hantera flera aktiviteter parallellt, eftersom både löpande uppdateringar och nya behov från verksamheten kan pågå samtidigt. Det gör dig till en självgående person som är trygg med att driva egna frågor.
   

  

 För att trivas i teamet ser vi att du har en god samarbetsförmåga, då du arbetar nära både tekniska och operativa funktioner. Därmed är du kommunikativ, du behöver kunna förklara komplexa samband på ett enkelt sätt och snabbt sätta dig in i användarnas perspektiv.
   

  

 Vi ser att du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet inom masterdatahantering.
* Högskoleingenjörsexamen eller motsvarade erfarenhet
* Utbildning inom logistik eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Erfarenhet av SAP eller motsvarande större ERP-system/affärssystem
* God svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


 Meriterande
   

  

* Arbetat i järnvägsbranschen


**Ansökan och information**
 Urval sker löpande så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt, dock senast 29 april. Vid frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta vår kontaktperson Åsa Nordlander, Asa.Nordlander@sj.se

title: Information Security Consultant
description:
Som ledande konsultbolag inom säker digitalisering och cybersäkerhet säkrar vi utvecklingen hos våra kunder varje dag. Vi erbjuder allt från strategisk rådgivning vid komplexa utmaningar till helhetsåtaganden inom cybersäkerhet och digitalisering. Vårt uppdrag är att skapa säkra IT-system och lösningar, effektivisera processer, skydda mot cyberhot, hantera lagkrav och bli mer hållbara i en digital värld.
   

  

 Vill du utvecklas och dela med dig av din expertis inom cybersecurity management & resilience? Då kan du vara den vi söker!
   

  

**🔐 Om rollen**
 Vi söker dig med erfarenhet och intresse för IT- och informationssäkerhet som vill arbeta med spännande uppdrag inom olika branscher och tillsammans med ett härligt gäng kollegor. Din roll kommer att vara central för våra kunder, där ditt engagemang, din lyhördhet och nyfikenhet är av stor vikt.
   

  

**Vi ser gärna att du:**
* idag och sedan minst 3 år tillbaka arbetar med säkerhet, kanske i en linjeroll eller att du redan idag arbetar som konsult
* har erfarenhet av att arbeta med operativt, systematiskt- och riskbaserat IT- och informationssäkerhetsarbete
* har en god förståelse för organisationers styrning, riskhantering och regelefterlevnadsarbete
* har erfarenhet av säkerhetsrådgivning och granskning inom organisationer
* känner dig bekväm med att delta i projekt för införande av ledningssystem för informationssäkerhet, inklusive certifieringsprocessen
* har god teknisk kunskap samt förståelse för verksamhetens möjligheter och utmaningar inom området
* har akademisk examen eller motsvarande med inriktning mot IT- och informationssäkerhet
* behärskar svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


**Det är även meriterande om du har:**
* relevanta certifieringar som t.ex. CC, CISM, CISSP, CISA, CRISC
* erfarenhet av lagar och regelverk som t.ex. PCI DSS, GDPR, OSL och NIS
* erfarenhet av standarder som t.ex. MSB metodstöd, ISO 27001 och NIST samt CIS controls


 Är det någon certifiering du vill ta men ännu inte har? Inga problem! Vi står för certifieringen och uppmuntrar alltid våra kollegor till fortsatt kompetensutveckling.
   

  

**🚀 Vi satsar på dig - skapa framtiden tillsammans med oss!**
 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i teknikens och cybersäkerhetens framkant – tillsammans med några av branschens mest kompetenta kollegor. Vi tror på att erfarenhet och nyfikenhet går hand i hand, och vi söker dig som vill vara med och utveckla framtidens säkra digitala lösningar.
   

  

* Kontinuerlig utveckling: Vi investerar löpande i din kompetens genom utbildningar, certifieringar, mentorskap och kunskapsdelning.
* Meningsfulla uppdrag: Du arbetar med uppdrag som gör skillnad – där din insats bidrar till tryggare, mer hållbara och robusta digitala samhällen.
* Samarbete och gemenskap: Hos oss råder en kultur av öppenhet och prestigelöshet. Vi lär av varandra, utmanar varandra och delar en gemensam vilja att alltid bli bättre.


 Vill du vara en del av ett team som kombinerar teknik, samhällsnytta och kollegial värme – och där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad? Då är Omegapoint platsen för dig!
   

  

 Har du några funderingar kring tjänsten? Tveka inte på att kontakta petra.soderberg@omegapoint.se.
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan! ⤵️**

title: ETL Developer
description:
**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, develop, and maintain scalable and robust data pipelines using Databricks (Apache Spark).
* Build and manage ETL/ELT workflows for processing structured and unstructured data from multiple sources.
* Develop and implement efficient data models using Delta Lake and data warehousing techniques.
* Optimize Spark jobs for performance, scalability, and cost efficiency.
* Work with large-scale distributed systems and ensure high availability and reliability of data pipelines.
* Collaborate with data scientists, analysts, and business stakeholders to understand data requirements and deliver solutions.
* Ensure data quality, integrity, governance, and security across all data platforms.
* Automate and orchestrate workflows using tools such as Apache Airflow or Azure Data Factory.
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve data pipeline issues in a timely manner.
* Maintain documentation for data pipelines, workflows, and data models.



**Required Skills & Qualifications** 



* Databricks Certification (Associate or Professional Data Engineer preferred).
* Strong experience with Apache Spark (PySpark and/or Scala).
* Proficiency in SQL, including complex queries and performance tuning.
* Hands-on experience with Delta Lake and lakehouse architecture.
* Experience working with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure (preferred), AWS, or GCP.
* Proven experience building scalable ETL pipelines.
* Strong understanding of data warehousing concepts (Star Schema, Snowflake Schema).
* Experience with version control systems such as Git.
* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.



**Preferred Skills** 



* Experience with Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, or similar tools.
* Knowledge of real-time/streaming data processing using Kafka or Spark Structured Streaming.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, Jenkins, or similar).
* Understanding of data governance and security concepts (RBAC, data masking, encryption).
* Strong Python programming skills.

title: Product Manager - Product Development
description:
Silex Microsystems is the world’s leading pure-play MEMS foundry, partnering with global clients to develop some of the most advanced MEMS products in the world.
 



  





 As a Product Manager in our Product Development team, you will play a key role in pushing the boundaries of what is technically possible — working hands-on with cutting-edge processes while driving complex development projects forward. This is a highly technical, project-driven role where you combine microfabrication expertise with strong project management to take products from concept to market.
 



  





 Read more about Silex here.
 



  





**The Team** 




 You will join our Product Development team of around 40 colleagues, including Product Managers, Process Design Engineers and CAD Engineers, and you’ll be reporting to a Group Manager.
 



 The team works at the core of Silex’s offering — translating customer designs into manufacturable MEMS products. Collaboration is key, and you will work closely with both internal experts and international customers in a highly knowledge-driven environment.
 



  





**The role** 




 In this role, you will lead the development of MEMS products from early concept through prototype, combining technical depth with structured project management.
 



 Customers typically come to Silex with a design concept, and together with our CAD Engineers and technical experts, you will evaluate and shape that design to ensure it is manufacturable. Early in the process, you will bring together specialists from different process areas to define a robust concept and create a scalable process flow, and a recipe for the new product. In this concept phase, you will be ensuring that all critical aspects are considered before the customer approves the concept, and the project moves into prototyping.
 



  





 As the project progresses into the prototype phase, you will own the overall execution — ensuring timelines are met, risks are managed, and technical challenges are solved along the way.
 



 A part of the role is hands-on work in the cleanroom. After each process step, you will evaluate the outcome using tools such as SEM analysis to determine whether the desired result has been achieved. Based on your findings, you will work closely with Process Engineers to tweak parameters in processes to achieve the desired result. Finally, you’re responsible for the delivery of the final prototype to the client.
 



  





 To ensure a strong start, you’ll receive hands-on training from an experienced colleague to familiarize you with our development process and tools before being in client discussions. After a while, you will start acting as the technical interface towards customers, leading discussions around progress, challenges, and next steps.
 



  





**In this role, you will** 



* Drive MEMS development projects from concept to the delivery of a final prototype.
* Evaluate customer designs and ensure manufacturability together with CAD and process experts.
* Define process flows and build fabrication recipes for new products.
* Bring together cross-functional experts early in the project to ensure a robust concept.
* Analyze process results using SEM and other characterization methods.
* Collaborate with Process Engineers to achieve desired results after each fabrication step.
* Own project timelines, order portfolios, progress, and delivery.
* Identify risks, troubleshoot issues, and ensure forward momentum.
* Act as the technical lead towards customers.
* Lead technical discussions, reporting, and planning.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* A Master’s degree or PhD with coursework in microfabrication/ nanotechnology.
* Experience with microfabrication through work or academic research, ideally using processes like lithography, plasma deposition and plasma etching.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to discuss technical topics in English. Swedish is considered highly beneficial as a lot of internal documentation is written in Swedish.
* Previous experience with customer interaction.
* Several years of industry experience in production environments, leading technical projects.



  





**To succeed in the role, we also think that you are** 



* A clear and adaptable communicator, able to engage both colleagues and customers.
* Organized and methodical in how you drive projects forward.
* Curious and eager to deepen your expertise in MEMS.
* Business-minded and focused on delivering value to customers.



  





**About The Recruitment Process** 




 We review applications on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. To apply, please attach your CV or LinkedIn-profile, and answer a few questions.
 



  





 If you progress through the full process, you will start with a digital interview with one of our Talent Acquisition Partners, followed by a personality and logical ability test. Next, you will meet with one of our Group Managers together with a Talent Acquisition Partner for an in-person interview, and finally with our VP of Product Development for a concluding interview. Before an offer, we also conduct reference checks, a background check, and a drug test. Randomized alcohol- and drug testing is conducted for all of our employees during the employment.
 



  





**Silex** 
 is the world’s largest and most advanced pure-play MEMS foundry. With a team of expert engineers, operators, technicians, engineers, support staff, specialists, and much more besides, Silex transforms the visionary ideas of the world’s leading MEMS innovators into reality.

title: Testare/Testledare till ett prioriterat område inom Masterdata
description:
**På Migrationsverket arbetar vi med en av vår tids stora samhällsfrågor – migrationen. Totalt är vi cirka 6 000 personer här, och vi har ett ovanligt viktigt jobb!**




 På Migrationsverket arbetar vi med en av vår tids stora samhällsfrågor – migrationen. Vi är cirka 6 000 medarbetare som tillsammans har ett ovanligt viktigt uppdrag.
   

  





 Nu söker vi en
 **Testare/Testledare** 
 till ett prioriterat område inom
 **Masterdata gällande person** 
 . Rollen är central i arbetet med att utveckla och modernisera myndighetens systemlandskap och är en viktig del i att kvalitetssäkra vår information, öka säkerheten och skapa förutsättningar för ett utökat informationsutbyte med externa intressenter.
   

  






**Om rollen**




 I denna roll kombinerar du operativt testarbete med ett övergripande
 **testledaransvar** 
 . Du har ansvar för
 **samtliga delar av testprocessen** 
 – från planering, analys och strategi till genomförande, uppföljning och rapportering.
   

  





 Du kommer att arbeta i ett tvärfunktionellt agilt team som utvecklar nya lösningar och även kommer genomföra ett omfattande migreringsarbete, vilket ställer höga krav på struktur, noggrannhet och analysförmåga. Rollen kräver ett helhetsperspektiv där du säkerställer att både befintliga och nya system fungerar stabilt, effektivt och i linje med myndighetens strategiska behov.
   

  





 Du spelar en nyckelroll i att säkerställa kvaliteten i myndighetens datainsamling och i att nya systemlösningar håller hög kvalitet inför leverans.
   

  






**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**




 Som Testare/Testledare hos oss kommer du bland annat att:
 


* Ha övergripande ansvar för testområdet inom teamet
* Planera, leda och följa upp testaktiviteter i projekt och förvaltningsuppdra
* Ta fram teststrategi, testplaner och testfall baserat på krav och riskanalyser
* Designa, genomföra och kvalitetssäkra manuella och automatiserade tester
* Analysera testresultat, hantera och rapportera avvikelser
* Säkerställa kvalitet vid systemförändringar och migreringar
* Driva och utveckla arbetssätt för test och kvalitetssäkring inom teamet
* Samarbeta nära med utvecklare, kravanalytiker, produktägare och andra intressenter
* Samverka med andra organisationer kring tester, både nationellt och på EU-nivå




**Arbetssätt och samarbete**




 Vi arbetar i
 **tvärfunktionella agila team** 
 där dialog, samarbete och gemensamt ansvar är avgörande för att nå god kvalitet. Testautomation är en viktig del i vårt arbetssätt och du har en central roll i att driva både funktionella och automatiserade tester.
   

  





 Vi eftersträvar kontinuerliga leveranser och en gemensam förståelse för hela systemutvecklingsprocessen. Därför ser vi gärna att du har intresse för och förståelse av flera delar av utvecklingskedjan.
   

  





**Vi söker dig som:**




 Du har en god samarbetsförmåga och är lyhörd för andras perspektiv. Du kommunicerar tydligt och kan anpassa din kommunikation efter olika målgrupper. Du tar egna initiativ, driver arbetet framåt och följer upp resultat. Vidare arbetar du strukturerat och trivs med att ta ansvar. Du är analytisk och har förmåga att se både detaljer och helhet.
   

  





**Du som söker har** 



* högskoleutbildning inom IT-området eller motsvarande utbildning i kombination med för befattningen relevant erfarenhet
* grundkunskaper i systemutvecklingsmetoder även då ditt fokus kommer att vara att kvalitetssäkra produkten genom testning
* god kommunikativ förmåga och kan uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* svenskt medborgarskap



**Det är meriterande om du har** 



* kunskap om Java
* kunskap om utvecklingskomponenter som exempelvis HTML, JavaScript och SQL
* erfarenhet av testning av mjukvara i agila processer
* kunskap i testmetodik och verktyg (t.ex. Cypress, JIRA, Selenium)




**Vi erbjuder**




 Hos oss får du ett meningsfullt arbete i en organisation med ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag. Vi erbjuder goda utvecklingsmöjligheter, flera karriärvägar internt och en arbetsmiljö som präglas av ständiga förbättringar, samarbete och respekt för människan.
   

  





 Läs mer om våra förmåner här – Om Migrationsverket Förmåner och villkor
   

  





**Upplysningar**




**Anställningsform:** 
  Tillsvidareanställning.
   

  





**Arbetstider:** 
  Kontorsarbetstider eller förtroendearbetstid enligt överenskommelse.
   

  





**Placering:** 
 Norrköping, Linköping eller Stockholm
   

  





**Tillträde:** 
  Så snart som möjligt enligt överenskommelse.
   

  





**Vill du veta mer?**




 Om du har frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef  Teodor Axén, teodor.axen@migrationsverket.se
   

  





 Frågor om rekryteringsprocessen besvaras av rekryteringsspecialist Charlott Olsson på 010-485 91 86 eller charlott.margareta.olsson@migrationsverket.se.
   

  





**Välkommen med dina ansökningshandlingar senast den 03 Maj 2026** 
 .
   

  





 Vi tar emot din ansökan via vårt rekryteringssystem. För att du ska få en så rättvis och korrekt bedömning som möjligt är det av stor vikt att du svarar korrekt och utförligt på urvalsfrågorna samt att du för varje anställning har en kort beskrivning av arbetsuppgifterna i ditt CV. 
   

  





**\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**




**Om rekryteringsprocessen**




 För oss är det viktigt att all kompetens på arbetsmarknaden tillvaratas. Vi välkomnar därför alla sökande och strävar efter en jämn könsfördelning och mångfald. Som statlig myndighet rekryterar vi efter förtjänst och skicklighet. På arbetsgivarverket.se kan du läsa mer om vad det innebär
 **.**




 Du behöver inte bifoga något personligt brev med din ansökan, men vi önskar att du svarar så tydlig och
   

  





 utförligt som möjligt på urvalsfrågorna för att vi ska kunna göra en rättvis bedömning av din erfarenhet om du är kvalificerad att gå vidare i rekryteringen eller inte. I vissa rekryteringar använder vi också tester för att bedöma hur väl din skicklighet stämmer överens med tjänsten du söker. Vid en eventuell intervju kan du även få svara på frågor kopplat till säkerhet.
   

  





 Vill du komma i kontakt med fackliga företrädare finns kontaktuppgifter till Saco-S, Seko och ST längst ned på sidan ”Lediga jobb och intresseanmälan” på migrationsverket.se: Frågor och svar om att söka jobb på Migrationsverket
   

  





 För att arbeta på Migrationsverket behöver du ha rätt att vistas och arbeta i Sverige på någon av dessa grunder: svenskt medborgarskap (krav för vissa tjänster), nordiskt medborgarskap, EU-medborgarskap eller permanent uppehållstillstånd.
   

  





 Om du har skyddade personuppgifter, eller annan information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd, ska du kontakta rekrytering@migrationsverket.se innan du gör din ansökan så berättar vi mer om våra säkerhetsrutiner. 
   

  





 Migrationsverkets behandling av personuppgifter
   

  





**Migrationsverkets rekryteringar** 
 sker helt i vår egen eller upphandlade leverantörers regi. Vi ber därför om att inte få telefonsamtal och mejl från rekryteringsföretag och annonsförsäljare.

title: Sr. Account Executive – Med Tech / Manu – Sweden
description:
**Description**
**Sr. Account Executive – Med Tech / Manu – Sweden**
**Salesforce** 
 is looking for a high-performing and experienced Named Account Executive to join our Enterprise Business Unit Sales team in Sweden, with a dedicated focus on the Medical Technology / Manu sector. In this role, you’ll partner with some of Sweden’s most largest Medical manufacturers to support their digital transformation journey and drive innovation through the Salesforce Customer 360 platform.
   

  

 This industry offers some profound opportunities – from AI-driven tools, robotics, integrated hospital tech and home care devices, to evolving consumer needs and expectations. At Salesforce, we’re uniquely positioned to help our customers stay ahead of these trends by connecting systems, data, and customer experiences across every touchpoint. As a Sr. Account Executive, you’ll play a pivotal role in shaping the future of this dynamic and strategically important sector.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Own and grow a portfolio of named accounts in Sweden.
* Build and execute a territory plan focused on long-term value creation and sustainable growth.
* Develop trusted advisor relationships with key stakeholders across IT, Engineering, Digital, and the C-Suite.
* Align Salesforce’s capabilities with the strategic goals of each customer, delivering clear ROI and business outcomes.
* Lead the full sales cycle – from early engagement and qualification through to close – in collaboration with Solution Engineering, Industry Strategy, Marketing, Partner Alliances, and Professional Services.
* Work closely with the wider Sales teams to share best practices and co-create industry-relevant solutions.


**What We’re Looking For**
* Proven success in enterprise SaaS sales, with 5+ years of experience managing and closing large, complex deals.
* Deep understanding of the Med Tech sector.
* Experience navigating complex organizations and building strong relationships at all levels, especially within executive leadership.
* A consistent track record of exceeding quota in a fast-paced, competitive environment.
* Strong communication, storytelling, and consultative selling skills.
* Fluent in Swedish and English.
* Willingness to travel across Sweden to meet with customers and attend key industry events.

title: Analytics Engineer
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

 As an
 **Analytics Engineer** 
 in the Analytics Foundation team, you help the whole company use data with confidence. You sit in a small team with real ownership: we shape how analytics engineering is done here, not only what gets built. You will make architectural decisions for data modelling and set the bar for quality, maintainability, and how we work. This is not a role where you only implement models from a backlog of “orders”; you partner with the business and with technical teams, surface trade-offs when needed, and help prioritise work that compounds.
   

  

 We spend most of our time on larger initiatives that improve the platform and how people use data, rather than reacting to a constant stream of ad-hoc questions. The team has a high degree of autonomy over its agenda, little firefighting, and we have invested for years in automating repetitive work so we can focus on impact. You will work hands-on with modern data tooling and with AI-assisted workflows, including coding agents and agent-style automation where they genuinely speed up design, review, and deliver, while staying responsible for correctness, governance, and clarity for stakeholders.
   

  

 You will develop and maintain core models, quality practices, and governance; support the warehouse and pipelines; and help teams get the most from BI and GTM tooling. Tools in our stack include Snowflake, dbt core, Hex, Prefect, Fivetran, and Hightouch (among others).
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, own, and evolve core data models and the modelling architecture; including how they connect to pipelines, freshness, and operational reliability in the warehouse.
* Empower the organization to use and interpret data.
* Partner with business and technical stakeholders from problem framing to shipped artefacts: clarify requirements, suggest better approaches when a request would not scale, and drive or co-drive cross-team initiatives that improve how data is used.
* Collaborate closely with other data professionals; this includes giving actionable feedback in code reviews as well as actively supporting with data modeling
* Combine subject matter expertise and a high level business understanding to contribute to the direction and strategy for Mentimeter in the realm of data modeling, AI-Analysis, BI-tooling and data activation in GTM-Tooling.
* Develop, own and maintain data modeling standards and the data development experience
* Improve how we work at scale: thoughtful automation and AI-assisted engineering (e.g. coding agents and repeatable workflows) with human accountability for correctness and compliance.
* Maintain and grow how knowledge is surfaced, e.g in semantic models, a data catalog, or documentation


**We Believe You Have**
* Roughly 4-7 years of relevant hands-on experience as an Analytics Engineer, Data Analyst, Data Scientist, BI Analyst, or similar (or equivalent depth if your path is non-linear).
* Strong SQL and sound judgment in data modelling (grain, reusability, naming, and how metrics should behave).
* Experience partnering across departments, including leading or co-leading cross-functional work that shipped something others use.
* Strong business acumen with an understanding of sales, marketing, and product analytics.
* Ability to map ambiguous stakeholder needs to clear, maintainable models and artefacts.
* Experience with BI-tools and development of BI features
* Knowledge of software collaboration using git.
* Communication in English with both technical and non-technical audiences; interest in helping others grow their data skills.
* Experience working with GDPR-sensitive data and collaborating with legal experts on compliance assessments.


**It Is Beneficial If You Have**
* Hands-on experience with dbt (or similar)
* Experience with a semantic or metrics layer
* Experience using AI-assisted coding or coding agents in a disciplined way (reviews, tests, documentation), with clear judgment about automation vs verification for production data work.
* Professional experience working in an agile environment


**Not Required**
* Swedish is not required (daily work is carried out in English and the Mentimeter team currently boasts 50+ different nationalities).
* A cover letter is not required as part of your application


 📍
 **Location:** 
 This is an onsite/hybrid role at Mentimeter HQ in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
   

  

 Please note that we do
 *not* 
 offer visa relocation sponsorship for the position.
   

  

**💡Our Recruitment Process**
* Introduction interview
* Competence interview, including a live case.
* Culture interview
* References & Offer


**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: Lead IT Strategy Execution & Governance
description:
**Why Join Us?**
 We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.
   

  

 At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.
   

  

 As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to grow ideas in an unconventional environment. At the same time, you’ll work in a culture of ongoing learning and development, allowing you to constantly expand your area of expertise.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Lead - IT Strategy Execution & Governance to act as the right-hand to the Chief Digitalization and Information Officer (CDIO) and run the IT execution engine. The role turns strategy into measurable outcomes through strong governance, disciplined follow-through, and a clear performance cadence.
   

  

 You will work closely with IT leadership, business stakeholders, and enabling functions (Compliance, Finance, People) to ensure priorities are clear, decisions are well-prepared, and delivery is consistent and transparent. This is a high-trust role with broad visibility—part advisor, part execution leader—ensuring strategic priorities translate into delivered results.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 You will drive results through strategy execution, governance, portfolio oversight, process excellence, and compliance coordination.
   

  

**Strategy execution & planning cadence**
* Translate IT strategy into roadmaps, OKRs/KPIs, and quarterly/annual execution plans.
* Run the planning rhythm (annual planning, QBRs, prioritization cycles, progress checkpoints).


**Governance & performance management**
* Design and run governance forums (roadmap review, project portfolio review, etc...).
* Establish outcome-based performance reporting that leaders use.
* Drive accountability through clear owners, timelines, dependencies, and decision logs.


**IT portfolio & value management (as applicable)**
* Maintain portfolio transparency: what we do, why, cost/capacity, benefits, risk, and dependencies.
* Run the IT Board Prepare, structure, and facilitate IT Board decisions on product and initiative investments, changes, and decommissioning.
* Support product lifecycle management Partner with Product Managers across the full lifecycle — from intake and evolution to rationalization and end‑of‑life — ensuring clarity on scope, cost, and ownership.
* Ensure TCO and investment discipline Make total cost of ownership visible and optimised, including run, change, licenses, services, and future cost implications.


**Operating model & process standardization**
* Manages the IT & Data Playbook which describes our ways-of-working.
* Define and continuously improve core IT ways of working (demand management, stakeholder management, lifecycle management, portfolio management, incidents, development, etc...).
* Standardize templates, routines, and metrics to improve quality, predictability, and speed.
* Drive pragmatic continuous improvement (minimum bureaucracy, maximum clarity).


**Quality, compliance & risk coordination**
* Ensure IT practices align with regulations and internal policies (including data privacy requirements).
* Partner with Security, Risk and Compliance to embed controls in delivery and operations.
* Support audit readiness through clear evidence, ownership, and remediation tracking.


**What Success Looks Like (first 6-12 Months)**
* A smooth execution cadence is in place across planning, governance, reporting, and follow-up.
* IT priorities are transparent, aligned, and actively managed (including trade-offs and dependencies).
* Leadership decisions are faster because they are well-prepared and data-driven.
* Standardized ways of working improve predictability, quality, and delivery follow-through.
* Compliance is embedded in processes rather than handled as last-minute checks.


**Who You Are**
 You are a structured, outcome-driven leader who can operate at executive level while staying close enough to execution to ensure momentum and delivery.
   

  

**You bring:**
* 10+ years of experience in IT leadership, strategy execution, governance, portfolio management, or operational excellence.
* Strong understanding of IT governance, performance management, and operating models.
* Experience with portfolio lifecycle management (prioritization, planning, tracking, value and risk oversight).
* Exposure to compliance, data privacy, and audit contexts, with ability to translate requirements into practical controls.
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills; able to influence without formal authority.
* Strong analytical skills and ability to turn complex inputs into clear options and decisions.
* Ability to work with pace, clarity, and discretion in a role close to the CDIO and leadership team.
* Fluency in English (Swedish is a plus, depending on the organization).


**Nice to have**
* Experience from a global product company, regulated environment, or complex enterprise IT landscape.
* Familiarity with frameworks such as ITIL, COBIT, Lean/Agile governance, or OKR-based execution.
* Experience implementing standardized reporting, portfolio tools, or governance routines at scale.


**Practical information**
* Reporting line: Chief Digitalization and Information Officer
* Location: Stockholm, hybrid


**Send your application (CV/LinkedIn profile) and a short note on why this role fits you.**
**Apply today!**
 We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**Where we stand:**
 We believe diversity not only enriches our workplace culture, but also gives us a strategic advantage. Working with people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives helps us all become better communicators, better problem solvers, and better human beings. Our differences make us stronger.
   

  

 Tobii Dynavox values equality of opportunity, human dignity, and racial/ethnic and cultural diversity. Tobii Dynavox does not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, age, veteran status, ancestry, or national or ethnic origin.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer/AA Women/Minorities/Veterans/Disabled

title: Head of Strategy and Growth
description:
**About The Role**
 As Head of Strategy and Growth, you define digital growth strategies and set direction across projects — bringing together insights from data, CRM, design, and development into clear priorities and actions.
   

  

 Your core responsibility is to define direction — turning inputs from different disciplines into a cohesive strategy. You work across data, technology, and user behaviour to ensure that initiatives are focused, aligned, and drive measurable growth.
   

  

 You also play a key role in evolving our strategy and growth offering — ensuring it remains relevant, differentiated, and commercially strong over time. While the role is primarily strategic, you stay close to execution and actively support key phases when needed to ensure ideas translate into real impact.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

* Define digital strategies and roadmaps across clients
* Turn data and insights into clear direction and priorities
* Guide decisions and help teams move forward with clarity
* Present recommendations to clients and stakeholders
* Drive how brands are discovered across search and AI-driven environments
* Identify opportunities where data, technology, and AI can drive new solutions and improvements
* Work closely with specialists to ensure strategy is implemented and optimised
* Step in during key phases to support teams hands-on and help unblock progress when needed
* Evolve and strengthen our strategy and growth offering


 How you’ll work
   

  

* Collaborate closely with CRM specialists, data analysts, designers, developers, and client Leads
* Bring together different perspectives into one clear direction
* Ensure alignment between business goals, strategy, and execution
* Stay close enough to execution to ensure quality, speed, and continuous improvement
* Act as a senior voice in shaping both client direction and internal ways of working


**Experience**
* 7+ years of experience in digital strategy, growth, product, or similar roles
* Strong understanding of key growth levers such as Paid Media, SEO, CRM, and CRO — with experience working closely with these disciplines in practice
* Strong understanding of how platforms, content, and data connect
* Comfortable presenting and guiding clients


 Profile
   

  

* Strong interest in understanding clients’ businesses and identifying opportunities for growth and development
* Confident presenting and communicating strategies, insights, and recommendations to clients and stakeholders
* Structured, proactive, and communicative
* Comfortable working across multiple projects
* Curious about AI and new ways of working
* Able to move between strategic direction and execution when needed to drive progress and results
* Fluent in Swedish and English (written and spoken)

title: Systemutvecklare inom IAM till IT-avdelningen på Karolinska Institutet
description:
****Vill du arbeta med identitetshantering i en miljö där din insats bidrar till forskning av världsklass?****




 Karolinska Institutet (KI), ett av världens ledande och EU:s främsta medicinska universitet, söker nu nya medarbetare till vår innovativa IT-avdelning. Tjänsten är placerad vid campus i Solna och ingår i Utvecklingsenheten.
