**Upplysningar om befattningen och rekryteringsprocessen**
 Sandra Jokinen
   

  

 Nås via FM växel 010-820 00 99
   

  

**Fackliga företrädare**
 Officersförbundet Urban Nyman
   

  

 TCO/Försvarsförbundet Jan Wasberg
   

  

 SACO Birgitta Strauss
   

  

 SEKO Jan-Anders Nilsson
   

  

 Samtliga nås via FM växel 010-820 00 99
   

  

**Ansökan**
**Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-06-16. Din ansökan ska innehålla CV och ansökningsbrev där du motiverar varför du är lämpad för denna befattning.**
 ,
 **Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via Försvarsmaktens webbplats.** 
 -------------------------------------------------------- Information om Försvarsmakten och det rekryterande förbandet: Försvarsmakten är inne i ett omfattande utvecklingsarbete för att bygga ett starkare försvar mot bakgrund av ett försämrat omvärldsläge och ny försvarspolitisk inriktning med fokus på det nationella försvaret. Ledning för ett starkare försvar syftar till att öka robustheten, förenkla lednings- och lydnadsförhållanden samt genom decentralisering av mandat och ansvar öka förutsättningarna för uppdragstaktik. Inom ramen för detta arbete har Försvarsmakten organiserat en Marinstab för ledning av de Marina förbanden. Marinstaben är etablerad på Muskö i Haninge kommun. I Försvarsmakten finns en stark värdegrund som bygger på öppenhet, resultat och ansvar. Professionell utveckling och personlig hälsa värdesätts och uppmuntras. Det finns goda förutsättningar för intern karriärrörlighet, friskvård samt bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv. En anställning hos oss innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. I anställningen ingår även en skyldighet att tjänstgöra utomlands. Innebörden av detta varierar beroende på typ av befattning. Till ansökan om anställning ska CV och personligt brev bifogas. Om du går vidare i anställningsprocessen ska alltid vidimerade kopior av betyg och intyg uppvisas. Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

title: Legal Counsel
description:
**Who are Benifex?** 
 💚💜
 



 We are a fast-moving technology company, and one of the most successful providers of online reward and benefits solutions in the world. We believe that everyone deserves an exceptional experience at work, every day, and build workplace technology that makes this happen. Benifex’s mission is to build remarkable experiences that employees love. Today Benifex supports more than five million employees in over 3,000 organisations across more than 100 countries. To help us on our quest to be the best, we need brilliant people on board and that’s where you come in. 🚀
 



  





**Why should you apply? 🌟** 



* Play a key role in a highly skilled global legal team, with a strong focus on impactful commercial agreements.
* Work closely with the business across multiple areas, gaining broad exposure to commercial, tech, and data protection matters.
* Take on meaningful responsibility from day one, combining autonomy with the support of experienced colleagues.
* Grow your career in a dynamic in-house role with real influence.
* Sunday Times Best Place to Work 2025 and Best Large Tech Company to Work for 2025
* Work for a profitable, fast-growing market leader in the online reward and employee benefits space.



  





**Great Benefits** 




 ⚖️ Guaranteed work-life balance with a hybrid working model
 



 🧠 ITP1 pension
 



 ❤️ Lifeplan - a leading financial advisory service that offers personalized advice for maximizing your pension savings
 



 📝 Collective agreement
 



 💸 Access to our comprehensive benefits portal.
 



 🤸 Generous wellness allowance
 



 ✈️ 30 vacation days / year
 



 💰 Referral bonuses
 



 🌟 Enhanced parental pay
 



 🙂 Volunteer Days – two paid days annually to give back to the community.
 



  





**Role Overview 🚀** 




 As a Legal Counsel, you will become a key member of our Nordic legal team, working across a broad range of commercial, tech, and data protection matters. A core part of the role is drafting, reviewing, and negotiating commercial agreements — and you should genuinely enjoy the hands-on aspect of this work. You will partner with internal stakeholders across the business, taking responsibility for managing multiple matters while knowing when to escalate and seek support. The role offers strong ownership, meaningful impact, and the chance to develop into a highly trusted in-house advisor. The position can be based in either our Gothenburg or Stockholm office and reports to the Lead Counsel Nordics.
 



  





**Responsibilities 🤘** 



* Draft, review, and negotiate commercial agreements, including SaaS, supplier, customer, and public procurement contracts.
* Identify legal risks within agreements and propose clear, business-focused solutions.
* Provide guidance on data protection and GDPR related matters.
* Support IT and tech-related legal questions, including compliance and contract assessments.
* Deliver pragmatic legal advice to internal stakeholders across Sweden and the Nordics.
* Contribute to the development and improvement of legal processes, templates, and internal knowledge.
* Manage several parallel matters, working both independently and collaboratively with senior colleagues.



  





**What are we looking for? 🔎** 



* 2–3 years of experience as an associate at a reputable business law firm or as in-house counsel
* Proven experience working with commercial agreements for at least 2–3 years - and a genuine interest in contract law and related negotiations.
* Strong legal analytical skills and the ability to prioritise effectively.
* A proactive, structured, and self-driven mindset with high ownership.
* Confident and clear communication skills when advising the business.
* A collaborative, humble approach and a strong sense of responsibility.
* Master of Laws (LL.M.) from a Swedish university.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, spoken and written.



  





**Bonus Points For** 



* Previous in-house experience working with commercial contracts.
* Exposure to GDPR or data processing agreements.
* Experience with IT or tech-related legal matters.



  





**Our interview process** 




**✌** 
 Benifex understands the need to have a fast and efficient process, the below will all be completed in the shortest time possible.
 



  





 📞 Initial call with the Talent team.
 



 🧪 Online tests in numeracy and logical reasoning.
 



 ⏳ Interview with the hiring manager.
 



 🤩 Final interview with a senior team member.
 



  





 We are looking forward to reading your application!
 



  





*Please let us know if you need any reasonable adjustments for interviews by replying to the email you will receive after you apply.*

title: Publisher Development Manager
description:
**About Impact.com** 




 impact.com is the world’s leading commerce partnership marketing platform, transforming the way businesses grow by enabling them to discover, manage, and scale partnerships across the entire customer journey. From affiliates and influencers to content publishers, brand ambassadors, and customer advocates, impact.com empowers brands to drive trusted, performance-based growth through authentic relationships. Its award-winning products—
 **Performance** 
 (affiliate),
 **Creator** 
 (influencer), and
 **Advocate** 
 (customer referral)—unify every type of partner into one integrated platform. As consumers increasingly rely on recommendations from people and communities they trust, impact.com helps brands show up where it matters most. Today, over 5,000 global brands, including Walmart, Uber, Shopify, Lenovo, L’Oréal, and Fanatics, rely on impact.com to power more than 225,000 partnerships that deliver measurable business results.
 



  





  





**Why this role is exciting:** 




 As a Publisher Development Manager, you will be responsible for business growth through strong problem solving and solution driven thinking. Your role is pivotal to ensure adoption and engagement of our product with our partners and establishing impact.com in the Nordic market. In this role, you will be responsible for identifying and recruiting new partners and publishers to the impact.com platform to build out our marketplace of publishers in the Nordics. Your key responsibilities will include the sourcing of key publisher and partner details, and to build and actively convert your pipeline of Nordic publishers. You will also act as the point of contact for brands and prospects across the Nordics to discuss partnership strategies and to facilitate publisher/brand partnerships. This role will work directly with the Nordics team and collaborate closely with the wider Publisher Development EMEA function
 



  





**Does this sound like you?** 



* A good understanding of the Nordic affiliate landscape and publisher types within the market
* A minimum of 2 years experience in a publisher facing role either from a brand or network perspective or comparable experience in a similar role
* Strong knowledge of the Nordic market and customer behaviour, ability to connect this knowledge with new and emerging publisher and partner types
* Able to spot opportunities and think creatively about connecting publishers with brands
* A business development mindset: identifying and pursuing the right opportunities
* Ability to work effectively in a hybrid structure across different teams
* Self-Motivated, Attention to Detail, Passion for Learning, Team player
* A strong understanding of the Impact offering and willingness to learn and understand impact’s standing against industry competitors
* Strong interpersonal, communication, and presentation skills across a variety of audiences & ability to read, write and speak with internal and external stakeholders in a highly professional manner
* Passionate about improving our partners experience and success with our products
* Moderate to Advanced experience using Salesforce or similar Sales CRM
* Keen attention to detail, organization, and ability to drive projects to completion



  





**Responsibilities:** 



* Understanding and identifying gaps in impact.com’s Nordics partner and publisher offering and filling these gaps through active publisher acquisition of key partners to our marketplace
* Working with emerging partner types to convey nuanced value proposition to Impact client base and accelerate time from sign up to activationIdentifying and growing emerging partner and publisher segments and making partnerships available to brands by allowing them to scale
* Interface between brands/prospects and publishers: understand and relay publisher value propositions and ability to translate brand/prospect needs to effectively connect brands with relevant publisher partners
* Develop internally and externally facing materials, presentations, webinars and other content to educate partners, publishers, brands, and internal teams
* Identifying sales and expansion opportunities amongst partner base for our supply side products
* Continuously learn about our product offering and ability to tackle partner issues or direct requests to relevant teams to deliver a solution.

title: Sub-Channel Manager Marketplaces
description:
Sales
   

  

 Permanent
   

  

**Job Description**
**Electrolux Group**
 At Electrolux Group, a leading global appliance company, we strive every day to shape living for the better for our consumers, our people and our planet. We share ideas and collaborate so that together, we can develop solutions that deliver enjoyable and sustainable living.
   

  

 Come, join us as you are. We believe diverse perspectives make us stronger and more innovative. In our global community of people from 100+ countries, we listen to each other, actively contribute and grow together.
   

  

 Join us in our exciting quest to build the future home!
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are now looking for a Sub-channel Manager Marketplaces to join our central E￼Commerce team in Europe. This team plays a critical role in identifying, developing, and scaling new commercial opportunities that drive profitable growth for Electrolux.
   

  

 In this role, you will take commercial ownership of our 3P Marketplace operations across selected key markets in Business Area Europe. Your mission is to grow online sales across all product categories while ensuring best-in-class marketplace performance and execution.
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Sales Execution & Support Europe and collaborate closely with both central and local e-commerce teams to deliver strong, sustainable results.
   

  

**Furthermore, in this role you will:**
* Shape Electrolux’s marketplace strategy: Monitor and analyze 3P marketplaces, assess strategic fit, understand local landscapes, and support the selection, onboarding, and rollout of new partners such as Amazon and eBay.
* Drive operational excellence: Refine central marketplace guidelines, establish effective ways of working between central and local teams, and share best practices to elevate our operational maturity.
* Boost daily commercial performance: Support Central Online Sales Managers and local D2C teams with content improvements, commercial activation, and range management—primarily for marketplaces but also for our own D2C channels when relevant.
* Own marketplace growth initiatives: Suggest and lead the commercial agenda for 3P marketplaces together with local D2C leaders, using insights on traffic, behaviour, and key metrics to optimize performance and maximize conversion.
* Deliver insights and actions: Provide weekly and monthly reporting, analyse campaigns and KPIs, identify trends, and recommend corrective actions that drive continuous improvement.
* Collaborate cross‑functionally: Work with sales, marketing, category management, supply chain, product line, and IT to ensure seamless execution and maximize sales impact.
* Improve technical and operational capabilities: Gather and document requirements (Change Requests) for technical and integration improvements and partner with our continuous improvement team to implement them.
* Champion the D2C e‑commerce strategy: Actively reinforce and support the execution of our strategy across markets.


**Who You Are**
* Consumer‑ and business‑minded. You combine strong commercial acumen with a deep understanding of consumer needs, ensuring every action adds value to the overall experience.
* Energetic and inspiring. Your enthusiasm motivates teams and stakeholders, helping drive accountability, engagement, and results—both short and long term.
* Passionate about growth. You’re committed to delivering profitable results and finding creative ways to create value for consumers in the e‑commerce channel.
* Agile yet structured. You quickly assess situations, organize information effectively, frame issues clearly, and make confident decisions even in ambiguous environments.
* Flexible and adaptable. You thrive in a fast-moving e‑commerce landscape and respond with a positive, solution‑oriented mindset.
* A collaborative team player. You lead initiatives confidently and work seamlessly with cross‑functional teams—from product line and IT to marketing and commercial leaders. You are comfortable navigating a large matrix organization with diverse markets, cultures, and stakeholders.


**Minimum Experience**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant field.
* At least 5 years of commercial experience working with D2C e‑commerce and 3P marketplaces.


**Key Skills**
* Solid operational experience managing sales in 3P marketplaces such as Amazon, eBay, or similar platforms.
* Strong ability to identify and interpret key drivers of digital sales and marketplace performance.
* Good technical understanding of e‑commerce systems, tools and integrations.
* Fluency in English (written and spoken).


**Where you will be:**
 This is a full-time position, based in our Global Headquarters in Stockholm (Sweden).
   

  

 We are proud of our culture of inclusivity and diversity. At our Global Headquarters we have 60+ nationalities working together for our common goals. You will be part of this dynamic international team where English is the natural language.
   

  

**Benefits highlights:**
* Flexible work hours/hybrid work environment
* Discounts on our award-winning Electrolux products and services
* Family-friendly benefits
* Insurance policy plan
* Extensive learning opportunities and flexible career path


 As part of Electrolux, we will continuously invest in you and your development. There are no barriers to where your career could take you.
   

  

 Find out more: https://www.electroluxgroup.com/en

title: Capital Raising Operations Professional
description:
EQT is seeking a Capital Raising Operations Professional to join our Capital Raising Operations team in Luxembourg. This is a high-impact role focused on managing operational aspects of new fundraises and elevating investor experience. If you enjoy working in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment with global exposure—read on.
   

  

****About The Team****
 The Capital Raising Operations team is part of Fund Operations, a global unit within EQT’s Central Functions. We are looking for an experienced Associate to support new fundraises in Private Wealth Management (PWM) from an operational perspective. The team works closely with several internal and external stakeholders to deliver best-in-class service and provide high-quality support to EQT’s investors.
   

  

 We focus on continuous improvement—streamlining internal processes, enhancing client communication, and leading or supporting various internal projects. We also collaborate with specialist teams across EQT to ensure compliance with investor and regulatory requirements in the alternative fund management industry. This role collaborates closely with teams in Stockholm and across EQT’s global offices.
   

  

****About The Role****
 As a Capital Raising Operations Professional, you will lead and coordinate operational processes tied to new fundraises, with a focus on EQT’s open-ended and semi-liquid fund structures. You’ll be a key point of contact for internal teams and external partners, ensuring smooth investor onboarding, efficient platform integration and a high level of client service. You’ll also help identify and implement process improvements and automation opportunities.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities****
* Lead operational sales discussions with clients alongside EQT’s Capital Raising team.
* Coordinate distributor and platform onboarding processes.
* Guide investors through product terms and onboarding documentation.
* Partner with legal and compliance to ensure regulatory alignment.
* Review and support distribution agreements (operational sections).
* Act as the main liaison with transfer agents, managing all trade order types (i.e. Subscriptions/Redemptions etc.) and communications.
* Oversee trading platform setup and monthly trade monitoring.
* Handle investor queries and client service tasks.
* Drive improvements to onboarding processes and digital enablement.
* Contribute to internal projects and operational product developments.


****About You****
 We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive professional who thrives in collaborative environments and has a strong service mindset. You’re structured, quality-focused and able to manage competing priorities with confidence.
   

  

**Essential qualifications and experience:**
* Bachelor's degree in finance or a related field.
* 5+ years’ relevant experience in private equity, asset management, transfer agency services or a similar role.
* Familiarity with European trading platforms, fund distribution infrastructure, and automated trading processes.
* Strong knowledge of Trade processing (subscriptions/Redemptions)
* Solid understanding of investor onboarding processes within Transfer Agency, including account setup, KYC/AML requirements, and documentation workflows.
* Hands-on experience leading projects, including defining scope, coordinating cross-functional teams, managing timelines, and ensuring successful delivery.


****What We Offer****
* A unique opportunity in one of EQT’s fastest-growing areas.
* Work alongside a team of passionate and highly skilled professionals.
* A dynamic, international environment with cross-border collaboration.
* Opportunities for professional development and career growth.
* A chance to shape the operational future of fundraising at EQT.


****Compensation & Benefits Notice****
 We offer a competitive total rewards package including base salary, determined based on the role, experience, skill set, and location. Eligible employees may also receive discretionary incentive compensation, awarded in recognition of individual performance and company results. EQT provides a comprehensive benefits offering designed to support employee wellbeing, development, and work-life balance. Benefits include paid time off, parental leave, wellbeing and wellness support, flexible working arrangements, and learning and development opportunities. Benefits are effective from the first day of employment and may vary by location and role.
   

  

**Salary Range Disclosure**
 Compensation for this Luxembourg-based position is competitive and will be determined based on role scope, experience, skills, and local market conditions. The role is also eligible for an annual discretionary bonus.
   

  

**Inclusion at EQT**
 Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact.
   

  

 Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.
   

  

 At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative, and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.
   

  

****About EQT****
 EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of more than three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR 266 billion in total assets under management (EUR 141 billion in fee-generating assets under management) as of 30 June 2025, within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does.
   

  

 The EQT AB Group comprises EQT AB (publ) and its direct and indirect subsidiaries, which include general partners and fund managers of EQT funds as well as entities advising EQT funds. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.
   

  

 More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
****About** 
**EQT****
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Paid Social Specialist - Vitamin Well Group
description:
*At* 
***Vitamin Well Group,***
*we provide great-tasting drinks, snacks, and protein products. Our brands Vitamin Well, NOCCO, and Barebells are available across most of Europe, North America, the MENA region, and parts of Asia Pacific. With a revenue of 650 million euros, we operate in over 40 markets, with headquarters in Stockholm and offices in fourteen countries around the world.* 




  





**About The Role** 




 We are looking for a
 **Paid Social Specialist** 
 to execute and evolve paid social campaigns across multiple brands and markets, with a primary focus on building brand awareness while maintaining a strong link to performance and sales.
 



  





 In this role, you will work closely with the paid social team and cross-functional stakeholders to launch, manage, and optimise campaigns. You will support turning insights, trends, and content into results, while developing your skills within paid social and performance marketing.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 



* Execute paid social campaigns across platforms such as TikTok and Meta
* Support the identification and scaling of high-performing organic content into paid campaigns
* Manage campaign setup and support day-to-day optimisation
* Monitor performance and contribute to reporting and analysis
* Support A/B testing across creatives, audiences, and formats
* Work closely with organic social and design teams to ensure a strong and consistent content flow
* Stay up to date on platform developments, trends, and emerging formats
* Collaborate with local marketing teams to support market-specific adaptations
* Contribute to documenting learnings and developing best practices



  





**Who are you** 




 You have 2–4+ years of experience within paid social, digital marketing, or performance marketing, and hands-on experience running campaigns on platforms such as TikTok and Meta. You have a basic understanding of social-first creatives and how content performs across social platforms.
 



  





 You are familiar with campaign setup and optimisation, A/B testing, and performance tracking and reporting. You take a data-driven approach, use insights to improve performance, and are motivated to keep learning and developing your skills.
 



  





 You are comfortable working in a fast-paced, test-and-learn environment and work closely with teams across marketing, brand, and creative.
 



  





**What you will bring** 



* 2–4+ years of experience within paid social, digital marketing, or performance marketing
* Hands-on experience running campaigns on TikTok and/or Meta
* Basic understanding of social-first creatives and performance drivers
* Familiar with campaign setup, optimisation, A/B testing, and performance tracking
* Strong analytical mindset and willingness to learn from data
* Comfortable working in a fast-paced, test-and-learn environment
* Strong collaboration and communication skills



  





**It is a plus if you have** 



* Experience from FMCG, DTC, or other consumer brands
* Experience working with influencer or creator collaborations
* Understanding of tracking and attribution (e.g. pixel, SKAN, CAPI)
* Experience working with UGC
* Interest in social trends, content, and digital culture



  





**Welcome with your application at the latest April 26th 2026.** 




*We will review applications on an ongoing basis and the position may be filled before the last application day. We appreciate LinkedIn, but to get a full picture of your experience, we ask you to also include a CV.* 




  





**Life at Vitamin Well Group** 




 Our growing family is made up of over 600 employees, representing a variety of cultures, experiences and diverse backgrounds. This diversity is a great asset as we continue our expansion and evolve our portfolio. At the same time, Vitamin Well is still very much a Swedish company, promoting Swedish values when it comes to both business and people. We treat each other in a fair and equal way, and we respect one another based on our qualities. As we expand Vitamin Well Group’s business, we are also committed to minimizing our environmental impact and continuously strive to lower emissions from for example production, logistics, and packaging.
 



  





 Working at Vitamin Well, we provide a dynamic environment defined by ambition, dedication, and an entrepreneurial spirit. In our action-oriented culture, the ability to make swift decisions is paramount in bringing ideas to fruition. We are committed to fostering an atmosphere where every individual's unique strengths contribute to our collective success. As a health and exercise-oriented company, we inspire an active lifestyle by partnering with top-performing athletes, but we also promote and support exercise among our employees.
 



  





*As part of the recruitment process, we may ask you to conduct a personality test as well as a test that measures logical ability. The purpose of the tests is to evaluate candidates as objective as possible and identify the best possible match for the role. The tests are based on solid research and are taken through our partner Alva Labs.*

title: Sales Manager Nordics and Baltics
description:
**Step into the role**
 At MilDef, we deliver rugged, secure IT solutions for demanding environments worldwide. As we continue to grow globally, we are strengthening our sales team with an experienced and driven Sales Manager to accelerate growth and expand our market presence.
   

  

 The Sales Manager drives sales performance across defined accounts, territories or segments. The mix between new business development and management of existing accounts is sorted through the allocation of accounts, territory or segment to the Sales Manager. The allocation may include Key Account Manager responsibilities. The Sales Manager is key for executing regional sales strategies, managing customer relationships, and contributing to pipeline growth.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and manage key stakeholder relationships within assigned accounts. Collaborate with the Key Account Manager (KAM), where applicable, to ensure high customer satisfaction and retention.
* Create and execute account plans that align customer needs with company objectives. Drive upsell and cross-sell opportunities to maximize account value.
* Support business growth through proactive engagement, solution selling, and strategic account development.
* Execute sales activities in line with account plans and regional strategy.
* Identify and pursue new business opportunities within the assigned territory.
* Collaborate cross-functionally with internal teams (e.g., Marketing, Product Management, Legal, Production) to support deal execution and ensure customer needs are met. Share insights on market trends and customer requirements.
* Maintain accurate CRM records and provide timely reporting of pipeline and forecasts.
* Represent the company at customer meetings, trade shows, and events.


**What you bring**
* Proven ability to manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure
* Strong business development skills with a proactive, opportunity-driven mindset
* Excellent relationship-building and customer engagement skills
* Ability to qualify and prioritize opportunities effectively
* Structured in pipeline management and forecasting
* Clear and confident communication and presentation skills
* Results-driven with a focus on growth and long-term success
* Understands the defence sector landscape, procurement cycles, and competitive dynamics.


**Get to know us**
 At MilDef, you'll be part of a company that values hands-on involvement, strong team spirit, and the development of defense technology. With us, you will have the opportunity to develop new skills, contribute to cross-functional projects, and make a real impact on our continued success. We encourage continuous learning and collaboration, and we offer excellent opportunities for career development. We are proud to actively promote health and work-life balance. We do this, among other things, by offering attractive employee benefits and wellness initiatives, such as wellness activities during working hours.
   

  

 Would you like to know more about MilDef, our products, and our culture? MilDef.com
   

  

 For further information, please contact Linnéa Blixt, HR
   

  

**Important information**
 We conduct drug tests on all our future colleagues before employment.
   

  

 Due to the nature of our operations, employment regardless of position may be subject to background and security related checks. For certain positions, additional requirements may apply, including security clearance, classification within a security category, or citizenship requirements.
   

  

***MilDef - WE ARMOR IT.***
*MilDef is a global systems integrator and full-spectrum provider specializing in rugged IT for military, government and critical infrastructure sectors. MilDef provides hardware, software, and services that shield and protect critical information streams and systems, when and where the stakes are the highest. MilDef’s products are sold to more than 200 customers through companies in Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, the United States and Australia, and through partner networks in more than 40 countries. MilDef was founded in 1997 and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021.*
**We kindly decline contact from advertising and recruitment sales.**

title: Retail Media Lead
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 As the Retail Media Lead at Haypp Group, you will be the strategic architect behind our rapidly evolving retail media ecosystem. With a footprint spanning 7 countries and 16 e-commerce platforms, we are looking for a visionary leader to scale our current offering into a world-class advertising network.
   

  

 You won't just be managing a product, you’ll be bridging the gap between technology, data, and commercial execution. Your mission is to maximize the value of our first-party data and digital real estate, creating a seamless experience for our brand partners while driving significant incremental revenue for the Group.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Strategic Roadmap: Define and execute the global retail media strategy, identifying opportunities to enhance our current offering across all 16 platforms.
* Cross-Functional Orchestration: Act as the central hub between Tech, Marketing, and Data teams to build scalable ad tech solutions and measurement frameworks.
* Regional Leadership: Provide guidance and best practices to Local Retail Media Managers, ensuring global consistency with local relevance.
* Product Development: Partner with the Product and Tech teams to implement new ad formats (on-site, off-site, and social) and improve self-service capabilities.
* Data Monetisation: Work closely with the Data team to refine audience segmentation and attribution modelling, proving ROI for our brand partners.
* Commercial Excellence: Support the sales process by developing compelling media kits, pricing strategies, and performance reporting standards.


**Who You Are**
* The Connector: You speak the language of marketing, commercial, developers & data scientists equally well.
* The Strategist: You don't just look at today's revenue, you’re looking at how retail media trends will shift over the next three to five years.
* The Executor: You are comfortable navigating the complexity of a multi-market, multi-platform environment and can drive projects to completion.


**What We Want From You**
* Experience: 8+ years in Retail Media, AdTech, or E-commerce strategy.
* Technical Savvy: Strong understanding of ad servers, SSP/DSPs, and first-party data activation
* Analytical Mindset: Ability to translate complex data sets into actionable insights for advertisers.
* Leadership: Proven track requirement in managing stakeholders in a matrixed or international organization.
* Communication: Fluent in English, ability to present complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences.


**What We Offer**
 We are a value driven company with our values
 *We team up* 
 ,
 *Innovation Drives Us* 
 ,
 *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* 
 and
 *Going the Extra Mile* 
 at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:
   

  

* Premium ITP1 occupational pension savings plan
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!
   

  

 Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Implementeringskonsult
description:
**Implementationskonsult – monday.com** 




 Skapa, innovera och digitalisera företag – bli en del av vårt monday.com team idag! Straviont är ett snabbt växande IT- och managementkonsultföretag i Stockholm, och nu söker vi en engagerad teammedlem.
 



**Om rollen** 
  Du får helhetsansvaret för projektleveranser till din egen kundportfölj. Du driver kundrelationerna självständigt och arbetar operativt med strategi, systemuppsättning, utbildning och löpande support i monday.com.
 



  





**Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden** 



* **Strategisk rådgivning:** 
  Vägleda kunder i att kartlägga och optimera processer.
* **Leda projekt:** 
  Hålla i workshops och driva sessioner med kunder.
* **Bygga lösningar:** 
  Konfigurera arbetsflöden, automationer och integrationer (monday.com, Make.com, API:er).
* **Projektledning:** 
  Äga projekt från start till mål och säkerställa hög kvalitet.
* **Utbildning:** 
  Utbilda kunder för att säkerställa systemadoption.



  





**Vem är du?** 



* **Erfarenhet:** 
  Minst 2 års erfarenhet inom konsultverksamhet, systemimplementering eller liknande.
* **Utbildning:** 
  Relevant kandidatexamen (eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet).
* **Egenskaper:** 
  Proaktiv, lösningsorienterad och självgående problemlösare.
* **Språk:** 
  Utmärkt svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* **Placering:** 
  Utgår från Stockholm.
* **Meriterande:** 
  Erfarenhet av CRM/ERP-system, API:er och integrationsplattformar (t.ex. Make.com).



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 



* Hybrid arbetsmodell.
* Fast månadslön + prestationsbaserad bonus.
* Goda möjligheter till kompetens- och karriärutveckling.
* Ett tajt, drivet och samarbetsinriktat team.



  





**Jobbinformation** 



* **Plats:** 
  Stockholm (på plats/hybrid)
* **Omfattning:** 
  Heltid
* **Start:** 
  Omgående / Enligt överenskommelse
* **Kontakt:** 
  eddie@straviont.com (för frågor, ej ansökningar)



  





**Ansök här:** 
  https://www.straviont.com/sv/careers/implementation-consultant

title: Social Media, PR & Communications Director
description:
**About Star Stable Entertainment** 




 Once upon a time in 2011, the founders of Star Stable Entertainment had a vision. They wanted to create a game that could make a difference. Although half of gamers are girls and women, they were under-represented in the gaming industry, both as characters and creators. We dreamed of an epic online world where tween and teen girls could share an amazing experience. And we wanted to challenge how things were done in a male-dominated industry. Fast forward to today, and our dream has come true tenfold - Star Stable Online stands as one of the most popular MMORPGs globally! At our HQ on Södermalm, our 150 employees are thrilled to continue to welcome players to the island of Jorvik, with its breathtaking scenery, beautiful horses, and magical quests. It’s wonderful to see that our dream resonates with so many players around the world, and we can’t wait to share more stories and experiences with them!
 



  





**The position** 




 We are currently looking for a Social Media, PR & Communications Director to join and lead our Social Media & Communications team. This person will own and elevate Star Stable’s social media, PR and communications into a cohesive storytelling and reputation engine that builds trust, improves player sentiment, amplifies community creativity, and drives sustainable organic growth.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 



* Set vision, strategy and priorities for Social, PR and Communications
* Shape and protect the brand in the outside world, ensuring a clear, consistent and compelling presence across Social, PR and Communications
* Lead and develop the Social & Community team
* Drive community‑led campaigns (UGC, referrals, collaborative creation)
* Oversee PR planning & execution, announcements and media relations
* Manage public sentiment and reputational risk
* Work cross-functionally and align closely with Product, Game, Legal and the extended Marketing team
* Define success metrics for sentiment, engagement and organic reach
* Turn community passion into stories, events, and PR moments that people want to share and talk about beyond our own community.



  





**We think you have** 



* 10+ Senior leadership experience in Social, PR or Communications
* Experience leading teams
* Experience in gaming, entertainment or youth‑focused brands
* Experience working with highly engaged online communities
* Full professional proficiency in English (written and verbal)



  





**It’s a plus if you have** 



* Experience managing public sentiment and reputational risk
* Background in PR, journalism or brand communications
* Relevant degree or equivalent experience in Communications, Marketing or Media



  





**Perks for joining us?** 



* A pretty sweet mission. We are developing the world's best horse-riding game for girls and we take that vision very seriously. We strive to hit that mark every single day.
* 30 vacation days (+ 3 additional squeeze days).
* A pension and insurance plan that mimics ITP1 and a parental pay top-up @90%.
* Health allowance at 5000 SEK per year.
* Hybrid working model - combine WFH and being together with the team at our new office located right amidst Södermalm GameDev cluster (Magnus Ladulåsgatan 65)
* Fitness discount of 18% at SATS gym + company workout classes.
* A dog friendly office! Bring your furry friend to work!



  





 Are you ready to be a chapter on this magical journey? Apply now! We can’t wait to hear your story!

title: Student worker Website & SEO - part time
description:
**About Us**
 Every day, we get opportunities to make a positive impact – on our colleagues, partners, customers and society. Together, we’re pioneering the solutions of the future and unlocking the full potential of precious resources. Trusted to act on initiative, we challenge conventional thinking to develop world-leading technologies that inspire progress in vital areas, including energy, food, water and shipping.
   

  

 As we push forward, the innovative, open spirit that fuels our 140-year-old start-up culture and rapid growth also drives our personal growth. So, as we shape a more resourceful, less wasteful world, we build our careers too.
   

  

**About The Job**
 The Nordic Marketing team is dedicated to driving the company’s online growth and visibility. By staying on top of digital trends and leveraging the latest tools, the team ensures the company’s online presence remains competitive and engaging. You will support these activities by focusing on website updates and SEO/GEO improvements.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Perform website updates as identified with the Digital Marketing team
* Support with SEO and GEO improvements on key webpages as well as performance tracking
* Ad-hoc support related to Digital Advertisement activities


**What You Know**
 You study for a degree in Marketing, Digital Marketing, IT or a related field. To be able to learn and grow in this student work position, you possess the following capabilities.
   

  

* Knowledge on SEO/GEO
* Curiosity and learning abilities
* Agility and service-minded nature, understanding the importance of accuracy and efficiency.
* A digital mindset, open to changes and new technologies.
* Good knowledge of Microsoft Office programs.
* Native speaker in one of the Nordic languages (Danish, Swedish, Norwegian or Finnish) – Norwegian is a plus


**What’s In It For You**
 At Alfa Laval, you’ll be part of a global team that values innovation, sustainability, and continuous improvement. You’ll work in a dynamic environment where your ideas and contributions truly matter—and where your work helps shape a better future.
   

  

**For Unions Information In Sweden, Please Contact**
 Monica Anderberg, Unionen, at Monica.Anderberg@alfalaval.com
   

  

 Johan Ranhög, Akademikerna at Johan.Ranhög@alfalaval.com
   

  

 Stefan Sandell, Ledarna at Stefan.Sandell@alfalaval.com
   

  

 We are conducting a continuous review of the applications received. We
 **do not accept applications via email** 
 , due to General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
   

  

 We care about diversity, inclusion, and equity in our recruitment processes. We also believe behavioural traits can provide important insights into a candidate's fit to a role. To help us achieve this we apply Pymetrics assessments, and upon application you will be invited to play the assessment games. Playing the games is mandatory.
   

  

 As part of our commitment to maintaining a safe and secure workplace, we conduct background checks on final candidates for this role.
   

  

 We look forward to hearing from you soon!

title: Modellägare Transaktionsmonitorering AML
description:
*Vill du ta ett helhetsansvar för hur en bank arbetar med att upptäcka och förebygga penningtvätt genom avancerad transaktionsmonitorering? Vi söker nu en Modellägare Transaktionsmonitorering AML till Länsförsäkringar Bank – en nyckelroll där du utvecklar och optimerar våra modeller för att identifiera komplexa mönster och beteenden kopplade till penningtvätt i en miljö där både regulatoriska krav och komplexa beteendemönster står i fokus.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som Modellägare Transaktionsmonitorering AML har du ett övergripande ansvar för bankens modell för att upptäcka misstänkt penningtvätt genom transaktionsmonitorering, med målet att säkerställa en effektiv och kontinuerligt förbättrad transaktionsmonitorering. Du arbetar med att analysera beteenden och mönster över tid, och omsätter affärs- och riskbehov till träffsäkra, datadrivna lösningar som stärker bankens förmåga att identifiera och hantera risker kopplade till penningtvätt.
   

  

 Rollen innebär ett nära samarbete med AML-analytiker, specialister, verksamhetsutvecklare, IT och systemleverantör. Du har en central roll i att utveckla och optimera regler och modeller i en miljö där både regulatoriska krav och hotbilden ständigt förändras.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer exempelvis att vara:
   

  

* Ansvara för bankens modell för transaktionsmonitorering inom AML
* Analysera transaktionsmönster, beteenden och regelutfall
* Sätta och optimera regler baserat på data och riskbedömningar
* Följa upp modellens träffsäkerhet och driva förbättringar
* Samarbeta med verksamhet, IT och leverantörer
* Bidra till utveckling av metodik och arbetssätt inom AML
* Ta fram rutiner och arbetsprocesser för området


 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Akademisk examen inom ett relevant område
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av liknande uppdrag med ansvar för dataanalys, modeller eller regelverk
* Erfarenhet inom AML och FCP-området, samt djup förståelse för AML-regelverk och risker kopplade till penningtvätt
* Dokumenterad kompetens inom programmering och modellering
* Ett datadrivet arbetssätt och stark analytisk förmåga


 Som person har du en mycket god samarbetsförmåga och trivs i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och teknik. Du har hög kognitiv förmåga och trivs i en roll där du behöver fatta välgrundade beslut baserat på komplex information. Vidare är du strukturerad och noggrann och kan omsätta komplexa data till tydliga insikter och rekommendationer. Du tar gärna initiativ, driver utveckling och får med dig andra även utan formellt mandat.
   

  

**Kontaktpersoner:**
 Rekryterande chef: tina.govers@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: christina.berg@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar Bank är en av Sveriges största banker med ett brett erbjudande inom betalningar, sparande och bolån.
   

  

 Financial Crime Prevention (FCP) är ett prioriterat område där vi stärker vårt arbete med att förebygga, identifiera och hantera finansiell brottslighet. Vi är på en resa där vi bygger framtidens förmågor inom området – med fokus på datadrivna arbetssätt, effektiv regelefterlevnad och ett starkt kundskydd. Här får du arbeta i en verksamhet med hög relevans, där ditt arbete bidrar till att skydda både kunder och samhälle. Hos oss blir du en del av en miljö där vi tillsammans utvecklar lösningar, skapar struktur i komplexa frågor och formar framtidens landskap – med målet att skapa trygghet och möjligheter.

title: Erfaren Bid Manager inom IT – offentliga och privata upphandlingar
description:
*Vi söker nu en senior och affärsdriven Bid Manager som tar helhetsansvar och driver anbudsprocessen självständigt för offentliga och privata upphandlingar samt komplexa anbuds- och offertprocesser inom IT.*
 I rollen leder du anbudsarbetet från uppstart till inlämning. Du säkerställer att anbudet är konkurrenskraftigt och väl avvägt utifrån krav, affär, risk och kvalitet med fokus på att vinna rätt affärer.
   

  

 Rollen är varierad och spänner från standardiserade avrop (t.ex. från ramavtal) till stora, affärskritiska IT-upphandlingar. Vi arbetar som ett team där vi hjälps åt och tar gemensamt ansvar för helheten, oavsett storlek på affären.
   

  

 Som Bid Manager har du en central roll i vår tillväxt. Du sitter nära både sälj, produktspecialister och andra nyckelfunktioner och håller ihop helheten i anbudsarbetet. Du leder anbudsprocessen med tydliga beslutspunkter och ett starkt kvalitetsfokus. Genom att driva arbetet proaktivt skapar du framdrift hela vägen till inlämning och bidrar direkt till att vi vinner affärer och bygger långsiktiga kundrelationer.
   

  

 Bid Manager på Advania 🚀
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden**
 Du ser till att varje anbud håller ihop hela vägen, inte bara innehållsmässigt, utan också mot krav, villkor och regelverk. Du samlar in underlag från rätt personer, sammanställer och kvalitetssäkrar dokumentation och presentationer så att budskapet är tydligt och komplett.
   

  

 I rollen ingår även kundnära moment där du deltar i dialoger och presentationer kopplat till pågående och kommande affärer. Du bidrar dessutom till att stärka vårt anbudsarbete över tid genom kunskapsdelning, interna utbildningsinsatser och genom att vidareutveckla våra arbetssätt.
   

  

**Exempel på vad du ansvarar för:**
* Säkerställa att anbud uppfyller kundkrav, kommersiella villkor, relevanta regelverk (inklusive LOU) och interna riktlinjer.
* Sammanställa, koordinera och kvalitetssäkra anbudsdokumentation och presentationer.
* Delta i kundbesök, dialoger och presentationer för pågående och kommande affärer.
* Bidra till kunskapsdelning och interna utbildningsinsatser inom anbud, upphandling och anbudsprocesser.
* Utmana och vidareutveckla arbetssätt kopplat till anbud, upphandling och offertarbete.


 Vad vi söker hos dig ✨
   

  

**Vi söker dig som:**
* Har flerårig erfarenhet av att leda anbudsarbete och koordinera bid teams i komplexa IT-affärer, gärna inom både offentlig och privat sektor.
* Tar ett tydligt ägarskap för anbudsprocessen och kan driva flera parallella, komplexa affärer i högt tempo från start till inlämning.
* Trivs i en roll där självständighet och beslutskraft är avgörande för resultatet.
* Har stark kommersiell förståelse och ett tydligt affärsdriv.
* Är strukturerad och trygg i att leda tvärfunktionella team mot gemensamma mål.
* Kommunicerar obehindrat i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska.
* Samarbetar prestigelöst, delar kunskap och får med dig andra i arbetet kring affären.


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av offentliga upphandlingar enligt LOU
* Erfarenhet från IT-branschen eller närliggande teknisk verksamhet
* Projektledarerfarenhet eller vana att leda komplexa initiativ
* Vana att arbeta i upphandlings- och anbudsverktyg, exempelvis TendSign (Mercell) och e-Avrop, samt i verktyg för dokument-, krav- och samarbetsstyrning, såsom SharePoint, Teams eller motsvarande


 Du är tydlig, lyhörd och drivande, och skapar framdrift även när många intressenter ska samlas kring samma affär. Du får med dig teamet, håller ihop helheten och säkerställer att anbudet är komplett, väl avvägt och håller hög kvalitet.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
 Vi erbjuder en strategisk och affärskritisk roll där du får stor påverkan på vår tillväxt. Du får arbeta med stora, komplexa och affärsmässigt utmanande upphandlingar i en professionell och samarbetsinriktad miljö, tillsammans med kompetenta kollegor.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats".
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Product Specialist Automatic Milking Systems
description:
Do you want to work in a global company where you can contribute to a more sustainable food production? DeLaval is a leading developer, manufacturer, and supplier of solutions for dairy farmers around the world. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers do more with less.
   

  

 Are you a product owner & creative thinker?
   

  

 Do you love to own a product portfolio and solve problems while adapting to a fast-paced environment?
   

  

 Do you want to be part of a global leader in automatic milking systems and make a difference in the lives of dairy farmers?
   

  

 If you answered Yes to these questions, then we have an exciting opportunity for you!
   

  

 We are looking for a Product Specialist to work with our market leading robotic milking of dairy cows, primarily the Voluntary Milking System (VMS).
   

  

 Our milking systems are designed to improve the efficiency, productivity and welfare of dairy farms around the world
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
 You will be part of our team that works with the latest technology and is at the forefront of innovation in the industry. Our Product Specialists have the product ownership of the VMS portfolio. This includes making decisions with regards to product lifecycle management, quality assurance, executing on road map plans as well as securing the future competitiveness of the VMS system. Your daily job consists of multiple speaking partners and cross functional work - adjacent Product Owners, R&D teams for Product Development, Markets globally, Suppliers and Sourcing departments. The Product Specialist is a key role in the bridge between our Markets and R&D teams.
   

  

**Some Of Your Key Responsibilities Will Include**
* Product ownership of the VMS product.
* Leading requirement management of the VMS product.
* Ensure product competitiveness for quality, functionality, and cost.
* Supporting our markets to promote and sell the VMS systems.
* Contribute to the innovation and development strategies based on market input.
* Manage the quality work and warranty claims resolution.
* Maintain spare-part assortment.


**Qualifications**
 To be successful in this role we believe that you have:
   

  

* University degree in Engineering, Product Management, Technical Agriculture or experience equivalent to similar degree.
* Have experience with or in product management.
* Good listener and communicator who can combine commercial knowledge, product capabilities and process requirements into solutions to provide high business value.
* Process minded; able to deliver according to a defined strategy/provide strategic input.
* Fluent English, spoken and written. Fluent Swedish is beneficial. Other languages are appreciated.


 We're looking for someone who is organized, analytical and can adapt to fast pace changing environment. You'll need to interact effectively with cross-functional and cross-cultural teams. You will have the ability to work independently and as part of a team and be a strong influencer.
   

  

**Working at DeLaval**
 Our core values Passion, People, Professionals and Partnerships connect individuals across entities and geographies. Success is far more than knowledge – it is strongly related to behaviour. At DeLaval we are all guided by our three behaviours: Set Direction, Make Things Happen and One DeLaval.
   

  

 We Offer You a Workplace Like No Other, Where State-of-the-art Technology Goes Hand In Hand With Animal Welfare. DeLaval Is a Part Of The Tetra Laval Group Together With Tetra Pak And Sidel. In Addition, We Offer
   

  

* Secure employment and benefits from the collective agreement (occupational pension, work-related accident insurance).
* Parental leave compensation (approx. 10 percent of the employee's monthly salary).
* Wellness allowance of SEK 4 000/year.
* Private healthcare insurance.
* Flexible working hours and reduced working hours.
* 30 days paid annual leave.


**Additional Information**
 This is a full-time permanent position, based at DeLaval’s headquarters in Tumba, south of Stockholm. The position will report to the System Director Automatic Milking Systems. We offer a hybrid workplace model, allowing flexibility to work remotely. The job requires some domestic and international travel.
   

  

 We review applications ongoing. We do not accept applications via email, however if you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don’t hesitate to contact us.
   

  

**Contact**
 Hiring manager: Gareth Johns, gareth.johns@delaval.com
   

  

 Recruiter: Mathias Gunnstedt, mathias.gunnstedt@delaval.com
   

  

**About DeLaval**
 Our vision is to make sustainable food production possible. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers, dairy farmers, do more with less by providing world-leading milking equipment and solutions.
   

  

 Today, DeLaval has approximately 4,500 passionate professionals operating in more than 100 markets around the world. DeLaval is part of the Tetra Laval Group.
   

  

 See more at corporate.delaval.com

title: Arkivregistrator till trafikkontoret
description:
**Välkommen till oss**
 Hos oss arbetar du där det händer, i hjärtat av vår vackra huvudstad.
   

  

 Informationshanteringsenheten är en del av avdelningen Verksamhetsstöd, som ansvarar för stöd inom hr, it, säkerhet och beredskap, synpunktshantering och nämndadministration.
   

  

 Vi är 17 anställda, alla med olika ansvarsområden men med ett och samma mål: att styra och stödja trafikkontorets informationsrelaterade utveckling inom områdena arkiv och registratur, informationssäkerhet och dataskydd. Informationshanteringsenheten arbetar även på uppdrag av exploateringskontoret.
   

  

 Nu söker vi dig som värdesätter att ge bra service till både kollegor och allmänheten i frågor som kan handla om allt från att hitta en ritning till ett specifikt byggnadsverk till att leta fram avtal som rör stadens olika samarbeten och projekt. Det kan vara både enkla och snabba frågor men också lite kluriga som kräver mer efterforskning.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
 Vi har en trygg arbetsplats där vi hjälper och stöttar varandra och tillsammans värnar om den goda arbetsmiljön. Du erbjuds kompetensutveckling och självklart ges du goda möjligheter till delaktighet och inflytande.
   

  

 Arbetsmiljö och hälsa är viktigt för oss. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, friskvårdstimme och möjlighet att delta i friskvårdsaktiviteter.
   

  

 Läs gärna mer om våra förmåner och hur det är att jobba i Stockholms stad.
   

  

**Din roll**
 Som arkivregistrator ingår du i en arbetsgrupp med ytterligare tre arkivregistratorer. Arkivregistratorerna ambulerar mellan två arbetsplatser, dels det tekniska arkivet, som ligger i Stadsarkivets lokaler på Liljeholmskajen, dels avtalsarkivet i Tekniska nämndhuset på Fleminggatan. Utgångspunkten är att man delar sin tid mellan de två arbetsplatserna, vilket gör arbetet omväxlande, men kräver också att man är flexibel och kan ställa om med kort varsel.
   

  

 Vårt fokusområde är att tillgängliggöra och lämna ut allmänna handlingar i enlighet med offentlighetsprincipen till privatpersoner, företag, myndigheter, konsulter, våra egna anställda med flera. Du arbetar med skanning och registrering av avtal, ritningar, teknisk dokumentation och andra handlingar. Vid utlämnande av allmänna handlingar ingår även sekretessbedömningar. Kundkontakterna sker via e-post, besök och telefon. Eftersom vi ska vara tillgängliga under våra öppettider krävs det att vi arbetar på plats och möjligheten till distansarbete är alltså begränsad.
   

  

**Din kompetens och erfarenhet**
 Då vi har mycket kontakt med såväl interna som externa personer behöver du vara lyhörd, ha en god servicekänsla och kommunikativ förmåga. Du bemöter andra lugnt och professionellt. Vi lägger stor vikt vid att du är en strukturerad, ordningsam och noggrann person som själv tar ansvar för att driva ditt eget arbete framåt. Du behöver vara flexibel och tycka om att samarbeta, så att det dagliga arbetet blir så effektivt som möjligt.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

* gymnasieexamen
* aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet från arbete i arkiv, registratur eller annan administrativ verksamhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer som relevant
* god förmåga att uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift på svenska
* grundläggande kunskaper i engelska
* grundläggande it-kunskaper, främst i Officepaketet och lätt för att lära dig nya system.


 Det är meriterande om du har
   

  

* erfarenhet av arbete inom offentlig verksamhet
* erfarenhet från ett serviceyrke
* kunskap om lagar och regler gällande allmänna handlingar, främst tryckfrihetsförordningen och offentlighets- och sekretesslagen
* praktisk erfarenhet av att tillämpa ovanstående lagar vid utlämnande av allmänna handlingar
* erfarenhet av att hantera säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade handlingar
* arkivvetenskaplig utbildning


 Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid personlig lämplighet, motivation och engagemang för tjänsten.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Vi ser mångfald som berikande och välkomnar alla sökanden.
   

  

**Övrigt**
 I det tekniska arkivet på Liljeholmskajen förekommer en del tunga lyft. Att hantera ritningar, flytta arkivboxar med mera är ett rörligt arbete som kräver viss uthållighet och styrka.
   

  

 Som en del av rekryteringen kommer vi använda arbetspsykologiska tester.
   

  

 En anställning hos innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. En säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kommer genomföras före beslut om anställning.

title: (Senior) Sales Executive Nordics - Sherpany
description:
Datasite and its associated businesses are the global center for facilitating economic value creation for companies across the globe. From data rooms to AI deal sourcing
   

  

 and more. Here you’ll find the finest technological pioneers: Datasite, Blueflame AI, Grata, and Sherpany. They all, collectively, define the future for business growth.
   

  

 Apply for one position or as many as you like. Talent doesn’t always just go in one direction or fit in a single box. We’re happy to see whatever your superpower is and find the best place for it to flourish.
   

  

 Get started now, we look forward to meeting you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Sherpany is the Swiss market leader for meeting management software. Since its foundation in 2011, it has pursued the goal of creating a world in which every meeting counts. More than 300 European companies and 12,000 decision-makers already use Sherpany to make their business meetings more productive and thus increase their company’s success. According to a jury of international investors, Sherpany is one of the best scale-ups in Switzerland with the potential to become a unicorn. Sherpany employs over 150 people at six locations in Europe and remotely in 19 countries around the world.
   

  

**Are you an open-minded personality who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys working in an international team of passionate sales experts? Let’s talk about career opportunities in our Sales team!**
**Your Responsibilities**
* From cold calling to closing contracts: You will convince and win well-known enterprise companies in Sweden for our cloud-based meeting management solution.
* Present our vision to decision-makers across various industries and persuade them of our concept.
* Engage with different departments of our customers to understand their requirements.
* Identify the needs of prospects and create tailored proposals.
* Work closely with the Sales, Product, and Customer Success teams to improve the sales cycle, including optimizing lead generation, pipeline building, and conversion rates.


**What You Bring**
* Solid B2B SaaS sales experience.
* Experience in 360° sales and a passion for owning the entire sales cycle.
* Enjoy networking and relationship building, backed by strong communication skills.
* Self-organized, goal-driven, and persistent in reaching your objectives.
* A creative problem-solver who enjoys finding new ways to tackle challenges.
* C2 level Swedish and very good English skills.
* Don’t meet 100% of the requirements but think you have what it takes? Reach out anyway – we hire for attitude!


**Why Sherpany**
* Be part of an international company where you’ll take on responsibility and your ideas are always welcome.
* We invest in your personal and professional growth by offering financial support for further education, training, and more.
* Your well-being matters – our partner nilo.health supports you in maintaining it.
* Work with the latest technologies and an Apple MacBook provided at the start of your journey with us.
* Last but not least: Our company culture is important to us – we regularly organize team events and foster a values-driven environment.


**Our Recruitment Process**
* Submit your online application
* First interview with Talent Acquisition Specialist (30 min)
* Second interview with Team Lead Sales & Sales Enablement (30 min)
* Role Play Interview (30 min)
* Final Interview: Meet our VP Sales (30 min)
* Offer


 I look forward to your application!
   

  

**Laura Wieckhorst**
 Talent Acquisition Specialist
   

  

 Our company is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce where all individuals are respected and valued. We are an equal opportunity employer and make all employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. We encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds and are dedicated to building teams that reflect the diversity of our communities.

title: Account Executive - Manufacturing industries
description:
**Do you thrive at the intersection of technology and business growth?**
 Are you driven by the challenge of turning innovative solutions into real partnerships that move industries forward?
   

  

 Do you want to be part of a team that helps technology companies connect with the right decision-makers and shape the future of manufacturing?
   

  

 If that sounds like you, keep reading.
   

  

**Your Mission**
 As an
 **Account Executive specializing in Manufacturing Technology Solutions** 
 , you drive revenue by selling our services to technology companies and solution providers whose key customers are manufacturing technology decision-makers, plant directors, and R&D within the intersection of hardware, software, devices, and technology.
   

  

 Account Executive is responsible for the end-to-end sales process and acquiring new clients, building customer relationships, and developing sales strategies to help our clients optimize their sales and marketing operations. This role requires a background in working with trade fairs, exhibitions, or event sales, with a strong understanding of the solutions and services such as OT, IoT, Automation, Robotics and Sustainability Management related solutions.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
* Sell Aurora Live's services to technology companies and solution providers serving manufacturing technology decision-makers, plant directors, and other relevant leaders.
* Ensure a deep understanding of client needs, challenges, and goals to position our offerings effectively.
* Identify and qualify potential leads through various channels (e.g., LinkedIn, industry events, referrals, and cold calling).


**What We’re Looking For**
* Good track record in B2B sales, specifically in trade fairs, exhibitions, or event sales targeting solution providers who serve manufacturing sector in i.e. OT, IoT, Automation investments, sustainability management, AI and Machine Learning related solutions, and / or alike.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
* Results-driven with a proven ability to exceed sales targets.
* Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to work independently and collaboratively.
* Full professional proficiency in English, and Dutch, Swedish or German.


**What We Offer**
* Performance rewarded: You’ll receive an attractive compensation package with base salary, commission, and an additional starter bonus to support you as you ramp up and build your sales pipeline.
* Growth and learning: From day one, you’ll benefit from a four-week onboarding program and continuous coaching through our international AL Academy, ensuring you’re always developing and moving forward in your career.
* Career opportunities across Europe: As we continue to grow, you’ll have the chance to explore international opportunities. With offices in Helsinki, Amsterdam, Antwerp, Copenhagen, Berlin, Stockholm, Kuala Lumpur, and Barcelona, your career can take you anywhere.
* Recharge & Thrive: We care about your well-being and want you to stay energized both inside and outside of work. That’s why you can earn up to 12 extra vacation days each year and enjoy local perks such as gym and massage discounts, along with other wellness benefits. Curious about the details in your location? Ask your recruiter to learn more.
* We win together: Collaboration is our driving force, and every success is shared. That’s why we love bringing people together through company trips, international events, and local office celebrations — whether it’s hitting the slopes in Levi, running the Berlin Marathon together, or celebrating milestones across our offices in Europe.
* Annual company trip: Every summer, all employees from our different offices come together in Finland for an exciting company trip - a mix of team building, knowledge exchange, and celebrations.
* Global Community & Diversity: Diversity is part of our DNA. With colleagues from over 50 nationalities, you’ll join an international community where every culture, perspective, and background fuels innovation and success.


 At
 **Aurora Live** 
 , we’re transforming the way leaders connect, collaborate, and grow.
   

  

 Working with us means being part of an
 **international, fast-paced, and purpose-driven company** 
 , where ambition meets action and every idea can make an impact.
   

  

 Our teams bring together smart, curious, and driven individuals who love what they do — connecting visionary leaders, shaping industries, and celebrating success along the way.
   

  

**Ready to be part of something extraordinary?** 
 Join us and help shape the future of business connections.

title: Global Paid Co-Marketing Lead
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden.
