title: Security Engineer
description:
**WHO WE ARE**
At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.  

Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.  

Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers. If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays. **ABOUT THE TEAM**



As part of fulfilling the objective of becoming the leading global online banking payments provider, we are strengthening our capability in the information and cyber security area. Currently, we are restructuring our internal setup within the security area allowing us to scale and grow our teams. To get us going we are now looking for additional Security Engineers to join the Security and Compliance team focusing on our product security in Europe.


**ABOUT THE ROLE**



As a Security Engineer at Trustly, you will be part of a team of security professionals ensuring security lies in the core of everything we build and operate. We combine our expertise in providing security services to the organization with automating security controls wherever and whenever possible. As our team is undergoing an expansive phase, you will have the opportunity to shape our direction and methodologies. Your contributions will be important in refining our interactions with merchants, allowing you to leave a large impact on our operational security framework.



### **What you'll do**


* Own and continuously improve our vulnerability management program, ensuring full coverage and accurate exposure visibility across all assets
* Build and maintain automation around security tooling to ensure data quality, consistency, and actionable insights
* Perform security assessments across the SDLC: design reviews, threat modeling, code reviews, and dynamic testing, working closely with engineering teams
* Integrate and enforce security controls within CI/CD pipelines (SAST, DAST, secrets detection, dependency scanning), with a strong focus on developer experience
* Conduct internal offensive security activities (penetration testing, red teaming, exploitation) to validate real-world risk and identify control gaps
* Translate vulnerabilities into real business risk by validating exploitability and prioritizing remediation based on impact
* Contribute to incident response and security investigations, including root cause analysis and improvement of detection and response capabilities
* Actively participate in improving our security posture by challenging assumptions, refining detection logic, and improving how we measure exposure
* Collaborate with infrastructure and platform teams (AWS, Kubernetes, IAM) to ensure secure-by-design architectures
* Contribute to threat intelligence efforts by identifying relevant threats and mapping them to our internal stack and exposure
* Support the evolution of our security practices, tooling, and processes as we continue to scale our business and security capabilities
### **Who you are**


* You have hands-on experience in cybersecurity engineering, application security, or infrastructure security
* Strong understanding of modern cloud environments (preferably AWS), including networking, IAM, and containerized workloads
* Experience with vulnerability management and security tooling, with a good understanding of asset exposure and data accuracy
* Familiar with integrating security controls into CI/CD pipelines (SAST, DAST, secrets detection, dependency scanning)
* Comfortable performing technical security assessments (web, APIs, infrastructure), including validation and exploitation of vulnerabilities
* Solid understanding of core security concepts and protocols (DNS, TLS, authentication, CVEs, etc.)
* Able to think in terms of risk and prioritize based on real-world impact rather than theoretical vulnerabilities
* Experience working in regulated environments such as financial services is a strong plus
* Strong collaboration and communication skills, able to work closely with developers and infrastructure teams
* Pragmatic mindset, able to balance security requirements with engineering constraints
* Curious and proactive, not afraid to challenge existing setups and improve them
* Certifications (e.g. OSCP, OSWE or similar) are a plus but not required
**Our Fantastic Benefits** (varies by location)
**20 to 30 days of holiday** to support a healthy work-life balance
**Monthly team outing allowance** to enjoy social events with your colleagues
**Parental leave top-up** additional support for new parents
**Daily breakfast and on-site perks** to make your workday smoother
**Well being support** our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best**PLUS** additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!  

  

**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact**
Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you! **Apply now and submit your CV in English.**
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Shift Leader Front Office Scandic Park, heltid
description:
Ansök nu
* Ansök senast: 17 maj 2026
* Stockholm
* Arbete på plats
**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

\*\*Lugnt beläget invid Humlegården på Östermalm med en kort och mysig promenad från Stureplan ligger Scandic Park!\*\* Hos oss på Scandic Park är den familjär stämning viktig, både för våra gäster men även för oss medarbetare på hotellet. Vi anser att gott samarbete och förstklassig service är receptet på framgång. Några som följt denna trend är några av våra landslag, som vi alltid hoppas väljer Scandic Park som deras förstahandsval. Så vill du arbeta på ett hotell med skön atmosfär och tillsammans med oss ge våra gäster en magisk upplevelse? Då är du den vi söker!


**Nu söker vi en Shift Leader till Scandic Park.**



Oavsett varför gästen kommer till oss är det få saker som är så uppskattade som ett vänligt ansikte som hälsar välkommen. Som Shift Leader agerar du värd tillsammans med övriga teamet på hotellet och skapar en gästupplevelse i världsklass.



Under din tid hos oss kan dessa områden variera i takt med att du och affären utvecklas. Hos oss får du ta ett stort eget ansvar för att ta de beslut som krävs för att göra gästen nöjd och teamen utvecklar och förbättrar arbetssätt och service i takt med att omvärlden förändras. Vi är nämligen övertygade om att det är när du får utvecklas och bidra med all din kompetens och erfarenhet som vi överträffar gästens förväntningar. På köpet får vi kul på jobbet!



Så ta med dig dina erfarenheter, ditt engagemang och ditt sätt att tänka till oss – och bidra till en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt: om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Välkommen till Scandic!


**Vad innebär rollen som Shift Leader Front Office?**



Du som arbetar inom Front Office är ansvarig för att våra gäster får service i världsklass. Du är spindeln i nätet som ser till att gästen alltid är i fokus. Du är den som går igenom ankomstlistan och lägger tid på detaljerna. Du löser det mesta och är en stjärna på att vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst. I ansvarsområdet ingår även administrativt arbete, säkerhetsarbete och arbete med försäljning. Arbetet i Front Office innebär att checka in och ut hotellets gäster, hälsa välkommen och ge gästen den information den behöver om sin vistelse. Du hanterar bokningar i systemet Opera Cloud och hanterar administrativa uppgifter runt gäster och säkerhet.



I rollen som Shift Leader har du, förutom att vara en del av driften, den övergripande överblicken över gästflödet och ser tillsammans med teamet till att prioritera arbetsuppgifter så att verksamheten flyter så att gästerna blir nöjda. Du leder och fördelar arbetet och hanterar bemanningen under ditt arbetspass. Vid behov får du utbilda nya medarbetare på hotellet och du avlastar också Front Office Manager med vissa administrativa arbetsuppgifter.



Hotellet har öppet dygnet runt och det är därför viktigt att du trivs med att arbeta i skift (förmiddagar, eftermiddagar och helger).


**Din kompetens**



För den här rollen krävs att du har både förmåga och vilja att arbeta med ett driftsnära ledarskap. Du är trygg i ditt ledarskap och har både integritet och säljdriv. För att passa i rollen tror vi också att du har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och är kapabel att hantera att det händer många olika saker samtidigt. Det är mycket viktigt att du kan förmedla ett gott värdskap till hotellets gäster. Du är en lyhörd och prestigelös lagspelare som tar ett stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet.



Du har också vana och kunskap i att arbeta med dator som arbetsredskap.



Eftersom arbetet till stor del består av att kommunicera med gäster är goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska en förutsättning. Talar du ytterligare ett språk är det meriterande.


**Information om tjänsten:**



Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid.


Vi tillämpar provanställning på 6 månader.


Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vår hemsida. Alla ansökningar kommer att behandlas löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, varför vi ber dig att ansöka så snart som möjligt. I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av ett enklare test om service vid urvalet.



Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss på Scandic!


Ps. på vår hemsida kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, vad tjänsten innebär och om våra förmåner!
company_description: Nordiskt hotellföretag i världsklass som skapar enastående upplevelser för de många människorna. 16 000 medarbetar, 280 hotell i 6 länder.

title: Product Partnership Engineer
description:
**TL;DR:** We’re hiring a Product Partnership Engineer to build and scale Lovable’s most strategic product partnerships. You’ll work directly with enterprise partners to design and ship high-impact integrations, reading their stack, prototyping solutions yourself, and shaping both our roadmap and theirs. This role sits at the intersection of engineering, product, and enterprise relationships, and will directly accelerate Lovable’s ecosystem growth and enterprise adoption.

**Why Lovable?**


Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.


We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.

**What we’re looking for**

* 5+ years in Technical Business Development, Forward Deployed Engineering, Solutions Engineering, or as a technical founder/CTO - in high-velocity environments.
* Hands-on experience with integrations; you've read the docs, written the scripts, and ship something to production, even if you're not a full-time engineer.
* Track record of structuring and executing product-centric partnerships that involve real technical depth.
* Genuinely technical; comfortable reading technical documentation, understanding cloud architectures, and forming independent views on integration feasibility.
* Strong enterprise and commercial instincts: comfortable navigating senior stakeholders in negotiating, building relationships and managing complex deals while maintaining technical credibility.
* High agency and bias for action; you prototype first and refine later than waiting for full specs.

**What you’ll do**

* Own and deepen relationships with Lovable’s most strategic product and enterprise partners — driving urgency, alignment, and executive-level momentum.
* Independently assess partner architectures, APIs, and other integration points to identify high-impact integration opportunities, validate feasibility, and proactively surface risks or blockers.
* Prototype and spike early integrations yourself to shape requirements, accelerate decision-making, and reduce engineering lift.
* Scope and, where appropriate, ship production-ready integrations that deliver measurable value to Lovable users and our partners.
* Develop compelling business cases for integrations that clearly demonstrate long-term value creation for partners, Lovable, and end customers with a strong focus on measurable impact.
* Feed technical and market insights back into Lovable’s product organization, while collaborating cross-functionally (Engineering, Product, Marketing, Growth) and leading workshops to drive alignment and successful go-to-market execution.

**About your application**


Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.


We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
description:
**TL;DR** – We’re looking for an exceptional Forward Deployed Engineer to help build the future of AI-powered software creation. You will be the founding member of our FDE function, working directly with our most ambitious customers to translate impossible ideas into real products. This is a unique opportunity to design a new discipline from scratch and solve problems with AI that no one has solved before.

**Why Lovable?**
================


Lovable lets anyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products — fast. We are at the forefront of a fundamental shift in how software is created: from code-first to intelligence-first.


Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate workflows, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.


We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We operate with high ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We care deeply, move fast, and are here to build something that outlives us.

**What makes this role special?**
---------------------------------


This isn’t a traditional software engineering role.


You will:

* Be the first Forward Deployed Engineer at Lovable
* Create a new function at the intersection of engineering, product, customer success, and research
* Partner with customers building *never-seen-before AI systems*
* Build product features based on real-world behaviors and emerging patterns
* Influence our core product direction and technical roadmap


If you want to invent new categories, not just improve existing ones - this is that role.

**What we’re looking for**
--------------------------

* 5+ years of experience building and shipping full-stack products
* Proficiency in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and robust backend development
* Strong architectural thinking and familiarity with distributed systems
* Ability to rapidly prototype, experiment, and learn from real usage
* Exceptional product intuition and ability to work directly with users
* Comfort operating in high-ambiguity, high-agency environments


Bonus if you’ve:

* Worked on agentic AI systems or built with LLMs before
* Led zero-to-one product development
* Worked in a founding or early startup environment

**What you’ll do**
------------------


In one sentence: Deploy intelligence into the real world.

* Work directly with customers to understand their workflows, needs, and problems
* Design and implement solutions for our customers that integrate with Lovable
* Translate insights from real usage into foundational platform improvements
* Own projects end-to-end — from idea architecture shipping iteration
* Shape how Forward Deployed Engineering works at Lovable (rituals, playbooks, org design)
* Contribute to core product strategy, technical decisions, and cultural foundations

**Our Tech Stack**
------------------


We choose tools that empower both humans and AI:

* **Frontend:** React, Typescript
* **Backend:** Golang & Rust
* **Cloud:** Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, multiple LLM providers
* **Tooling:** Github Actions, OTEL, Grafana, Terraform, and more
* Always evolving with what works best.

**How we hire**
---------------

* Fill out a short form and hop on a brief intro call with our recruiting team.
* Complete a quick live coding exercise.
* Show us how you approach problems during several technical interviews.
* Show us something you’ve built that makes you proud.

**About your application**
--------------------------

* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: Dir, Product Operations
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 175,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.


Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.


At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!


**Description**  

We are looking for a strategic and hands-on Director, Product Operations, to build and lead the Product Operations function at the heart of our product organization. Your mission is to systematize our product development lifecycle and enable our product teams to better serve our customers and markets with innovative and valuable products, delivered at speed.


You will be a key driver in our transformation into a product-centric organization, establishing the processes, systems, and best practices needed to scale effectively, in collaboration with key stakeholders.


This is a high-impact role to level up our operational maturity, empower our people and teams, and enable growth and speed. You’ll have an inspiring and challenging mission and contribute to levelling up our capabilities.


**Responsibilities:**  

* Build, lead, and nurture a high-performing Product Operations team, and establish and improve core functions including e.g. Processes, Pricing, Tooling, Product Analytics, and Project Management.
* Improve our engine by strengthening our product development and operations processes to ensure they are efficient, effective, and scalable.
* Drive transformation to accelerate our adoption of a modern product culture and an AI-native mindset in an empowered, outcome-driven setting, in close collaboration with product leadership and other stakeholders.
* Enable improved business agility, customer focus, and how to accelerate sustainable and continuous growth. This could e.g. be in the shape of processes, frameworks, and decision-support tools.
* Define and own our tooling stack, core processes, and workflows, incl. budget. Select the right tools and automation for the job, drive adoption, and provide a smooth and effective experience for our teams.
* Provide process and execution frameworks for product discovery, planning, and delivery that span multiple teams and functions. This could e.g. be in the shape of project and planning management, or GTM readiness motions, in collaboration with stakeholders.
This role is based at SINCH HQ in Stockholm, Sweden and reports to the Chief of Staff for Product.


**Requirements:**  

* You have 10+ years of relevant experience in Product Operations and/or digital Product Development from a global technology organization.
* Experience leading and building high performing teams, ideally in a hybrid and multi-cultural environment. You are a collaborative and humble leader who leads through inclusion, engagement, and transparency. You have the courage to challenge the status quo while actively listening and learning from others.
* Experience driving change and transformation in a large-scale, global technology organization, ideally one that has undergone a transformation towards a product-led operating model, while rapidly growing. You have a strong instinct for what is required to succeed in a fast-growing and competitive marketplace, and you embrace and leverage modern technologies and methodologies to accelerate outcomes.
* Proven understanding of modern product development methodologies and expertise in designing and implementing scalable operational systems and processes that are fit-for-purpose.
* You are pragmatic and resilient with a positive, can-do attitude, a growth mindset, and a genuine passion for collaborating with others.
* Fluency in English, both spoken and written.
Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English.


At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. We are not supporting relocation at this time.


Applicants must:
  

* Hold Swedish or EU/EEA citizenship.
* Have a valid Swedish work permit.
**Our hiring process**  

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.


We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Nattreceptionist till hotell i Stockholm (sommarvikarie)
description:
Vi söker en ansvarstagande och serviceinriktad nattreceptionist till hotellverksamhet under sommaren mellan perioden juni-augusti. Tjänsten passar dig som trivs med nattarbete och som har förmåga att arbeta självständigt med stort ansvar.
  
  

Som nattreceptionist är du hotellets främsta kontaktperson under nattens timmar och ansvarar för att gästerna får ett professionellt bemötande samt en trygg och välfungerande vistelse.
  
  

**Arbetsuppgifter:**  

In- och utcheckning av gäster
  
Hantering av betalningar och kassaredovisning
  
Bokningshantering
  
Besvara telefon och e-post
  
Utföra administrativa arbetsuppgifter
  
Säkerställa att brand- och säkerhetsrutiner följs
  
Hantera gästärenden och oförutsedda situationer under natten
  
Arbetet sker nattetid samt helger.
  
  

Vem är du
  
  

Vi söker dig som är trygg i dig själv och trivs med att arbeta natt. Du är serviceinriktad, lösningsorienterad och har förmågan att behålla lugnet även i pressade situationer.
  
Du har förmågan att ge bra service
  
Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och fatta snabba beslut
  
Du är driven, lyhörd och flexibel
  
Lösningsorienterad och tar eget ansvar
  
Trygg med att arbeta ensam
  
Positiv till nattarbete
  
Bekväm med datorer och digitala system
  
  

Kvalifikationer
  
  

**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:**  

Erfarenhet från hotellbranschen, gärna som receptionist eller liknande roll
  
Alternativt erfarenhet från andra serviceyrken
  
Utbildning inom hotell och turism är meriterande
  
God datorvana och erfarenhet av digitala system
  
Meriterande kunskaper i bokningssystem såsom Mews, Opera Cloud, Hotsoft, HMS eller liknande
  
God kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift (ytterligare språk är meriterande
  
Du är ostraffad
  
  

Låter detta som rätt roll för dig?
  
  

Om du trivs i en nattlig miljö och har ett genuint intresse för service och ansvar är du varmt välkommen att skicka in din ansökan.
  
Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
  
Urval sker löpande.
  
  

Top Solution är ett entreprenadföretag inom hotell och nattreception.

title: Senior Cyber Security Leader
description:
**About us**



Working in the KPMG Cyber Security team, you will be part of a global organization working within various industries and areas together with competent and inspiring colleagues. As a member of the Cyber Security team, you will support our clients in their transformation journeys by identifying and remediating their cyber related challenges. We work shoulder-to-shoulder with executive management, and we always seek digital, innovative, and sustainable solutions to our clients’ challenges.



You will be part of our Cyber Security team which consists of a tight knit group of specialists collaborating and sharing experiences daily. At KPMG, you will have a senior role in our local team but also be a part of the global team of experts who provides advisory services within Cyber security, Strategy and Governance, ISMS design and implementation, IAM, Forensic investigations, Operational Resilience, IT-due diligence and more.



We will support your journey in a fast-paced environment filled with brilliant colleagues. KPMG is consistently recognized as a leader within the cyber security field by external firms, this is something we are very proud of and keen to maintain. The Cyber team of approximately 50 colleagues is part of KPMGs Advisory practice, a social and familiar group of about 130 colleagues with broad competence and expertise within advisory services across multiple sectors.


  
**Skills & Requirements**
-------------------------

**Your role**


* Develop strong **business relationships** and demonstrate operational leadership to deliver client-centric solutions with high quality.
* Continuously contribute to developing the team’s awareness regarding cyber insights, market trends, innovative products and services.
* Be a mentor and coach for the junior team members to support their development journey through constructive feedback and training.
* Effectively manage the commercial and contractual aspects of an engagement to achieve expected levels of client satisfaction and quality.
* Identify new opportunities and support in the continuous development of our service portfolio.


**Skills & Requirements**


**We are looking for** a passionate, forward-thinking and business minded security professional with at least 8 years of experience within Cyber Security. You should be based in Stockholm or Gothenburg. Key competence areas could include but not be limited to areas below


* Cyber Security Strategy, Risk and Governance
* Information Security Management System design and implementation
* Identity and Access Management as well as Privileged Access Management
* Cloud Security
* Data Privacy
* Operational Resilience
* IT-due diligence



We will highly appreciate if you:


* Are a team player with a genuine interest in helping colleagues and customers alike to grow and develop.
* Have a proven track records of sales and leading pursuit teams.
* Have a proven track record of being a successful leader.
* Have previous consulting experience.
* Are a high performer with strong drive and high ambition.
* Are fluent in Swedish & English.
* Hold relevant certifications such as CISM, CISSP, CISA, CRISC, CEH, OSCP, CCSP, ISO 27001 etc.
* Are used to working in an international context with cross border engagements.


**Want to make a difference with us?**



Apply by submitting your CV as soon as possible. Don’t wait with your application as we review applications and are hiring on a rolling basis. If you have any questions about the position, please don’t hesitate to contact Head of Cyber Security Visar Lapashtica, visar.lapashtica@kpmg.se


**We look forward to your application and** for new colleagues to join our team!


**About the company**
---------------------

At KPMG, we know that if we use and act on our insights together with the right people, we find opportunities everywhere. With 2000 employees in Sweden, Latvia and Lithuania, and a network of more than 265 000 experts in 143 countries across the globe, we are one of the world’s leading professional services firms.



We offer expertise within advisory, audit and tax and legal services to many of our region’s leading companies. We may support their organizational change, provide advice regarding risk and compliance, ESG reporting or development journeys, cyber threats, technology transformation, or finance strategy optimization. We also have experts within analysis, M&A and transactions, audit, tax and legal.

  

  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
company_description: At KPMG, you'll be able to tap into your skills, expertise and passion to help organizations find sustainable solutions to the world's most pressing issues.

title: Content Creator
description:
### **Content Creator – Hotel C Stockholm**


Är du en kreativ själ med erfarenhet av foto, film och design – och vill arbeta brett med content i en inspirerande miljö? Nu söker vi en Content Creator till Hotel C Stockholm och ICEBAR Stockholm.


I denna roll blir du en nyckelperson i vår marknadsföring, med fokus på produktion av innehåll. Vi söker dig som är idérik, självgående och har ett starkt öga för form, färg och storytelling – och som vill vara med och skapa innehåll som engagerar, inspirerar och stärker vårt varumärke.

### **Om oss**


Hotel C Stockholm är det folkliga, festliga och familjära hotellet mitt i smeten. Hos oss är ingenting krångligt – vår kommunikation ska vara lika enkel att förstå och lätt att älska som hotellet självt.


Med 367 hotellrum, en nyrenoverad konferensvåning, restaurang Swede Hollow och ett unikt samarbete med ICEHOTEL i Jukkasjärvi, genom vilket vi driver ICEBAR Stockholm, finns det gott om content att skapa för dig som antar utmaningen. Tycker du det verkar skoj att vara med och sprida vår varma, personliga och lekfulla röst – och göra Hotel C ännu mer älskat? Fortsätt läs!

### **Om rollen**


Det här är en operativ och kreativ roll med stort fokus på contentproduktion. Du ansvarar för att skapa material till våra kanaler – från idé till färdig leverans. Du kommer att arbeta nära både marknadschef, avdelningschefer och centrala marknadsfunktioner inom Strawberry. Det innebär en varierad vardag där du rör dig mellan olika delar av verksamheten och snabbt får en bred förståelse för både varumärke och drift.


På C har vi en varm och snäll kultur där vi tror på frihet under ansvar, korta beslutsvägar och en miljö där idéer snabbt kan bli verklighet.

 **Du lyckas i rollen när du:**

* Skapar engagerande innehåll i form av foto, video, design och text som stärker varumärket och konvertering
* Driver produktion från idé till leverans – för sociala medier, nyhetsbrev, kampanjer, e-post samt digitalt och tryckt material
* Säkerställer en konsekvent tonalitet och visuell identitet
* Anpassar innehåll efter målgrupp
* Tar initiativ, höjer den kreativa nivån, är flexibel och samarbetar smidigt med andra


Det finns goda möjligheter att växa i rollen över tid. Ambitionen är att detta ska vara en långsiktig tjänst där du successivt kan ta ett större ansvar och utvecklas tillsammans med oss.

 **Vi söker dig som:**

* Har erfarenhet av fotografering, redigering samt enklare rörligt material/video
* Är trygg i verktyg som Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Premiere Pro, LightRoom, InDesign eller liknande)
* Har ett starkt visuellt öga och känsla för storytelling
* Är självgående, flexibel, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
* Trivs i en kreativ och snabbfotad miljö
* Är flytande i svenska och engelska

### **Vad vi erbjuder**


Som heltidsanställd hos Hotel C Stockholm blir du en del av Strawberry och Nordic Hotels & Resorts med tillgång till en rad fina förmåner.

* En kreativ och varm arbetsmiljö där dina idéer får ta plats
* En varierad roll med högt tempo där ingen dag är den andra lik
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Fyra fria hotellnätter per år inom Strawberry
* Personalpriser på hotell och restauranger inom Strawberry

### **Praktisk information**

* Tillsvidareanställning (heltid) med 6 månaders provanställning
* Tjänsten är helt på plats på Hotel C Stockholm (vid Stockholm Centralstation)
* Du rapporterar till marknadschef
* Tillträde enligt överenskommelse

### **Ansökan**


Låter det här som något för dig? Skicka in ditt CV, en kort presentation (personligt brev) och gärna också portfolio. Vid frågor, kontakta ida.sundstedt@hotelcstockholm.se.


Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! ✨
company_description: We are Strawberry. With over 225 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. Join a world of experiences!

title: Senior Technical Product Manager, Engine Authoring Features
description:
**The opportunity**  

We are seeking a Senior Technical Product Manager with extensive prior experience in a hands-on game development role to join our Engine Product team. You will play a pivotal role in defining product requirements with technical input on customer need, value, measurability, as well as the ability to use and demonstrate product in a hands-on fashion.


In this high-impact role, you will define and execute the roadmap of the authoring features in the Unity Engine, shaping how creators use our tools to build the games and experiences of the future. You will define product strategy with a technical point of view grounded in a direct understanding of customer requirements while ensuring the product vision aligns with business priorities, user needs, and technical feasibility.

**What you'll be doing**

* Define and own a product vision, strategy, and roadmap that is informed by technical product expertise, customer feedback from Unity Studio Productions and Customer Success organizations, Production Verification, market research, user feedback, and competitive analysis
* Cultivate strong relationships with Engineering counterparts to lead product areas hand-in-hand. You will drive feature delivery across disparate teams, clearing roadblocks and aligning priorities.
* Partner with stakeholders (e.g. Engineering, Quality, Design, Documentation, Program Management) to identify business goals, user needs, and technical requirements
* Prioritize product features and improvements based on a mix of data and user feedback from key external partners and our wider development community.
* Collaborate with other product team members to ensure solid cross-product integration and minimization of redundant feature code
* Facilitate customer feedback loops to refine and improve the product by iteratively adding customer value
* Hands-on tests and demos to understand requirements and proposed solutions, verify deliveries, and showcase delivered features to customers, users, and partners

**What we're looking for**

* Experience shipping games as a developer, ideally in Unity, Unreal, or proprietary game engines
* Deep technical expertise and the ability to evaluate complex technology stacks that cross multiple systems and platforms (i.e. game engines, cloud services, and external APIs).
* Exceptional communication skills, with a proven track record of effectively simplifying and articulating complex technical concepts to a wide range of audiences, from engineers to senior executives.
* Proven ability to lead and influence cross-functional teams without direct authority, fostering a collaborative and productive environment.
* Strong skills in roadmap planning, feature prioritization, and stakeholder management
* Cross-functional collaboration capabilities to bring teams together as we drive towards common goals and priorities

**You might also have**

* Technical understanding of game engine architecture, feature development, and the developer experience
* Expertise in high performance programming with languages such as C# or C++
* Storytelling and visual presentation abilities to distill sophisticated topics into clear and concise communications
* Willingness to travel (up to 25% at peak times)

**Additional information**

* Relocation support is not available for this position
* Work visa/immigration sponsorship is not available for this position

**Benefits**  

At Unity, we want our team members to thrive. We offer a wide range of benefits designed to support well-being and work-life balance.


Please note: Benefits eligibility, specific offerings, and coverage vary based on the country and employment status.


While specific benefits vary, here are some of the ways we strive to take care of our eligible team members globally: Comprehensive health, life, and disability insurance | Commute subsidy | Employee stock ownership | Competitive retirement/pension plans | Generous vacation and personal days | Support for new parents through leave and family-care programs | Office food snacks | Mental Health and Wellbeing programs and support | Employee Resource Groups | Global Employee Assistance Program | Training and development programs | Volunteering and donation matching program

**Life at Unity**  

Unity [NYSE: U] is the world's leading game engine, powering play for more than 3 billion consumers each month. The top mobile games in the world, the most played PC indie titles, the most innovative console games, and virtually all of the top XR and Web Games are developed, deployed, and grown in Unity. Unity also enables teams across industries like automotive, manufacturing, and healthcare to design, simulate, and collaborate in 3D — closing the gap between ideas and reality. For more information, please visit www.unity.com.

*Unity is a proud equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive, innovative environment and celebrate our employees across age, race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion, disability, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or any other protected status in accordance with applicable law. Our differences are strengths that enable us to support the growing and evolving needs of our customers, partners, and collaborators. If you have a disability that means there are preparations or accommodations we can make to help ensure you have a comfortable and positive interview experience, please fill out* *this form* *to let us know.*

*This position requires the incumbent to have a sufficient knowledge of English to have professional verbal and written exchanges in this language since the performance of the duties related to this position requires frequent and regular communication with colleagues and partners located worldwide and whose common language is English.*

*Headhunters and recruitment agencies may not submit resumes/CVs through this website or directly to managers. Unity does not accept unsolicited headhunter and agency resumes. Unity will not pay fees to any third-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with Unity.*

*Your privacy is important to us. Please take a moment to review our* *Prospect Privacy Policy* *and* *Applicant Privacy Policy**. Should you have any concerns about your privacy, please contact us at DPO@unity.com.*

title: SAP Platform Architect
description:
April 17, 2026
Remote
Sweden
Posted 10 hours ago
We are hiring **SAP Platform Architect**for the position based in **Stockholm, Sweden (Remote).**


**Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, or related field, or equivalent professional experience.


**Job Summary:**



We are looking for an **SAP Platform Architect** with extensive experience in **SAP BW/4HANA migration** to join our client’s team for a long-term project. The ideal candidate will have proven expertise in leading and delivering full-scale SAP BW/4HANA migrations and possess a deep technical understanding of SAP technologies, migration strategies, and cloud solutions.


**Required Experience/Competences:**


* **7+ years** of Proven hands-on experience in leading at least one full **BW on-premise to BW/4HANA** migration (actual delivery, not just advisory)**.**
* Strong knowledge and practical experience with **SAP** **BW/4HANA migration tools** (Shell Conversion, Remote Conversion, In-Place Migration).
* Experience working directly with **SAP or certified SAP partners** in large-scale migration projects**.**
* Strong understanding of the **RISE with SAP** solution, differentiating between RISE, SAP BTP, and managed cloud.
* Good understanding of **BW/4HANA Cockpit and the Migration Workbench.**
* Understanding of **network topology, latency considerations, and data residency in cloud BW deployments** .
* Deep knowledge of BW/4HANA data modelling: **aDSO, CompositeProvider, Open ODS Views and how they replace classic BW object**s
* Ability to assess which legacy objects (InfoCubes, MultiProviders, DSOs) can be migrated vs need to be rebuilt.


**Soft Skills:**


* Strong communication and collaboration skills.
* Ability to work in a cross-functional, multicultural environment.
### **Job Features**

title: Bildredaktör till Högkvarteret
description:
Vill du vara med och påverka Sveriges försvarsförmåga, och dessutom befinna dig mitt i händelsernas centrum? Är du intresserad av stabsarbete på strategisk nivå och har erfarenhet av lednings- och samordningsverksamhet? Försvarsstabens kommunikationsavdelning vid Försvarsmaktens högkvarter söker en bildredaktör med placering vid Planering- och strategisektionen. Välkommen med din ansökan!


**Om enheten**  

Kommunikationsavdelningen är en av flera fristående avdelningar som gemensamt bildar försvarsstaben. Tillsammans är de rådgivande till överbefälhavaren i frågor om exempelvis verksamhetsledning, militärstrategi och hur myndigheten ska utvecklas utifrån det uppdrag som har bestämts av riksdag och regering. Kommunikationsavdelningen har dessutom ett övergripande ansvar för att samordna kommunikationen i myndigheten


**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**  

Som bildredaktör har du ett övergripande ansvar för hur Försvarsmakten gestaltas i bild, video och hur myndigheten tekniskt och administrativt hanterar bilder och video. Försvarsmakten är i ett inledande skede att ta fram en ny myndighetsgemensam databas (DAM) för stillbilder och video. Du kommer att ha en framträdande roll i att färdigställa det arbetet och kommer att ha huvudansvar för den nya bilddatabasen när lösningen är införd. I arbetsuppgifterna ligger också att:


* Säkerställa att Försvarsmaktens bildmanér efterföljs och utvecklas samt att bilder och video uppfyller administrativa och tekniska krav.
* Utveckla hur Försvarsmakten framställer sig själv visuellt i stillbild och film i syfte att nå kommunikativa mål utifrån bildens betydelse för mottagarupplevelsen.
* Utveckla och ta fram riktlinjer och styrande dokument inom områdena bild och rörligt.
* Stödja övriga medarbetare i frågor som rör bild och video samt förmåga att pedagogiskt kommunicera och utbilda övriga intressenter inom området.
* Hantera upphovsrättsfrågor.
* Hantera kravställning kopplat till förvaltning av systemet för Digital asset Management
  


**KRAV**  

**Kvalifikationer**


* Akademisk utbildning inom media, kommunikation eller journalistik alternativt annan utbildning i kombination med erfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig
* Flerårig aktuell och relevant erfarenhet av att ha arbetat som bildredaktör
* Aktuell och relevant erfarenhet av Digital Asset Management (DAM) och att hantera metadata för digitala filformat
* Goda kunskaper i programvarorna i Adobe Creative Cloud, framför allt Adobe Photoshop och Premiere Pro
* Kunskaper om arkivlagstiftning
* God förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* God datorvana och goda kunskaper i Microsoft Office-paketet


**Personliga egenskaper**  

För att både trivas och passa i rollen som bildredaktör ser vi att du är positiv, strukturerad, kvalitetsmedveten och med en välutvecklad förmåga att ta eget ansvar och initiativ. Du har god planeringsförmåga och har erfarenhet av att starta, driva och slutföra uppdrag. Du har lätt för att ta till dig ny kunskap.


Du har ett stort intresse för visuell gestaltning och dess betydelse för kommunikation. Du är också prestigelös och en utpräglad lagspelare som uppskattar arbete såväl självständigt som i grupp. Sist men inte minst så trivs du med att arbeta i en miljö som präglas av både högt tempo och komplexa ärenden. Du delar Försvarsmaktens värdegrund och uppförandekod som beskriver de värden, förmågor samt de uppträdande vi anser vara avgörande för att vi ska lösa vårt uppdrag med framgång.


Stor vikt kommer läggas vid personliga egenskaper.


**MERITERANDE**


* Erfarenhet av att hantera analoga format och kunskaper om arkivering av stillbild och film
* Erfarenhet inom området AI-verktyg för bild och video


*För att myndighetens uppdrag ska vara framgångsrikt förutsätts att alla medarbetare uppträder enligt den värdegrund som finns. Försvarsmaktens värdegrund slår vakt om alla människors lika värde, rättvisa och jämlikhet och främjar demokrati och mänskliga rättigheter (läs mer på* *www.forsvarsmakten.se**).*  



**Övrigt**  

Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning. Försvarsmakten tillämpar sex månaders provanställning för dig som inte är anställd i myndigheten.
  

Sysselsättningsgrad: heltid  

Arbetsort: Stockholm
  

Civilbefattning
  

Tester förekommer i rekryteringsprocessen


**Upplysningar om befattningen**  

Kontakta rekryterande chef Anna Swahn


**Information om rekryteringsprocessen**  

Kontakta HR-Specialist Elin Dahlqvist


**Fackliga företrädare**  

SACO: Stefan Ungerth  

SEKO: Åsa Karlsson/Lise-Lotte Larsson  

Försvarsförbundet, OFRS: Kjell Tetzlaff  

OFRO: Roger Ericsson


Samtliga nås via växeln på 08-788 75 00.


**Ansökan**
  

**Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-05-08. Din ansökan ska innehålla CV och ansökningsbrev där du motiverar varför du är lämpad för denna befattning samt svar på angivna urvalsfrågor.**

title: (Senior) Sales Executive Nordics - Sherpany
description:
Datasite and its associated businesses are the global center for facilitating economic value creation for companies across the globe. From data rooms to AI deal sourcing


and more. Here you’ll find the finest technological pioneers: Datasite, Blueflame AI, Grata, and Sherpany. They all, collectively, define the future for business growth.

  

Apply for one position or as many as you like. Talent doesn’t always just go in one direction or fit in a single box. We’re happy to see whatever your superpower is and find the best place for it to flourish.

  

Get started now, we look forward to meeting you.

**Job Description:**


Sherpany is the Swiss market leader for meeting management software. Since its foundation in 2011, it has pursued the goal of creating a world in which every meeting counts. More than 300 European companies and 12,000 decision-makers already use Sherpany to make their business meetings more productive and thus increase their company’s success. According to a jury of international investors, Sherpany is one of the best scale-ups in Switzerland with the potential to become a unicorn. Sherpany employs over 150 people at six locations in Europe and remotely in 19 countries around the world.

**Are you an open-minded personality who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys working in an international team of passionate sales experts? Let’s talk about career opportunities in our Sales team!**

**Your Responsibilities**
-------------------------

* From cold calling to closing contracts: You will convince and win well-known enterprise companies in Sweden for our cloud-based meeting management solution.
* Present our vision to decision-makers across various industries and persuade them of our concept.
* Engage with different departments of our customers to understand their requirements.
* Identify the needs of prospects and create tailored proposals.
* Work closely with the Sales, Product, and Customer Success teams to improve the sales cycle, including optimizing lead generation, pipeline building, and conversion rates.

**What You Bring**
------------------

* Solid B2B SaaS sales experience.
* Experience in 360° sales and a passion for owning the entire sales cycle.
* Enjoy networking and relationship building, backed by strong communication skills.
* Self-organized, goal-driven, and persistent in reaching your objectives.
* A creative problem-solver who enjoys finding new ways to tackle challenges.
* C2 level Swedish and very good English skills.
* Don’t meet 100% of the requirements but think you have what it takes? Reach out anyway – we hire for attitude!

**Why Sherpany**
----------------

* Be part of an international company where you’ll take on responsibility and your ideas are always welcome.
* We invest in your personal and professional growth by offering financial support for further education, training, and more.
* Your well-being matters – our partner nilo.health supports you in maintaining it.
* Work with the latest technologies and an Apple MacBook provided at the start of your journey with us.
* Last but not least: Our company culture is important to us – we regularly organize team events and foster a values-driven environment.

**Our Recruitment Process**
---------------------------

* Submit your online application
* First interview with Talent Acquisition Specialist (30 min)
* Second interview with Team Lead Sales & Sales Enablement (30 min)
* Role Play Interview (30 min)
* Final Interview: Meet our VP Sales (30 min)
* Offer

I look forward to your application!

**Laura Wieckhorst**  

Talent Acquisition Specialist


#LI-Sherpany


Our company is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce where all individuals are respected and valued. We are an equal opportunity employer and make all employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. We encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds and are dedicated to building teams that reflect the diversity of our communities.

title: Technical Program Manager (Sweden)
description:
Led by an experienced management team and supported by a strong investor group, including large and experienced institutions and strategic partners, EdgeConneX offers a dynamic, fast-paced work environment where we are bringing flexibility, proximity, power, and connectivity to some of the world's key businesses. With major offices in Herndon, Denver, and Amsterdam, we have a global footprint and a unified team of employees committed to providing a premier customer experience and delivering the full spectrum of data center solutions, from core to edge, like no other data center provider can do.



Focused on driving innovation and helping our customers define and deliver their own unique vision for the Edge, at any scale, in any market worldwide, for any requirement, we are building tomorrow's data center infrastructure, today for some of the world's most demanding Network, Content, and Cloud customers.



The Technical Program Manager is responsible for the end-to-end delivery of hyperscale, colocation, and enterprise data center projects, from design review through construction, commissioning, and operational handover. The role ensures projects are delivered on time, within budget, and in compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory standards.



This position requires close coordination with multi-disciplinary teams including mechanical, electrical, plumbing (MEP), civil, IT infrastructure, security, and operations. The ideal candidate brings strong mechanical and electrical expertise, hands-on experience with Tier III+ and hyperscale data centers, and proven leadership in complex project environments.



**Key Responsibilities**


**Project Delivery & Governance**


* Lead the full project lifecycle including planning, design, procurement, construction, commissioning, energization, and handover.
* Develop and manage master schedules, budgets, and resource plans.
* Establish project governance, reporting cadence, executive dashboards, and portfolio-level reporting aligned with corporate PMO standards.
* Identify and manage project risks, maintain risk registers, and escalate critical issues.
* Ensure contractor compliance with contractual milestones, performance guarantees, and LD provisions.
* Support procurement strategy and evaluation of EPC / D&B / CM delivery models, including tender evaluations and contract award recommendations.
* Monitor CAPEX budgets, cost forecasts, funding requests, variance reporting, and progress payment certifications.
* Track procurement schedules and mitigate supply chain risks.


**Engineering & Technical Oversight**


* Review, approve, and coordinate technical designs across electrical, mechanical, HVAC, fire protection, security, and IT infrastructure.
* Validate system redundancy (N+1, N+2, 2N, 2N+1), operational reliability, and maintainability requirements.
* Ensure compliance with local regulations, utility requirements, and international standards (Uptime Tier III/IV, NFPA, IEC, TIA, ISO).
* Coordinate with utility providers for grid interconnection, energization, and regulatory approvals.
* Oversee HV/MV infrastructure delivery, protection coordination, energization strategy, and power system studies (short circuit, load flow, arc flash).
* Manage vendor, contractor, and consultant performance to ensure adherence to technical specifications and project objectives.


**Leadership & Stakeholder Management**


* Lead multi-disciplinary internal teams, contractors, consultants, and suppliers.
* Act as the primary interface with clients, utility authorities, and internal stakeholders.
* Ensure clear communication, alignment, and coordination across all parties.
* Mentor junior engineers and project staff, promoting knowledge transfer and operational excellence.
* Support the Director of Engineering in strategic planning and executive-level reporting.


**Compliance, Quality & Safety**


* Enforce engineering standards, corporate governance, and safety regulations.
* Review quality reports to validate installation quality and workmanship.
* Support environmental, health, and safety (EHS) initiatives and ensure statutory and environmental compliance throughout the project lifecycle.


**Operations & Handover**


* Ensure a smooth transition to operations, including as-built documentation, SOPs, MOPs, EOPs, and asset registers.
* Ensure operational readiness, uptime SLA compliance, and post-handover stabilization.
* Support training of O&M teams.
* Validate performance metrics including PUE, WUE, and system reliability KPIs.


**Qualifications**


**Education & Certifications**


* Bachelor's degree in Electrical, Mechanical, or Building Services Engineering.
* Master's degree in Business Administration, engineering leadership, or similar preferred.
* Preferred certifications: PMP, CDCP, ATD (Accredited Tier Designer).


**Experience**


* Minimum 10 years' experience in data center construction, commissioning, or hyperscale infrastructure projects.
* Proven delivery of large-scale Tier III+ or hyperscale data centers (50 MW+).
* Experience with HV grid intake (100–400 kV) and campus-scale developments preferred.
* Strong working knowledge of critical data center systems including HVAC, electrical distribution, UPS, generators, fire suppression systems, and BMS/SCADA.
* Experience managing EPC / D&B contractors and complex stakeholder environments.


**Skills & Competencies**


* Strong technical knowledge across electrical, mechanical, plumbing, HVAC, IT infrastructure, and security systems.
* Proficiency with project management tools such as Primavera P6 or MS Project.
* Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and decision-making skills in high-pressure environments.
* Fluent in English and Swedish
* Willingness to travel in Sweden


EdgeConneX believes inclusion – of thought, backgrounds and experiences – affects all that we do, from our employees to the solutions we deliver. Our goal is to create an environment where embracing differences helps deepen the lives and work experience of our employees, enhances our innovation and creativity, and enriches our involvement in our communities. EdgeConneX is an equal employment opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, national origin or ancestry, physical or mental disability, as well as any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws.



EdgeConneX offers a competitive benefits package.



For more information on how we process your data, visit our Data Privacy Policy here.

title: Solutions Engineer, EMEA - SELECT by DoiT
description:
**Location:** Our Solutions Engineer, SELECT by DoiT, will be an integral part of our Solutions Engineering team in EMEA. This role is based remotely in the UK, Netherlands or Sweden.


**Who We Are**



DoiT is a global technology company that empowers cloud-driven organizations to achieve business growth and innovation through strategic cloud utilization. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state—from initial planning to full-scale production.



With deep experience across cloud environments, we specialize in Cloud Data Platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, and BigQuery, alongside strong FinOps expertise. As a trusted and award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we support over 4,000 customers worldwide.



Our flagship offerings include DoiT Cloud Intelligence, which uniquely blends advanced technology with human insight to solve complex multicloud challenges and drive efficiency. We also offer SELECT for Snowflake—a pioneering solution for cost observability and optimization (with Databricks and BigQuery support coming soon). By automating optimizations and delivering actionable cost-saving insights, SELECT enables organizations to achieve unparalleled efficiency across their Cloud Data Platforms: https://select.dev/


**The Opportunity**



As a Solutions Engineer, SELECT by DoiT, you will be a pivotal technical leader, collaborating closely with our Account Executive team to deliver exceptional value throughout the customer journey, specifically focusing on our cutting-edge Snowflake/Databricks optimization capabilities.


**Responsibilities**


* **Technical Qualification & Discovery:** Collaborating with the Account Executive to thoroughly understand the prospect's technical environment, Cloud Data Platform cost challenges, cost optimization goals, and key business objectives through in-depth technical discovery sessions.
* **Technical Validation & POV Leadership:** Owning and driving the technical validation and Proof of Value (POV) exercises for SELECT. This includes meticulous POC preparation, proactive management, and ensuring successful technical outcomes, demonstrating clear value and alignment with prospect requirements.
* **Platform Demonstrations:** Tailoring and delivering compelling SELECT platform demonstrations to prospects, effectively showcasing its capabilities and addressing their specific use cases and concerns.
* **Business Case & ROI Development:** Leveraging your analytical skills and deep understanding of Cloud Data Platform to develop compelling business cases and robust ROI analyses that clearly articulate the tangible value, cost savings, and performance improvements achievable with SELECT.
* **SELECT Expertise:** Becoming the go-to expert within the company for SELECT, ensuring prospects achieve optimal results and a seamless implementation experience.
* **Technical Win Ownership:** Taking full ownership of the technical win for SELECT engagements, guiding prospects through the technical evaluation process, addressing all technical requirements, and building technical confidence in the solution.
* **Event & Conference Presentations:** Representing DoiT and SELECT at company events and industry conferences, delivering engaging presentations and demonstrations to a wider audience, showcasing our Snowflake/Databricks (and soon BigQuery) optimization expertise as well as platform capabilities.
* **Product Feedback and Customer Advocacy:** Translate customer pain points and feature gaps into structured, technically credible input for R&D teams. Represent the voice of the technical customer in roadmap discussions.
* **Accurate, timely documentation:** Ensure timely entry of data into internal business support solutions. Contribute to systems and tools to provide key business information and metrics to highlight performance and effectiveness.


We are seeking an individual who is not only passionate about Snowflake/Databricks/BigQuery optimization but also thrives on engaging technically with customers, solving their most pressing challenges related to Cloud Data Platform cost and performance. This role offers the exciting opportunity to be at the forefront of innovation within a rapidly evolving ecosystem.


**About You**



You are an accomplished Solutions Engineer with a proven track record in a B2B SaaS environment, ideally with a strong emphasis on Snowflake/Databricks/BigQuery solutions. You excel as a technical leader within a sales team and are enthusiastic about empowering companies to optimize their Cloud Data Platform environments for maximum cost efficiency and performance through innovative solutions like SELECT. You are highly accountable for the technical success of all initiatives you are involved in and are driven to contribute to a high-performing sales organization that consistently wins in a competitive market. You are comfortable and thrive in a fast-paced, growing, collaborative, and entrepreneurial setting.


#### **Qualifications**


* 5+ years of experience in a Solutions Engineering role within a B2B SaaS software company, having a significant portion of that experience focused on selling to **Snowflake, Databricks and BigQuery users** and directly addressing challenges related to Cloud Data Platforms or cloud cost management.
* Deep and demonstrable understanding of **Snowflake, Databricks, or BigQuery** as well as associated best practices
* Hands-on experience working with SaaS solutions focusing on Cloud Data Platforms in the areas of observability, optimization, FinOps, or data integration.
* Exceptional data analysis skills with a proven ability to identify key trends, outliers, and correlations as well as the translation of those observations into actionable insights.
* Strong track record of leveraging product data to construct compelling business cases and ROI justifications for prospective customers, clearly demonstrating the substantial cost savings and performance enhancements achievable through our solution.
* Exceptional ability to articulate complex Cloud Data Platform related concepts and SELECT functionalities in a clear, concise, and easily understandable manner to both technical and business audiences.
* Outstanding verbal, written, presentation, and interpersonal communication skills, with the confidence and expertise to present on sophisticated topics such as Cloud Data Platform optimization strategies and the compelling value proposition of SELECT.
* Strong intellectual curiosity, exceptional problem-solving abilities, and a genuine passion for continuous learning and improvement within the dynamic Snowflake/Databricks/BigQuery ecosystem.
* Proven experience working with and presenting to executive-level prospects and customers on critical topics related to Cloud Data Platforms and especially cost management.
* Demonstrated experience with modern technical selling best practices/methodologies and a successful track record in competitive sales environments, including the ability to contribute to and implement effective trial, demo, and RFP processes specifically tailored for Cloud Data Platform optimization solutions like SELECT.
* Prior professional experience as a Snowflake/Databricks/BigQuery data engineer/architect or FinOps professional is a plus.
* A proven history of success in a fast-paced and scaling business, ideally within the Cloud Data Platform ecosystem.


**Are you a Do'er?**



Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.



We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.


What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge, and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.



Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.



We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.



Full-time employee benefits include:


* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**  

DoiT unites as *Many Do'ers, One Team*, where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.



#LI-Remote

title: Product Data Analyst (9 to 12-month enabling phase) SE
description:
#### **Location**

Sweden, Stockholm, Norway, Oslo
#### **Apply by**

2026-05-16
  
**Shape the Future of Hospitality at Strawberry**  

At Strawberry, we're not just a hotel company anymore – we're building a universe of experiences. We're transforming the hospitality landscape through innovation and technology, and 2023 marked a major milestone with the launch of our new mother brand, Strawberry. This exciting evolution creates countless opportunities for growth and impact, and we're looking for a passionate and skilled Product Data Analyst to join our Strawberry Data & Insights Team and help us shape the future of travel.


Our main mission is to establish a scalable foundation for how we work with product analytics across our tech product portfolio, spanning HQ operations, hotel operations, and our independent websites for our Luxury, Lifestyle & Resort division. As part of our team, you will establish frameworks, ways of working, and taxonomy structures that our teams can continue to build and execute on. This role is a crucial bridge between our Product Managers and their stakeholders, to make sure we build products that have the impact that we expect them to have, empowering the product teams to make better data-informed decisions independently.

**Be a Data-Driven Force**  

As a Product Data Analyst, you'll play a crucial role in empowering Strawberry to become a truly data-driven organization. You'll be instrumental in developing and maintaining robust analytical solutions, supporting the full product development lifecycle, and moving us toward self-serve analytics.

**What You'll Do:**

* **Product Analytics & Insights:** Support the full product development lifecycle by partnering with PMs to identify key levers, analyzing funnels and cohorts, and translating data into actionable recommendations.
* **Metrics & Reporting:** Define and maintain product KPIs, OKRs, and success metrics, and build dashboards and automated reporting.
* **Data Quality:** Improve and create new event taxonomy, tracking documentation, and data quality standards, collaborating with Product and BI teams on semantic models.
* **Frameworks & Enablement:** Establish scalable frameworks and ways of working for product analytics, including taxonomy structures and experimentation practices.
* **Culture Champion:** Actively coach product teams in data-driven methods and metrics, contributing to a self-serve insights culture day-to-day.

**What You'll Bring:**

* Solid background in product analytics, including funnel analysis, cohort analysis, and behavioural modelling.
* A product-minded approach that balances speed with rigour and communicates clearly to non-technical stakeholders.
* Proven ability to coach and enable PMs, designers, and engineers to work more data-driven independently.
* Comfort navigating ambiguity and legacy systems while building toward a scalable future state.

**What You'll Need:**

* Proficiency in web analytics and event-based models (primarily GA4) and expert-level tag management (e.g., Google Tag Manager).
* Strong understanding of experimentation design and hands-on experience with A/B testing platforms.
* Proficiency in PowerBI and experience building semantic models (including structuring them to be AI-ready).
* Advanced SQL skills and familiarity with Cloud Data Warehouses (e.g., Snowflake, BigQuery).
* *Bonus*: Python or R experience, familiarity with dbt, and experience with AI products or ML-adjacent environments.

**What We Offer:** This is a 6-month role for now to get us started. Strawberry is in a transformation journey and we have to be careful about our long term commitments. We however want to invest in you and offer you:

* **Real Impact:** Be a part of a dynamic transformation and contribute directly to our success story.
* **Empowerment:** Work in a flat organization with trust, autonomy, and the opportunity to make a real difference.
* **Growth & Development:** Access professional development opportunities to enhance your skills and advance your career.
* **Fun & Community:** Enjoy a vibrant work environment with plenty of social events and team-building activities.
* **Fantastic Perks:** Benefit from great employee discounts, including staff and friends & family rates at our hotels.
* **Travel included:** This role begins with a 9 to 12-month contract with your base at our HQ in Solna, Stockholm or Oslo (some travel between locations expected).
* **Summer vacation:** We have summer code freeze June 29th to August 3rd so we expect you to take 3-4 weeks vacation in that period.

title: Content Creator
description:
#### **Location**

Sweden, Stockholm
#### **Apply by**

2026-05-05
  
### **Content Creator – Hotel C Stockholm**


Är du en kreativ själ med erfarenhet av foto, film och design – och vill arbeta brett med content i en inspirerande miljö? Nu söker vi en Content Creator till Hotel C Stockholm och ICEBAR Stockholm.


I denna roll blir du en nyckelperson i vår marknadsföring, med fokus på produktion av innehåll. Vi söker dig som är idérik, självgående och har ett starkt öga för form, färg och storytelling – och som vill vara med och skapa innehåll som engagerar, inspirerar och stärker vårt varumärke.

### **Om oss**


Hotel C Stockholm är det folkliga, festliga och familjära hotellet mitt i smeten. Hos oss är ingenting krångligt – vår kommunikation ska vara lika enkel att förstå och lätt att älska som hotellet självt.


Med 367 hotellrum, en nyrenoverad konferensvåning, restaurang Swede Hollow och ett unikt samarbete med ICEHOTEL i Jukkasjärvi, genom vilket vi driver ICEBAR Stockholm, finns det gott om content att skapa för dig som antar utmaningen. Tycker du det verkar skoj att vara med och sprida vår varma, personliga och lekfulla röst – och göra Hotel C ännu mer älskat? Fortsätt läs!

### **Om rollen**


Det här är en operativ och kreativ roll med stort fokus på contentproduktion. Du ansvarar för att skapa material till våra kanaler – från idé till färdig leverans. Du kommer att arbeta nära både marknadschef, avdelningschefer och centrala marknadsfunktioner inom Strawberry. Det innebär en varierad vardag där du rör dig mellan olika delar av verksamheten och snabbt får en bred förståelse för både varumärke och drift.


På C har vi en varm och snäll kultur där vi tror på frihet under ansvar, korta beslutsvägar och en miljö där idéer snabbt kan bli verklighet.

 **Du lyckas i rollen när du:**

* Skapar engagerande innehåll i form av foto, video, design och text som stärker varumärket och konvertering
* Driver produktion från idé till leverans – för sociala medier, nyhetsbrev, kampanjer, e-post samt digitalt och tryckt material
* Säkerställer en konsekvent tonalitet och visuell identitet
* Anpassar innehåll efter målgrupp
* Tar initiativ, höjer den kreativa nivån, är flexibel och samarbetar smidigt med andra


Det finns goda möjligheter att växa i rollen över tid. Ambitionen är att detta ska vara en långsiktig tjänst där du successivt kan ta ett större ansvar och utvecklas tillsammans med oss.

 **Vi söker dig som:**

* Har erfarenhet av fotografering, redigering samt enklare rörligt material/video
* Är trygg i verktyg som Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Premiere Pro, LightRoom, InDesign eller liknande)
* Har ett starkt visuellt öga och känsla för storytelling
* Är självgående, flexibel, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
* Trivs i en kreativ och snabbfotad miljö
* Är flytande i svenska och engelska

### **Vad vi erbjuder**


Som heltidsanställd hos Hotel C Stockholm blir du en del av Strawberry och Nordic Hotels & Resorts med tillgång till en rad fina förmåner.

* En kreativ och varm arbetsmiljö där dina idéer får ta plats
* En varierad roll med högt tempo där ingen dag är den andra lik
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Fyra fria hotellnätter per år inom Strawberry
* Personalpriser på hotell och restauranger inom Strawberry

### **Praktisk information**

* Tillsvidareanställning (heltid) med 6 månaders provanställning
* Tjänsten är helt på plats på Hotel C Stockholm (vid Stockholm Centralstation)
* Du rapporterar till marknadschef
* Tillträde enligt överenskommelse

### **Ansökan**


Låter det här som något för dig? Skicka in ditt CV, en kort presentation (personligt brev) och gärna också portfolio. Vid frågor, kontakta ida.sundstedt@hotelcstockholm.se.


Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! ✨
