title: System Analyst - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Solna, Sweden


* Full-time
* Application and Product Development
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description **Are you passionate about leveraging modern technologies to revolutionize healthcare? If so, we invite you to join our dynamic and innovative team as openEHR modeler!**


We're a tech-forward company dedicated to enhancing health and social care through open platforms, ecosystems, and adherence to leading healthcare standards like FHIR and openEHR.

  

We work in an agile, multinational organization that develops cutting-edge products and services for both public and private sectors across the Nordic countries. Our teams are committed to creating, supporting, and delivering modern solutions used by healthcare and social care professionals throughout the region.

  

While we've listed several skills and experiences that we believe would be beneficial for this role, please don't be discouraged if you don't tick every box. We’re primarily looking for a person with a strong passion for structure and information, who is eager to learn and develop competence in openEHR if not already experienced.

 **In this role you will**

* **Collaborate with Global Teams and Customers** to understand their needs and translate them into effective solutions and services.
* **Facilitate the secure exchange** of health information between different healthcare organizations
* **Map** health data from one source to another source.
* **Find new and effective ways** to use healthcare data in applications.
* **Get a deeper understanding** of the need of data structure and reusing of data to support different stakeholders in the healthcare domain.
* **Be part of a team** of developers, application specialists, solution architects and others working with solutions to support healthcare professionals.
* **Ensure compliance** with legal and regulatory requirements related to health information exchange.

 **We're Looking for Someone with**

* **Experience in analysing and structuring healthcare data** to make it useful for healthcare professionals in patient encounters.
* Experience of clinical terminologies (e.g. SNOMED CT, ICD‑10/ICD‑11) and experience with, or interest in learning, the openEHR standard.
* Strong communication skills in English and Swedish, both written and spoken; knowledge of additional languages is beneficial.

 **It would be beneficial if you also have**

* Experience from healthcare sector
* Experience of analysing data
* Experience of health standards like openEHR or FHIR
* Knowledge of healthcare regulations

 **As a person you are**

* Self-motivated & Self organized
* Independent and Responsible
* Good team player, attention to detail and ability to work well with others

 **What We Can Offer You**

* A workplace with a creative and positive working climate and great and supportive colleges
* Career development and coaching
* Flexible working hours and remote working possibilities
* Interesting and growing industry area
* Room for innovation and self-development

 **What’s in it for you?**


With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.


Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.

 **Could you be our new colleague?**


We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Timo Heikkilä (timo.j.heikkila@tieto.com)

  



*We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.

title: Product Owner - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Solna, Sweden


* Full-time
* Application and Product Development
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description **At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.**  



**About us**


Tieto Caretech is modernizing the Nordic health and social care sector with modular, open, and interoperable software. We develop and deliver high quality software solutions and services that enable healthcare and welfare professionals to do their work even better and with higher efficiency - have more time to care.


We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can build technology for the good of society and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people in need.  



**About the role**


We are now looking for an experienced **Product Owner for our Workforce Operations solutions within Health and Social Care** at Tieto Caretech, Data Driven Care.


Our solutions support healthcare organizations and municipalities in workforce and resource planning —ensuring the right competence is available at the right place and time, while balancing capacity, demand, and regulatory requirements.


As a Product Owner, you will work closely with Product Management, development teams and key stakeholders to ensure high customer value, aligned priorities and efficient delivery across teams. You will play a key role in connecting product strategy with execution in a complex, multi-team environment.


Experience in healthcare or workforce planning is an advantage but not required. The ability to quickly understand complex domains is essential.

 **As a Product Owner you will:**

* Translate product strategy into clear, structured initiatives and priorities that guide develop ent across teams
* Own and prioritize the product backlog in close collaboration with Product Management
* Drive alignment and coordination across multiple teams, ensuring clear priorities and well-managed dependencies
* Act as a key link between Product Management, development teams, and customers, ensuring alignment between strategy, needs, and execution
* Make clear prioritization decisions, balancing business value, customer needs, and technical constraints
* Ensure that delivered functionality creates real customer value and supports overall product strategy
* Keep up to date with competition and the market
* Support the sales process with domain and product knowledge

  

 **We are looking for someone with:**

* Solid experience as a Product Owner or in a similar role in software development
* Solid understanding of agile product development and iterative delivery
* Strong ability to structure complex problems and translate them into clear and actionable work
* Proven experience working in environments with multiple teams and stakeholders
* Structured approach to prioritization and planning
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across roles, functions, and backgrounds
* Ability to quickly understand complex domains and workflows

 **Personal qualities:**

* Curious and proactive, with a collaborative and solution-oriented mindset

title: Product Owner - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Gothenburg, Sweden


* Full-time
* Application and Product Development
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description **At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.**  



**About us**


Tieto Caretech is modernizing the Nordic health and social care sector with modular, open, and interoperable software. We develop and deliver high quality software solutions and services that enable healthcare and welfare professionals to do their work even better and with higher efficiency - have more time to care.


We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can build technology for the good of society and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people in need.  



**About the role**


We are now looking for an experienced **Product Owner for our Workforce Operations solutions within Health and Social Care** at Tieto Caretech, Data Driven Care.


Our solutions support healthcare organizations and municipalities in workforce and resource planning —ensuring the right competence is available at the right place and time, while balancing capacity, demand, and regulatory requirements.


As a Product Owner, you will work closely with Product Management, development teams and key stakeholders to ensure high customer value, aligned priorities and efficient delivery across teams. You will play a key role in connecting product strategy with execution in a complex, multi-team environment.


Experience in healthcare or workforce planning is an advantage but not required. The ability to quickly understand complex domains is essential.

 **As a Product Owner you will:**

* Translate product strategy into clear, structured initiatives and priorities that guide develop ent across teams
* Own and prioritize the product backlog in close collaboration with Product Management
* Drive alignment and coordination across multiple teams, ensuring clear priorities and well-managed dependencies
* Act as a key link between Product Management, development teams, and customers, ensuring alignment between strategy, needs, and execution
* Make clear prioritization decisions, balancing business value, customer needs, and technical constraints
* Ensure that delivered functionality creates real customer value and supports overall product strategy
* Keep up to date with competition and the market
* Support the sales process with domain and product knowledge

  

 **We are looking for someone with:**

* Solid experience as a Product Owner or in a similar role in software development
* Solid understanding of agile product development and iterative delivery
* Strong ability to structure complex problems and translate them into clear and actionable work
* Proven experience working in environments with multiple teams and stakeholders
* Structured approach to prioritization and planning
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across roles, functions, and backgrounds
* Ability to quickly understand complex domains and workflows

 **Personal qualities:**

* Curious and proactive, with a collaborative and solution-oriented mindset
* Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment and adapting to changing priorities
* Strong sense of ownership and focus on delivering real value
* Good written and verbal English, in addition to Norwegian or Swedish

 **What’s in it for you?**


With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing solutions used in healthcare organizations. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.


Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.  



**Could you be our new colleague?**


We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Svein Johan Hauge [svein.johan.hauge@tieto.com]

 *We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.

title: Sr AI Program Manager
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 175,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.  



Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.  



At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!  



**Description**

We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Sr. AI Program Manager to lead the successful integration and rollout of cutting-edge AI tools within our Technology organization, as well as support the formation of related governance and processes needed for Sinch as a whole.  



This pivotal role will be at the forefront of our AI strategy, both within the Technology organization and the broader company, responsible for driving adoption, fostering a culture of innovation, and ensuring the safe and scalable use of artificial intelligence.  



**Key Responsibilities**

* Strategy and Execution: Support the formulation and execution of the overarching adoption and rollout strategy for AI tools and technologies across the organization.
* AI Champions Program: Continue to evolve and manage our AI Champions program to educate employees, foster innovation, and inform the strategic rollout of new AI tools.
* Community Facilitation: Facilitate engaging AI Champion sharing sessions and manage communication channels (e.g., Slack) to encourage knowledge sharing and collaboration.
* Governance and Financial Operations: Partner with Finance, Security, and IT to define and evolve governance, financial processes, and policies for AI usage, including cost allocation and capitalization.
* User Enablement: Identify common user profiles within the organization and create comprehensive documentation detailing suggested AI tools and best practices to accelerate onboarding and adoption for new users.
* Platform Management: Own and manage user access for the Technology department in our key AI tool platforms, including Cursor, Claude, and future platforms.

The role is based at SINCH HQ in Stockholm, Sweden and reports to the Chief of Staff in the Technology organization.  



**Requirements:**

To be successful in the role you are a strategic thinker with a passion for technology and a proven ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams, including security, data, IT, legal, and finance, to establish robust AI governance and processes.  



* Proven experience in program or project management, particularly in technology adoption, change management, or digital transformation capacity, from a global complex organization.
* Strong understanding of AI concepts, tools, and the overall landscape of artificial intelligence.
* Experience in user lifecycle management for enterprise software platforms.
* Demonstrated ability to work effectively with diverse, cross-functional teams, including technical and non-technical stakeholders from Security, Legal, and Finance.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and facilitation skills, with experience in community management being a plus.
* A strategic mindset with the ability to translate high-level goals into actionable execution plans.

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English.  



At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation at this time.  



Applicants must:


* Hold Swedish or EU/EEA citizenship.
* Have a valid Swedish work permit.

**Our hiring process**

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.


We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/ . No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us.
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: Senior AI Solution Engineer
description:
April 17, 2026
Hybrid
Sweden
Posted 14 hours ago
We are hiring **Senior AI Solution Engineer** for the position based in **Goteborg, Sweden (Hybrid , 3 days Onsite per week).**


**Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, or related field, or equivalent professional experience.


**Job Summary:**



We are seeking a **Senior AI Solutions Engineer** to design, implement, and deploy end-to-end AI solutions that enhance products and operational workflows. As a key member of a specialized AI team, you will manage the full lifecycle of AI development—from initial problem definition to production deployment.


**Required Experience/Competences:**


* **5+ years** in software development or a similar senior engineering role.
* **1+ year** of direct experience deploying AI solutions in production environments.
* **Programming:** High level of competence in **Python** and experience building APIs/services (FastAPI).
* **AI & Machine Learning:** Extensive experience in applied ML (regression, classification, time-series) and a strong background in developing **LLM-based solutions** in production.
* **Reliability Engineering:** Expertise in making AI systems dependable, focusing on error handling, latency, cost, and evaluation practices.
* **Infrastructure (Preferred):** Experience with **Docker**, **Azure** cloud platforms, and managing complex, unstructured real-world data.


**Soft Skills:**


* **Strong Ownership:** Ability to work independently within a small team and take full responsibility for quality outcomes.
* **Analytical Problem-Solving:** A practical, engineering-focused mindset capable of navigating unclear requirements.
* **Collaborative Mindset:** Comfortable sharing responsibility across cross-functional teams and maintaining clear communication with stakeholders.
### **Job Features**


Job Category Artificial Intelligence

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Sellpy’s vision is to empower everyone to live circularly. We believe that every item deserves a second life, and we see huge financial, social and environmental value in making sure this happens. Join us in building technology that drives real change.**

**Machine Learning at Sellpy**


We look for you who want to be part of our journey to make sustainable shopping the first-hand choice by building great product recommendations, using computer vision to make the item handling process smoother and other user-friendly solutions. We want to provide the best customer experience and that’s why we need you on board.


This job will suit you if you’re excited to build solutions leveraging the latest machine learning models and build custom models to solve unique challenges together with a team of highly motivated engineers.

**In short, you will**

* Build machine learning models with a major impact on our product
* Simplify, maintain and improve our already existing models
* Build solutions leveraging the latest machine learning development
* Enjoy personal growth during our level-up days once a month
* Keep up with ML development with the team on weekly deep dives
* Make use of your skills in Tensorflow and Python

**Requirements**

* B.S or M.S. degree in Computer Science or related field
* Strong proficiency in Python
* In-depth expertise about machine learning algorithms, deep learning and LLMs
* Experience with ML frameworks such as Tensorflow or PyTorch
* Experience with AWS or similar cloud service providers
* Experience with relational databases and SQL
* Written and spoken fluency in English

**We’d be impressed if you have**

* Previous experience with recommender systems
* Previous experience with using ML systems for item valuation
* Knowledge about how to build efficient data pipelines
* Experience in setting up ML systems in production
* Experience working with vector databases

**You get to**

* Be part of a tech-minded company that's driving the change towards a sustainable lifestyle. In return, you will get direction, energy, and work on meaningful challenges daily.
* Benefit from hybrid work from our offices at Medborgarplatsen, Rosersberg and from home.
* Work with highly skilled and motivated colleagues.
* Gain new skills with unlimited access to a learning platform.
* Grow professionally during monthly level-up days.
* Enjoy Sellpy credits and staff discounts at Sellpy and the H&M brands (Arket, COS, Other Stories, Weekday and more).
* Save up with a monthly pension plan.
* Engagement in Sellpy’s social traditions with game nights, interactive planning days, guest speakers and other activities.

**Location**


You are welcome to do all these things from our office at Medborgarplatsen in Stockholm, and from home. Ideally, we’d love to see you in the office frequently, as it helps create a positive and productive environment.

**Hybrid work**


We work flexibly but value being together. During your first period, you’ll be on-site more often to get settled. Moving forward, we maintain a 50% office presence, with some flexibility depending on your team and tasks.

**Our Interview Process**

We want to get to know you, your way of thinking, and how we would work together.

* Culture Interview (45 min): A video call to get to know each other. We talk about your background, your drive, and why you are interested in Sellpy.
* Technical Interview (1 hour): A deep dive into your technical knowledge and how you approach problem-solving.
* Case Interview (2 hours): You will receive a real-world case assignment to prepare in advance. We then invite you to our office at Medborgarplatsen where you will present your solution and we will discuss your reasoning in depth.
* Founder Interview (30 min): A final chat with one of our founders to discuss the company vision and your potential journey with us.

**Form of employment:** Full-time

**Start:** As agreed upon
company_description: Put your talent to better use.

title: AI specialist
description:
About the Role


We are seeking an experienced and collaborative AI Specialist to join our engineering and research teams. In this role, you will design, build, and maintain machine learning and generative AI systems that power product features, automation, and data-driven insights. The ideal candidate combines practical engineering skills with a strong understanding of model development, deployment, and responsible AI practices. You will work cross-functionally with product, design, and frontend/backend engineers to turn prototypes into robust, production-ready capabilities.


Responsibilities

* Design, develop, and maintain machine learning models and inference services for production use
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to translate product requirements into scalable AI solutions
* Research and prototype new modeling approaches, including large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, and multimodal architectures
* Implement data pipelines for training, evaluation, and continuous monitoring of model performance
* Deploy and operate ML systems using containerization and orchestration tools; optimize for latency, cost, and scalability
* Build and maintain CI/CD workflows for model training, validation, and deployment; automate testing and rollout processes
* Establish and apply evaluation metrics, A/B testing, and monitoring to ensure quality and reliability in production
* Document model designs, data requirements, APIs, and operational runbooks to support maintenance and on-call activities
* Champion responsible AI practices: bias mitigation, data governance, privacy, and clear user-facing disclosures


Qualifications

* 3+ years of professional experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or a related field
* Strong programming skills in Python and experience with ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, or JAX)
* Experience with model training, fine-tuning, and evaluation workflows; familiarity with transformer architectures and modern LLM toolchains
* Practical experience building data pipelines and working with SQL and data storage solutions
* Familiarity with deployment and serving frameworks (TorchServe, Triton, FastAPI, or similar) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and MLOps tooling (MLflow, DVC, TFX, or similar)
* Strong testing and validation mindset, including unit tests, model validation suites, and monitoring/observability
* Excellent communication skills and experience working in cross-functional, remote-friendly teams


Nice to Have

* Experience with retrieval systems, embeddings, and vector databases (e.g., FAISS, Milvus, Pinecone)
* Familiarity with prompt engineering, instruction tuning, or RLHF workflows
* Background in NLP, computer vision, or multimodal model research
* Contributions to open-source ML projects or published research

title: Managing Director, Transportation
description:
Enghouse is looking to hire a divisional leader with experience in running B2B enterprise software businesses in the Transportation and Public Safety market. This includes running sales, professional services, recurring revenue (support, hosted, SaaS, Cloud and managed Services) and software engineering operations.

  



Reporting to the President, the **General Manager, Transportation** will lead the end-to-end strategy, growth, and operational execution of our transportation business. This executive will be responsible for scaling multimodal mobility platforms, managing public and private-sector partnerships, and delivering high-performance, tech-enabled transportation systems across multiple markets. This role requires a unique blend of **P&L leadership, mobility expertise, digital platform experience, and public-sector engagement**.

  



Candidates located in Europe or Eastern Europe are preferred. The role requires travel.

 **Key Responsibilities**

 **Strategic Leadership**


* Define and execute the company’s global transportation strategy across public transit, microtransit, and MaaS (Mobility-as-a-Service)
* Identify new market opportunities, including public tenders, PPPs, and private sector partnerships
* Drive expansion into new geographies and urban markets

  


**Operational Excellence**


* Oversee daily transportation operations, including service delivery and customer experience
* Implement scalable operating models for demand-responsive transit and fixed-route systems
* Ensure regulatory compliance across jurisdictions

  


**Technology & Innovation**


* Lead integration of mobility platforms, including routing algorithms, dispatch systems, and passenger apps
* Partner with product and engineering teams to enhance platform capabilities (real-time data, AI optimization, ticketing systems)
* Champion data-driven decision-making across all transportation services

  


**Commercial & Financial Performance**


* Own full P&L for the transportation division
* Drive revenue growth through contract wins, renewals, and upselling services
* Optimize cost structures while maintaining service quality and reliability

  


**Team Leadership**


* Build and lead a high-performing, cross-functional team (operations, engineering, commercial, customer success)
* Foster a culture of accountability, innovation, and continuous improvement
* Develop leadership bench strength across regions

  


**Required Qualifications**


**Experience**


* 15+ years of senior leadership experience in transportation, mobility, logistics, or related sectors
* Proven experience running a **multi-market P&L** ($25M+ preferred)
* Track record of scaling operations in complex, regulated environments
* Experience negotiating contracts with **public sector clients** (transit agencies, municipalities, ministries), including managing profitable projects with government entities.

  


**Technical & Industry Expertise**


* Deep understanding of:
	+ Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS)
	+ Demand-responsive transit (DRT)
	+ Transportation regulations and procurement processes
* Experience with transportation technology platforms (routing, dispatch, ticketing, real-time data systems)

  


**Leadership & Commercial Skills**


* Strong strategic thinking and execution capability
* Demonstrated success in winning and managing large contracts/tenders
* Exceptional stakeholder management and negotiation skills
* Experience leading diverse, international teams

  


**Company Overview**

  


Enghouse Transportation is a technology-driven mobility company operating at the intersection of public transit, on-demand transportation, and intelligent mobility platforms. Enghouse Transportation designs and delivers integrated transportation solutions that combine software, data, and operations to improve how people move through cities.

  


*Enghouse is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.*

  

#LI-ET

title: Global Industry Director
description:
*Twoday is a leading Northern European AI and digital engineering company with 3,000 experts across AI, data & analytics, cloud, digital engineering, and business applications. We help organizations create lasting impact through advanced technology and close collaboration.*

*The company is owned by CVC Capital Partners and is on an ambitious growth and transformation journey across the Nordics. Twoday is a strategic partner to Databricks, Microsoft, and Snowflake, with deep expertise in modern data platforms, custom software, and business-critical enterprise solutions.*

*\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_*

**Location:** Nordic (frequent travel across the Nordics)

**Role scope:** One Global Industry Director per prioritized industry

**Prioritized industries:**

* Health & Life Sciences
* Energy & Utilities
* Finance & Insurance
* Industrials & Manufacturing
* Government

### **Purpose of the role**


Twoday is strengthening its industry‑led commercial model and is appointing **Global Industry Directors** with full commercial accountability for growth, market penetration, and strategic customer wins within their respective industries.


This is a **senior commercial leadership role** for proven industry heavy‑hitters. The primary mandate is to **win significant business**, build market momentum, and materially grow revenue and profitability by establishing Twoday as a leading partner in the industry.


The role is **externally facing and deal‑driven**. Success made through **market results**: revenue growth, strategic logo wins, share of wallet, and profitable expansion across the Nordics.

### **Core accountabilities**

#### **Commercial leadership and revenue ownership**

* Own **end‑to‑end commercial results** for the industry across the Nordics, including revenue growth, profitability, pricing discipline, and portfolio mix.
* Personally **lead, sponsor, and close major strategic deals** and priority pursuits.
* Open doors at **CxO level**, challenge customer thinking, and position Twoday as a strategic partner.
* Create sustained market momentum by shaping demand, not just responding to it.
* Be clearly and personally accountable for commercial outcomes.

#### **Industry strategy and market positioning**

* Define and execute a **focused industry strategy** with clear growth priorities, target customers, and differentiated value propositions.
* Translate strategy into **concrete go‑to‑market initiatives** and sales priorities across countries.
* Actively track market dynamics, customer needs, and competitive movements to continuously sharpen positioning and commercial best practices
* Drive industry‑specific portfolio and offering development in close collaboration with technology leadership.

#### **Strategic customer portfolio ownership**

* Own the **strategic customer portfolio** within the industry across all countries.
* Build and maintain executive‑level relationships with key accounts and strategic prospects.
* Drive consistent, high‑quality account strategies, value creation, and long‑term customer growth.
* Scale successful customer cases and repeatable commercial models across countries.

#### **Leadership of team and through global influence**

* Lead industry sales team for own industry
* Set clear commercial direction and priorities across countries for the industry
* Build a strong performance culture with clear targets, transparency, and accountability.
* Collaborate closely with country management to ensure global ambitions are translated into local wins.

#### **Cross‑functional collaboration**

* Collaborate with global and local technology leadership to ensure industry needs are matched with strong, differentiated capabilities.
* Work with Marketing, Finance, People & Culture, and delivery leadership to enable growth — while remaining clearly accountable for commercial outcomes.
* Maintain a clear separation between **commercial ownership and delivery execution, ensuring alignment through disciplined account plans** and governance where needed.

### **Success measures**

* Revenue growth and profitability within the industry.
* Number and size of **strategic deal wins** and new logo acquisitions.
* Increased share of wallet with strategic and large customers.
* Clear and recognized industry positioning across the Nordic market.
* Repeatable industry offerings and cross‑country revenue synergies.

### **Required experience and profile**

* Proven **senior commercial leadership experience** within a relevant industry.
* trong and demonstrated track record of **winning large, complex deals** and growing strategic customer relationships.
* Clear ownership mindset with appetite for accountability and visible results.
* Deep understanding of industry buying behavior, decision processes, and CxO agendas.
* Experience operating across multiple countries and complex stakeholder environments.
* Strong personal industry network and high credibility with executive decision‑makers.
* Willingness to travel frequently across the Nordics.
* Fluency in English, a Nordic language is a plus

### **Who succeeds in this role**


This role is for commercially ambitious leaders who:

* Are energized by **winning business and beating the market**.
* Combine strategic thinking with hands‑on deal leadership.
* Are comfortable being measured on results, not coordination.'
* Lead with presence, pace, and personal credibility internally and externally.
* Want to make a visible, material impact on Twoday’s growth trajectory

**Diversity & Inclusion**


Do you feel that you do not meet every requirement? Studies show that women and other underrepresented groups are less likely to apply if they do not match every criterion. At Twoday, we are committed to building an inclusive workplace and encourage you to apply if this role appeals to you — even if your experience does not fully match the job description.

  

For questions related to the process – please contact People & Culture Business Partner synnove.follestad@twoday.com

**Application deadline for internal candidates:** April 29

**Application deadline for external candidates:** May 6

title: Woolpower söker marknadskommunikatör
description:
*Woolpower är en av Sveriges största textilproducenter och tillverkar varma underställ och sockor i ull – från garn till färdiga plagg. Hela produktionen sker i Östersund, vilket ger oss full kontroll över varje steg i processen. Med lång erfarenhet vet vi vad som krävs för att hålla värmen. Vårt mål är att sprida värme – både genom funktionella plagg och genom att vara ett ansvarstagande företag. Hållbarhet genomsyrar allt vi gör, och svensk produktion med fokus på hög kvalitet är kärnan i vår affärsidé. Vi sammanfattar detta i uttrycket Responsibly Made in Sweden – ett löfte om att våra produkter är ansvarsfullt tillverkade i Sverige. Det innebär ansvar i flera led: från rättvisa arbetsvillkor och omtanke om människorna bakom produkterna, till slitstarka plagg med lång livslängd och en välkontrollerad leverantörskedja.*

**Om tjänsten**


Som marknadskommunikatör på Woolpower får du en varierad och utvecklande roll där du arbetar med både strategiska och operativa uppgifter. Du blir en del av ett engagerat marknadsteam som ansvarar för den externa kommunikationen för Woolpower och dess systerbolag Gränsfors Bruk, Svedbro Smide, Wetterlings och Smedbergs.


I rollen ansvarar du för att planera, producera och följa upp innehåll i våra digitala kanaler, med fokus på att stärka våra varumärken och driva affär. Du arbetar nära både interna och externa samarbetspartners och är delaktig i hela processen – från idé och koncept till publicering och analys.


Hos oss arbetar vi utifrån en stark värdegrund och tydligt definierade mål. En central del av ditt arbete är att säkerställa att rätt budskap når rätt målgrupp – där våra digitala kanaler är avgörande. Du har en viktig roll i att utveckla vårt innehåll, vår tonalitet och hur vi kommunicerar våra produkter och vårt hantverk.

**Om dig**


Vi söker dig som har utbildning inom marknadsföring, kommunikation eller motsvarande erfarenhet. Du har arbetat med innehållsskapande och varumärkesbyggande, och är trygg i både strategiskt tänkande och operativt genomförande.


Du är kreativ och har ett öga för både form och innehåll, samtidigt som du är analytisk och förstår vad som driver resultat. Du trivs i en roll där du får ta eget ansvar, prioritera mellan olika uppgifter och driva ditt arbete framåt.


Som person är du prestigelös, nyfiken och lösningsorienterad. Du har lätt för att samarbeta och bygga relationer, och du är bekväm med att vara ett ansikte utåt för varumärket – både digitalt och i andra sammanhang.


Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift.

**Meriterande**


Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet inom ett eller flera av följande områden:

**Innehåll & produktion**

* Textproduktion, copywriting och storytelling
* Foto- och videoproduktion samt redigering (t.ex. Premiere Pro och Lightroom)
* Adobe Creative Cloud (InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator)

**Digital marknadsföring & kanaler**

* Sociala medier, contentplanering och publiceringsverktyg
* Digital annonsering (t.ex. Meta Ads, Google Ads) och kampanjoptimering
* SEO och innehållsoptimering

**Analys & affär**

* Analysverktyg (t.ex. Google Analytics eller liknande)
* Medieköp och planering av annonsering, både digitalt och i tryckta kanaler

**Övrigt**

* Planering och genomförande av event
**Övrigt**

**Anställningsform:** Vikariat 1 år, med möjlighet till fast anställning

**Tjänstgöringsgrad:** 100 %

**Arbetstid:** Dagtid

**Startdatum:** Enligt överenskommelse

**Lön:** Kollektiv- och löneavtal enligt Tjänstemannaavtal TEKO.


Sista ansökningsdag är **10 maj 2026**, urval och intervjuer sker löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Vi tillämpar arbetsprov i denna rekrytering.


Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Nu söker vi en Receptionist till Scandic Stora Hotellet
description:
**Nu söker vi en Receptionist till Scandic Stora Hotellet**

**Om företaget:**  

Scandic Stora Hotellet är ett centralt beläget hotell i Nyköping där klassisk charm möter modern service. Här blir du en del av en arbetsplats där omtanke, samarbete och gästupplevelse står i fokus. Hos oss arbetar vi tillsammans för att skapa vistelser i världsklass och en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt – om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Läs mer om hotellet på Scandic Stora Hotellet.

**Om tjänsten:**  

Som receptionist på Scandic Stora Hotellet är du en viktig del av helhetsupplevelsen för våra gäster. Du välkomnar, checkar in och checkar ut gäster samt ansvarar för att varje vistelse präglas av service i världsklass. Rollen innebär att du är spindeln i nätet i hotellets lobby där du hanterar gästkontakt, bokningar, administration, säkerhetsarbete och försäljning. Du arbetar med stort eget ansvar och har mandat att fatta beslut som bidrar till nöjda gäster och en välfungerande verksamhet. Arbetet sker i skift och passar dig som trivs i en levande miljö där ingen dag är den andra lik.

**Arbetsuppgifter inkluderar:**

* Checka in och checka ut hotellets gäster
* Hälsa gäster välkomna och ge information om vistelsen
* Hantera bokningar och administrativa uppgifter i Opera Cloud
* Säkerställa att gästens önskemål uppfylls med hög servicegrad
* Arbeta med försäljning, säkerhet och daglig drift i receptionen
* Hantera olika situationer i högt tempo och hitta kreativa lösningar
* Bidra till hög gästnöjdhet och ett professionellt värdskap

**Krav:**

* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både muntligt och skriftligt
* God datorvana och förmåga att arbeta i digitala system
* Förmåga att hantera många olika arbetsuppgifter samtidigt
* Mycket god servicekänsla och förmåga att skapa ett gott värdskap
* Trivs med att arbeta i skift, inklusive förmiddagar, eftermiddagar och helger

**Meriterande:**

* Erfarenhet av arbete i hotellreception eller annan serviceinriktad roll
* Kunskap i bokningssystemet Opera Cloud
* Ytterligare språkkunskaper utöver svenska och engelska

**Vi söker dig som:**

* Har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och gillar att möta människor
* Är lyhörd, prestigelös och en god lagspelare
* Tar stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet
* Är lösningsorienterad och kan vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst
* Har ett positivt sätt, ett professionellt bemötande och ett genuint engagemang

**Övrigt:**  

**Anställningsform:** Tillsvidareanställning på deltid 75%  

**Placering:** Scandic Stora Hotellet, Brunnsgatan 31, 611 32 Nyköping  

Se på Google Maps och beräkna restid

**Vad vi erbjuder:**  

Hos Scandic Stora Hotellet får du arbeta i en inspirerande hotellmiljö där du varje dag bidrar till gästupplevelser i världsklass. Du blir en del av ett engagerat team där samarbete, utveckling och ansvarstagande står i centrum. Här får du möjlighet att använda din kompetens, utvecklas i din roll och vara med och skapa en arbetsplats där vi har kul tillsammans samtidigt som vi levererar hög service.

*Rekryteringen görs i samarbete med* *Tillväxt Nyköping**. Urvalet sker löpande och dina svar på ansökningsfrågorna ligger till grund för bedömning av din ansökan. Den tjänst du söker är hos en av de arbetsgivare som Tillväxt Nyköping samarbetar med. Om du blir erbjuden jobbet blir det alltså denna arbetsgivare – inte Tillväxt Nyköping – som anställer dig.*

title: Linux - Kubernetes konsult
description:
Har du dokumenterad erfarenhet av Kubernetes och arbetar dagligen i Linux‑miljöer? Vill du ta dig an uppdrag där fokus ligger på stabil drift, skalbara lösningar och hög teknisk kvalitet – hos ett personligt konsultbolag som sätter människan i centrum? Då kanske detta är något för dig!

### **Om rollen**


Som Linux‑konsult arbetar du i säkerhetskritiska kundmiljöer med containerplattformar, automation och drift i moderna Linux‑baserade miljöer. Du bidrar aktivt till utformningen av tekniska lösningar och har möjlighet att påverka både arbetssätt och leverans.

**Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av:**

* Linux i produktionsmiljöer
* Kubernetes (on-prem eller cloud)
* Containertekniker som Docker/Containerd
* CI/CD och automation (Git, Ansible, Terraform)
* Molnplattformar som AWS, Azure eller GCP (meriterande)

### **Vem är du?**

* Trygg i din tekniska kompetens
* Lösningsorienterad och gillar att dela kunskap
* Trivs i konsultrollen och i dialog med kund
* Värdesätter kvalitet, enkelhet och bra samarbeten

### **Vi erbjuder**

* Ett personligt konsultbolag med korta beslutsvägar
* Flexibilitet, förtroende och balans
* Konkurrenskraftig ersättning och villkor


Ett team där omtanke och samarbete är självklart


**Placering:** Stockholm  

**Låter det intressant?** Skicka in din ansökan redan idag!

title: Technical Sales Executive Scandinavia
description:
Join Nordcloud and be part of the European cloud revolution. We supercharge our customers to innovate in hyperscaler cloud, enabling seamless migration, advanced security, and data-driven success. This role focuses on winning new clients in the Enterprise and Corporate business sectors and develop some of our current customers in parallel. As a trusted advisor, you will develop strong relationships with C-level executives and  

stakeholders, ensuring Nordcloud becomes their go-to partner for cloud services.


**Currently, we are looking for a** **Technical Sales Executive – Scandinavia (Norway, Sweden, Denmark)**

  

As a Technical Sales Executive at Nordcloud, you will be a driving force in our sales organisation, identifying client needs, designing cloud solutions, and managing the entire sales process. By delivering innovative cloud solutions, you will help clients increase operational efficiency and reduce costs, and ensuring that technology drives measurable business outcomes.


Your technical acumen and consultative approach will empower you to understand complex client challenges, architect impactful solutions, and communicate the business benefits of cloud adoption to C-level and technical stakeholders.


You will own your results, demonstrate a winner's attitude, and collaborate closely with colleagues across Nordcloud and IBM Consulting to achieve your goals.

  

**Your** **key responsibilities:**

  

* **Lead Technical Sales Engagements:** Identify client needs and design tailored cloud solutions that deliver measurable business outcomes. Drive new business within existing client base as well as within new logo acquisitions leveraging your technical expertise, solution mindset and ability to link desired business value to technical solutions.
* **Collaborate for Success:** Work as part of larger teams—often led by IBM Consulting—integrating Nordcloud's cloud solutions and value proposition into comprehensive, high-impact deals. Build strong relationships with internal teams, partners (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), and stakeholders to deliver best-in-class solutions.
* **Create Business Value:** Apply a solution-based sales approach to address complex customer challenges, always focusing on how technology can advance the client's strategic objectives.
* **Ownership for Results:** Take full responsibility for meeting and exceeding sales targets in consultancy and service sales, with a focus on cloud infrastructure, modernization, managed services, and consulting portfolios.
* **Drive and Winner's Attitude:** Approach every opportunity with energy, resilience, and a relentless drive to win. Celebrate successes and learn from setbacks, always striving for excellence.
* **Solution Workshops & Discovery:** Lead workshops and discovery sessions with client stakeholders to uncover pain points and co-create strategies that maximize the value of cloud adoption.
* **Thought Leadership**: Represent Nordcloud at industry events and in the media, showcasing your expertise and our leadership in cloud technology.

**What we are looking for:**

  

* **Background:** Coming from a technical background with several years of experience in roles such as IT-/Cloud Architect, Cloud Engineer, IT-/Cloud CTO, IT-/Cloud Solution Manager or similar.  

**IT-/Cloud Solution Manager or similar.**
* **Experience**: 7+ years in technical sales, solution sales, IT consulting, or cloud services, with a strong technical foundation and a proven track record of winning and growing new business.
* **Solution Understanding:** Knowledge of public cloud architectures (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), migration strategies, and cloud-native solutions. Ability to map technology capabilities to client business needs.
* **Consultative Approach:** Experience working directly with C-level stakeholders and senior IT executives, translating technical concepts into business value. With solution selling methodology you will craft tailored value propositions for complex cloud projects.
* **Ownership & Drive:** Demonstrated ability to take ownership for results, operate with a winner's attitude, and thrive in high-growth, fast-paced environments.
* **Collaboration:** Proven ability to collaborate across teams and organizations, including cloud partners, to deliver integrated solutions.
* **Communication:** Excellent communication, presentation, and organizational skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
* **Education:** Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent preferred.
* **Languages:** Fluent in English and at least one Scandinavian language.
* **Bonus Points:** Hands-on experience with cloud services offerings, tools, and processes. Certifications in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud are highly valued.

**What we offer:**

  

* Flexible working hours and hybrid working model
* Laptop and equipment to enable your efficient work
* **Local package** such as extensive private health care and insurance, wellness benefits


Please read our Recruitment Privacy Policy (https://nordcloud.com/recruitment-privacy-policy/) before applying. **All applicants must have the right to work in Sweden.**


**About Nordcloud**


Nordcloud is a European leader in cloud implementation, application development, managed services and training. It's a recognised cloud-native pioneer with a proven track record helping organisations leverage public cloud in a way that balances quick wins, immediate savings and sustainable value.
  

  

Nordcloud is triple-certified across Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform – with 10 European hubs, over 1,300 employees and has delivered over 1,000 successful cloud projects for companies ranging from midsize to large corporates.  

  

Our clients benefit from multi-cloud expertise that guides best practices, preempts pitfalls, provides essential technical support and steers teams through cultural change. From strategy planning to application management, we take our customers through the whole cloud journey to drive real business outcomes from cloud technology.  

  

Learn more at www.nordcloud.com (http://www.nordcloud.com)


*Nordcloud values diversity and is dedicated to providing equal opportunities for all candidates and employees.*

title: Cloud & Security Architect
description:
Vi söker fler Cloud & Security‑arkitekter som vill arbeta nära kund, affär och teknik - i uppdrag där säkerhet och skalbarhet är lika viktiga som användarupplevelse och värdeskapande. Hos oss får du tid, förtroende och rätt förutsättningar att bygga lösningar som håller över tid.


Vi erbjuder en trygg och långsiktig miljö där teamarbete, kvalitet och gemensamt ansvar står i fokus.

### **Är du den vi söker?**


Du är en person som trivs i gränslandet mellan cloud‑plattformar, arkitektur och säkerhet. Du gillar att:

* designa lösningar i Azure, AWS eller GCP
* arbeta med identitet, åtkomst, OIDC, OAuth2 och IAM
* lägga grunden för moderna cloud‑miljöer med DevSecOps i centrum
* bygga robusta CI/CD‑flöden och IaC‑lösningar
* vägleda utvecklingsteam i säkra och effektiva arbetssätt
* balansera affärsnytta med tekniska vägval


Du behöver inte kunna allt - vi söker dig som är trygg, nyfiken och intresserad av helheten.

### **Vad du kan arbeta med hos oss**


Arbetsuppgifterna varierar beroende på uppdrag och profil, men kan inkludera:

#### **Cloud Architecture**

* design av skalbara och säkra arkitekturer i Azure, AWS eller GCP
* hybrid- och molnöverskridande arkitekturmönster
* strategiska vägval kring drift, resiliency och kostnadsoptimering

#### **Säkerhet & identitet**

* design av IDP‑lösningar (Azure AD B2C, Curity, IdentityServer)
* Zero Trust, least privilege, MFA och access‑strategier
* hotmodellering, riskbedömning och secure-by-design

#### **DevSecOps & modern plattform**

* Kubernetes, containers, serverless och mikroservicelandskap
* IaC med Bicep, Terraform, AWS CDK, ARM eller CloudFormation
* CI/CD‑pipelines som möjliggör snabb och trygg leverans

#### **Team- och leadroller**

* delivery lead, tech lead eller rådgivande roll mot kund
* guidning av team i goda DevSecOps‑praktiker
* utbildning och coachning i cloud, säkerhet och moderna arbetsmetoder

### **Vilka vi tror att du är**


Vi tror att du:

* gillar att samarbeta och kommunicera tydligt
* är trygg i komplexa miljöer och gillar att lösa problem tillsammans
* har en bas i utveckling och känner dig bekväm nära koden
* värderar kvalitet, struktur och långsiktighet
* är inkluderande, prestigelös och uppskattar en miljö där alla får bidra
* vill fortsätta lära dig — gärna inom AI, agentic programming eller nya plattformsmönster


Hos oss behöver du inte passa in i en mall. Vi tror på olika erfarenheter, bakgrunder och perspektiv - och vi vill att du ska kunna växa på ditt sätt.

### **Trygga uppdrag där din kompetens behövs på riktigt**


Som Cloud & Security Architect hos oss får du arbeta i uppdrag som är:

* **affärskritiska** – där säkerhet och tillgänglighet är avgörande
* **långsiktiga** – med tid att bygga lösningar som håller
* **moderna** – med cloud‑, AI‑ och DevSecOps‑teknik i frontlinjen
* **stabila** – med erfarna team och nöjda kunder


Vi matchar dig utifrån vad du kan och vart du vill - inte mot första lediga uppdrag.

### **Vi satsar på dig**


Hos oss får du:

* kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och certifieringar
* en kultur av kunskapsdelning, trygghet och gemenskap
* interna kompetensdagar, tekniska forum och föreläsningsmöjligheter
* erfarna kollegor som gärna stöttar och delar sin expertis
* möjlighet att forma både teknik och arbetssätt i uppdrag


Här får du vara både tekniskt vass och mänskligt nyfiken - vi tror att kombinationen behövs för att skapa framtidens säkra digitala lösningar.

### **Om oss**


Omegapoint är norra Europas ledande konsultbolag inom säker digital innovation. Vi är över 800 medarbetare i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Örebro, Västerås, Enköping, Uppsala och Umeå.

title: Information Security Management System (ISMS) Manager Nordics
description:
### **Job Title**

Information Security Management System (ISMS) Manager Nordics
### **Job Description**

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced ISMS Manager to lead and maintain our Information Security Management System (ISMS) for the Nordics commercial entities, starting with Sweden Philips AB. The Information Security Manager will be responsible for effectively managing and maturing the ISMS, starting with Philips AB, executing overall risk management processes, providing oversight to meet business objectives and to ensure protection of the product platform and environments. This individual works collaboratively with and operations, quality and regulatory, group security, product security and privacy to maintain suitable levels of compliance to applicable laws and regulations through adherence to ISMS policies.


This role is critical to ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of customer data and organizational data, while maintaining compliance with healthcare regulations such as GDPR, ISO/IEC 27001, and other relevant standards.  



  

**Your role:**

* Develop, implement, and manage the organization’s ISMS framework in alignment with ISO/IEC 27001.
* Lead the Information Security Council within Hospital Patient Monitoring (HPM), driving towards milestones and objectives; leading risk assessments, gap analyses, and internal audits to ensure ongoing compliance and continuous improvement.
* Support the harmonization of existing security frameworks in HPM with the ISMS.
* Develop and maintain all relevant documentation, policies, procedures, standards and work instruction for security operations.
* Facilitate the management and reporting of risks identified through various risk assessments to include risk treatment plans execution to reduce risk to an acceptable level.
* Identify, implement and manage additional security controls as part of the ISMS.
* Ensure that security roles and responsibilities are understood at all levels within the organization; evangelize a security and privacy mindset.
* Evaluate the impact of new and changing legal and regulatory requirements that may affect the business; identify gaps within the ISMS and communicate to affected policy and process owners to create a mitigation plan.
* Collaborate with Group Security officers to implement security controls at various layers of the platform as part of continuous integration and deployment pipeline.
* Maintain an audit reporting framework that produces artifacts which support security and compliance needs.
* Identify non-compliant and ineffective security processes and controls including those of critical third parties and prioritize actions associated with risk management and continuous improvement activities.
* Assess suppliers and service providers identifying third party risks using a standard information gathering questionnaire.
* Provide management and support of security testing to ensure that controls are adequate to meet legal, regulatory, policy, standards and security requirements.
* Maintain current knowledge of the Information security field and the changing threat landscape while implementing improvements in both technical security and compliance domains mitigating risks identified as part of the risk management process.
* Report on ISMS performance, incidents, and audit findings to senior leadership.

  

**You're the right fit if:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Information Security, Computer Science, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Professional certifications such as CISM, CISSP, ISO 27001 Lead Implementer/Auditor, or HITRUST Certified.
* Experience with: Platform Security, Cloud Computing Security, Data Security, Network Security, Security Assessment, Security Governance, Computer Security Incident Response and Security Compliance Audit.
* Strong relationship building and influence skills balance with vision and ability to innovate.
* Minimum 5 years of experience in information security (and/or related functions i.e IT audit, IT Risk Management), with at least 2 years in ISMS management.
* Strong understanding of healthcare regulations and data protection laws.
* Experience with risk management tools, GRC platforms, and audit processes.
* Excellent communication, leadership, and project management skills; Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities
* Hands-on experience in a global high technology security role, preferably a combination of risk management information security, business continuity, and security operations.
* Expertise in technical and business environment, familiarity with national security standards, experience with business continuity, disaster recovery, auditing, risk management, vulnerability assessment and cyber security incident management.
* Fluent in English and Swedish preferred.

**How we work together**  

We believe that we are better together than apart. For our office-based teams, this means working in-person at least 3 days per week.
  

  

**About Philips**  

We are a health technology company. We built our entire company around the belief that every human matters, and we won't stop until everybody everywhere has access to the quality healthcare that we all deserve. Do the work of your life to help the lives of others.
  

* Learn more about our business .
* Discover our rich and exciting history .
* Learn more about our purpose .

If you’re interested in this role and have many, but not all, of the experiences needed, we encourage you to apply. You may still be the right candidate for this or other opportunities at Philips. Learn more about our culture of impact with care here .  

  

#ConnectedCare
