title: SAP BASIS Developer
description:
* Help design, build and continuously improve the clients online platform.
* Research, suggest and implement new technology solutions following best practices/standards.
* Take responsibility for the resiliency and availability of different products.
* Be a productive member of the team.


 Requirements
   

  

* The SAP RISE BASIS Administrator is responsible for managing, operating, and optimizing SAP systems within the RISE with SAP model.
* This role ensures system availability, performance, security, and compliance, while working closely with SAP, hyperscalers, and application teams in a cloud-driven environment.
* Administer SAP systems under RISE with SAP (S/4HANA Private or Public Cloud)
* Act as the primary technical interface between the customer, SAP, and hyperscaler providers (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Monitor system health, availability, and performance against SLA commitments
* Perform core BASIS activities including system start/stop, kernel upgrades, and profile management
* Manage client administration (creation, copy coordination, deletion)
* Configure and monitor Transport Management System (STMS)
* Support SAP NetWeaver, S/4HANA ABAP, and Java stacks
* Manage user administration, roles, and authorizations
* Coordinate with SAP for security patches, SAP Notes, and vulnerability remediation
* Ensure compliance with audit requirements and access reviews
* Plan and coordinate SAP upgrades, support packs, and enhancement packages
* Manage monthly/quarterly patch cycles under RISE governance
* Validate changes in collaboration with functional and testing teams
* Handle BASIS-related incidents and escalations
* Perform root cause analysis for system and performance issues
* Work with SAP support via SAP for Me / ONE Support Launchpad
* Monitor systems using SAP Solution Manager and SAP Cloud ALM
* Track OS-level and database performance metrics
* Proactively optimize system performance and capacity
* Coordinate backups, restores, and disaster recovery activities under RISE scope
* Validate recovery procedures and ensure business continuity readiness
* Maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and runbooks
* Ensure adherence to SAP RISE standards and best practices
* Hands-on experience with RISE with SAP environments
* Strong understanding of S/4HANA architecture and HANA database fundamentals
* Familiarity with cloud concepts (IaaS, SaaS, SLAs)
* Experience working with SAP Support and OSS processes
* Knowledge of ITIL-based incident, problem, and change management
* Strong troubleshooting, coordination, and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to work in cross-functional and vendor-managed environments
* SAP BASIS or SAP S/4HANA certifications
* Experience with SAP Cloud ALM or Solution Manager
* Exposure to hyperscaler platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Prior experience in SAP system migrations or cloud transitions


 Benefits
   

  

* A challenging, innovating environment.
* Opportunities for learning where needed.

title: Solution Architect to SaaS Integrator team | SEB, Solna
description:
*SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.*
**About The Role**
 As a Solution Architect in our SaaS Integrator team, your mission is to onboard, support and coordinate new SaaS and Cloud development implementations.
   

  

**Here’s what you’ll help SEB to achieve:**
* Accelerate SaaS & Cloud Adoption: Enable secure and trusted integrations between SEB and third-party SaaS providers.
* Streamline Implementation: Support technical onboarding, enhance, and maintain Golden Paths to enable scalability.
* Mitigate Risks: Support sourcing of new SaaS with standardised requirements, capabilities, and processes.


**Your Key Responsibilities, but not limited to:**
* Be part of a small team of subject matter experts working cross-functionally with the main purpose of onboarding new SaaS and Cloud initiatives using existing and developing new tools.
* Coordinating technical capabilities such as Customer Managed Key (CMK), Single Sign-on (SSO) implementations etc, and actively supporting alignment with SEB’s strategies, guidelines, directives, and policies.
* Advise SaaS Initiatives early on during third-party evaluations.
* Advise Cloud Initiatives during their development phase.


**To thrive and succeed in this role, You:**
* Have several years in cloud engineering and relevant experience of AWS, GCP and/or Azure, alongside a recent Cloud certification.
* Have general knowledge of application development, operations and life cycle management.
* Have solid experience of working with IT infrastructure in hybrid environments.
* Have proven experience in stakeholder management & successful project delivery.
* Are structured, organized, and focused on delivering business value.
* Have a problem-solving mindset and a curious mind.
* Have experience in agile ways of working.
* Possess strong communication skills, both written and verbal, and fluency in both Swedish and English.


**What we offer:**
* Work-life balance.
* Extensive learning opportunities.
* Attractive compensation and access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits.
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views.
* Remote working possibilities and flexible work schedule.


**Ready to take the next step on your career journey?**
 Welcome to our inclusive culture, where our shared values inspire and uplift our team. We celebrate diversity and strive to ensure every employee feels seen, heard, and valued.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than
 **30th of April 2026.** 
 If you have questions about the position, please contact Anna Mononen, Team Manager by e-mail anna.mononen@seb.se
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB here: www.sebgroup.com/techcareers

title: SALES DIRECTOR – INDUSTRY, Mobility & Medtech
description:
Sales Director - Medtech, Mobility & Industry till NOTE
 




 NOTE söker en erfaren och affärsdriven ledare inom Business Development med inslag av Strategic Account Management som vill driva tillväxt i våra prioriterade segment: Medtech, Mobility och Industry. Du har lång erfarenhet från kommersiella roller inom industri, teknik eller tillverkning och en dokumenterad förmåga att vinna komplexa affärer, etablerade branschkontakter inom industrial/medtech/mobility och en förmåga att utveckla strategiska kundrelationer samt skapa lönsam tillväxt regionalt och internationellt. Du är van att driva teamarbete i matrisorganisationer med ansvar för funktionell styrning av medarbetare.
 



 Rollen är central i NOTE:s kommersiella strategi och innebär stort eget ansvar, tydligt resultatmandat och nära samarbete med produkt, teknik och tillverkning. Du rapporterar till Chief Sales & Marketing Officer.
 




 Vem är du?
 




 Du är en senior, affärsorienterad och strategisk relationsbyggare som är trygg i dialogen med ledningsgrupper och inköps/R&D organisationer. Du driver affärer från idé till långsiktigt partnerskap, arbetar strukturerat och har lätt att mobilisera interna team för att leverera konkurrenskraftiga lösningar. Du trivs i en roll där operativt säljarbete ute hos kund kombineras med långsiktig kommersiell utveckling. Erfarenhet av att leda personer från olika funktioner i en matrisorganisation är meriterande.
 




 Erfarenhet & kompetens
 



* Minst 12 års B2B-erfarenhet inom industri, teknik, medtech eller tillverkning, varav minst 8 år inom försäljning
* Etablerade branschkontakter inom industrial/medtech/mobility
* Dokumenterad framgång i komplex affärsförsäljning med flera intressenter och långa säljcykler samt analytisk förmåga att utvärdera kostnad och produktions kedjor
* Gedigen erfarenhet av strategisk kundutveckling samt nykundsbearbetning
* Förmåga att äga och driva hela affärsprocessen – från prospekt till avtal och vidareutveckling
* Erfarenhet av att leda interdisciplinära team funktionellt
* Kommersiell och teknisk förståelse som möjliggör värdeskapande kundlösningar
* Erfarenhet av upphandlingar, ramavtal och kundplaner
* Mycket god svenska och engelska




 Utbildning
 



* Akademisk examen inom teknik eller ekonomi




 Meriterande
 



* Erfarenhet från kontraktstillverkning/EMS eller närliggande segment
* Förståelse för regulatoriska krav i medtech/industriella verksamheter
* God analytisk förmåga samt vana vid Excel och PowerPoint för affärscase och dataanalys, gärna med stöd av AI




 Dina ansvarsområden
 



* Driva tillväxt i dina segment genom nykundsbearbetning och utveckling av befintliga strategiska konton
* Leda hela försäljningsprocessen och säkerställa konkurrenskraftiga, värdeskapande erbjudanden
* Utveckla och implementera kundstrategier och segmentplaner
* Leda komplexa affärer med flera intressenter och beslutskedjor
* Arbeta strukturerat med kundplaner, upphandlingar, offerter och avtal
* Samordna interna resurser (produkt, teknik, tillverkning) för hög leveransprecision och lönsamhet
* Aktivt bidra till NOTE:s kommersiella strategi och marknadsposition




 Om NOTE AB
 




 NOTE är en av Nordens ledande aktörer inom avancerad elektroniktillverkning – ett bolag för dig som vill vara med och driva teknik som faktiskt gör skillnad. Som noterat Mid Cap‑bolag på Nasdaq Stockholm kombinerar vi stabilitet och finansiell styrka med en stark tillväxtresa och ett entreprenöriellt driv.
 



 Med en omsättning på ca 4,5 miljarder SEK, 1 500+ medarbetare och moderna fabriker på cirka 14 orter fördelat i Sverige, Finland, Estland, Litauen, England och Kina, är NOTE en viktig partner till kunder inom medtech, industrial, mobility, telekom, defence och greentech. Ett internationellt bolag med svenska rötter och värderingar. Vi är djupt integrerade i våra kunders utvecklingsarbete – från prototyp och industrialisering till serieproduktion och eftermarknad.
 



 Hos NOTE får du arbeta nära teknikdrivna bolag som utvecklar produkter för en mer hållbar, säker och effektiv värld. Du blir en del av en kultur som präglas av professionalism, snabba beslutsvägar, höga ambitioner och ett genuint engagemang för kvalitet och kundvärde.
 



 På NOTE får du inte bara göra ett jobb – du får påverka riktningen för ett bolag, en bransch och våra kunders innovationer och vara del i den fortsatta tillväxtresan.
 



 Läs mer: www.note-ems.com
 




 Om tjänsten
 




 Tjänsten är på heltid med placering på huvudkontoret i centrala Stockholm, alternativt i Göteborg. I tjänsten ingår resor såväl inom Norden som internationellt.
 



 Låter detta intressant? Välkommen med din ansökan!
 




 Ansökan & kontakt
 




 I denna rekrytering samarbetar vi med Conpassio Executive Search & Interim. För mer information om rollen är du välkommen att kontakta Christos Voglis, christos.voglis@conpassio.com eller Ulrika Kjellberg, ulrika.kjellberg@conpassio.com.
 



 Vi arbetar med löpande urval, så vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan.

title: Head of Service Delivery Guarding
description:
Avarn Security är den kompletta säkerhetsaktören för privat och offentlig verksamhet. Varje dag, året runt, bidrar våra 8 000 medarbetare till att skapa ett tryggare samhälle. Du möter oss i kollektivtrafiken, parker, köpcentrum, stadsdelsförvaltningar, bostadsområden, på museum, samhällsviktiga anläggningar, flygplatser, kontor, arenor och sjukhus. Som medarbetare på Avarn Security AB bidrar du till att förverkliga vår vision – säkerhet och ansvarstagande i världsklass. Gemensamt för oss som jobbar på Avarn Security är att vi bygger förtroende genom ansvar, omtanke och samarbete.
   

  

**Avarn Security söker nu en Head of Service Delivery (HSD)**
 Avarn Security levererar högkvalitativa säkerhetstjänster till både den privata och offentliga marknaden. Som HSD Guarding kommer du ansvara för att övergripande säkerställa att våra tjänster inom Bevakningsverksamheten som har över 7 000 anställda, levereras enligt avtal till våra kunder, med fokus på kundnöjdhet och operativ effektivitet.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga Arbetsuppgifter**
 Som HSD får du en nyckelroll där du följer upp och analyserar leveransen av våra tjänster till kunder. Du säkerställer tillsammans med våra chefer att vi levererar enligt avtal. Du ser till att våra kundavtal efterlevs, att processer fungerar smidigt och att både interna team och kunder känner sig trygga genom hela leveransen.
   

  

 Du deltar i och leder olika projekt och team samt koordinerar aktiviteter för att säkerställa att tjänster levereras korrekt och i tid. Du ansvarar även för utvalda underleverantörer, följer upp och säkerställer deras leverans och kvalitet gentemot kund. Att bygga och upprätthålla starka relationer med utvalda kunder är ett naturligt inslag i tjänsten där kundbehov och eventuella utmaningar identifieras och hanteras snabbt och lösningsorienterat. Du bidrar med operativ och kommersiell analys och arbetar med uppföljning av SLA:er och nyckeltal för att förstå kvaliteten i vår leverans och identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter som driver både effektivitet och kundnöjdhet framåt.
   

  

 I rollen ingår också att analysera kostnadsdrivare och resultat på kundnivå och med hjälp av datadrivna beslut bidra till ökad kostnadskontroll och lönsamhet. Det här är en roll där din förmåga att kombinera gott ledarskap, affärsmannaskap samt problemlösning verkligen kommer till sin rätt.
   

  

**Vem söker vi?**
 Vi söker dig som trivs med ansvar och möjligheten att göra skillnad i vardagen. Du har sannolikt en utbildning på högskolenivå och en naturlig förmåga att snabbt se samband, identifiera avvikelser och hitta hållbara lösningar. Med din erfarenhet av kunddialoger och din analytiska skärpa och goda ekonomiska förståelse kan du bedöma situationer ur flera perspektiv och bidra till utvecklingen av våra arbetssätt och leveranskvalitet. Har du dessutom erfarenhet av tekniska arbetsverktyg inom våra tjänsteområden är det en stor fördel. Du är trygg i att leda och inspirera andra.
   

  

 Du är en person som drivs av förbättringsarbete, som gärna tar initiativ och bidrar med nya perspektiv. Du uppskattar att både arbeta självständigt och samarbeta i team. Ett högt säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetande är en grundförutsättning i rollen.
   

  

**Personliga Egenskaper Som Vi Söker**
* Förmåga att ta initiativ och driva förändringsarbete
* Strukturerad men också anpassningsbar till ständiga förändringar
* Självgående med god analytisk förmåga
* Goda ledaregenskaper med mycket god ekonomisk förståelse


 Som HSD samarbetar du nära Bevakningsverksamhetens chefer och medarbetare men även kollegor inom andra verksamhetsområden och funktioner inom koncernen. Du kommer ingå i den strategiska ledningsgruppen för bevakning och rapportera till Guarding Director.
   

  

**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 Som kollega på Avarn Security erbjuds du ett flexibelt och självständigt arbete med stor egenpåverkan på planering och genomförande av ditt arbete. Du kommer att ha din placering i Stockholm men med stor möjlighet att planera dina resor och arbete på egen hand.
   

  

 Du kommer vara en del av ett stort företag med brett utbud av förmåner och erbjudanden för att säkerställa en kvalitativ och hållbar arbetsmiljö och som exempel erbjuds du ett års fri inkomst- sjukvårds- och barnförsäkring. Självfallet erbjuder vi friskvårdsbidrag och förtroendearbetstid. Förmånsbil ingår också i befattningen och B-körkort är därför ett krav. Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med start enligt överenskommelse. Provanställning tillämpas. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Vi är den kompletta säkerhetsaktören på marknaden vilket möjliggör att vi är ledande i branschen för våra kunder samt att det finns goda utvecklingsmöjligheter för dig som medarbetare.
   

  

 För att kunna anställas inom Avarn Security AB krävs att du blir godkänd av Länsstyrelsen för anställning i ett auktoriserat bevakningsföretag, i enlighet med Lag (1974:191) om bevakningsföretag. Ansökan till Länsstyrelsen hanteras av Avarn Security. Till denna befattning kommer även säkerhetsprövning enligt Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) bli aktuell. För att kunna utreda och bedöma om du uppfyller kraven enligt respektive lagstiftning genomförs en bakgrundskontroll. Denna bedömning omfattar laglydnad, lämplighet, pålitlighet, lojalitet samt eventuella sårbarheter. Uppgifter som inhämtas kan komma från dig själv, från öppna källor eller från myndigheter. Vid prövning av lämplighet för en tjänst tillämpar vi alltid en helhetsbedömning.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan! Urval sker löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan snarast möjligt - dock senast 2026-05-04 - sök tjänsten via vår hemsida - ej via mejl. Tester samt säkerhetsprövning kommer att tillämpas i rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

 Vi värdesätter mångfald och inkludering och arbetar aktivt för en mer jämställd arbetsmiljö. Då kvinnor är underrepresenterade inom vår bransch ser vi gärna fler ansökningar från kvinnor, men självklart välkomnar vi alla kvalificerade kandidater oavsett kön.
   

  

 Arbetstider: Heltid
   

  

 Tjänsteställe: Placeringsort Stockholm men då våra kunder finns över hela landet är resor en naturlig del av tjänsten.

title: Kundorienterad Infrastrukturspecialist (M365)
description:
Vi söker dig som inte bara ser teknik som ett jobb, utan som en möjlighet att skapa värde. Din främsta styrka är ditt starka inre driv; du väntar inte på instruktioner, utan ser vad som behöver göras och tar egna initiativ för att komma i mål. Du trivs med att ha mycket under eget ansvar och har en naturlig förmåga att planera och strukturera ditt arbete, även när tempot växlar.
   

  

 Eftersom teknikutvecklingen aldrig står stilla, letar vi efter en person som drivs av en genuin nyfikenhet. Du har en stark vilja att hela tiden lära dig nya verktyg och metoder för att ligga steget före. Som person är du trygg och kommunikativ – du förklarar tekniska lösningar på ett begripligt sätt och bygger förtroende i dialog med både kollegor och kunder.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har god vana av moderna IT-miljöer. Det är dessutom ett stort plus om du har med dig något av följande i bagaget:
   

  

* Molnfokus: Du har kommit i kontakt med Azure och känner dig bekväm med att navigera i molnbaserade ekosystem.
* Identitetshantering: Du har erfarenhet av, eller ett stort intresse för, Microsoft Entra ID (tidigare Azure AD).
* Konsultmässighet: Du har tidigare arbetat i en kundnära roll eller som konsult och förstår vikten av att leverera hög servicekvalitet.
* Ordning och reda: Du ser värdet i god dokumentation och förstår att en smidig överlämning är nyckeln till ett lyckat projekt.


**Tekniska kompetenskrav:**
* Microsoft 365 & Modern Workplace Vi söker dig som har praktisk erfarenhet av att driva och genomföra tekniska projekt inom Microsofts ekosystem, med särskilt fokus på:
* Tenant-migreringar: Erfarenhet av Tenant-to-tenant-migreringar, inklusive flytt av användare, e-post, Teams och OneDrive.
* Endpoint Management (Intune): Praktisk vana av Intune-projekt, innefattande enhetsregistrering (Windows/iOS/Android) samt konfiguration av policies, compliance och applikationshantering.
* Säkerhet & Identitet: Implementering av säkerhetshöjande åtgärder såsom Conditional Access, MFA och efterlevnad av M365 Security Best Practices.
* Infrastruktur & Hybridmiljöer Du har en stabil teknisk grund och känner dig hemma i både fysiska och virtuella miljöer:
* Server & Virtualisering: God kompetens inom serverdrift i virtuella miljöer (exempelvis Hyper-V eller VMware) samt klassiska on-prem-miljöer.
* Hybridlösningar: En god förståelse för hur Microsoft 365 samverkar med lokal infrastruktur i hybridkonfigurationer.
* Nätverk: Grundläggande kunskaper inom TCP/IP, DNS, routing och brandväggar, samt förståelse för nätverkets kritiska roll i moderna moln- och hybridmiljöer.


**💚 Humanit**
 Humanit handlar om att göra saker lite annorlunda, att på riktigt sätta våra anställda i fokus. Vi växer tillsammans och värdesätter engagemang och ambition. För oss är det viktigt att du får chansen att vara med och påverka vägen framåt.
   

  

 I utbyte erbjuder vi kompetens- och karriärutveckling genom varierande och utmanande uppdrag. Vi är inte branschinriktade och kan därför erbjuda en fantastisk variation bland uppdragen för dig som konsult. Självklart ser vi till att du får rätt utbildning och vi är väl medvetna om att det är det livslånga lärandet som bygger vår framgång.
   

  

 Tillsammans skapar vi framtiden 🚀
   

  

* Tillsvidareanställning med fast månadslön
* Kollektivavtal
* Vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning, inklusive maxat friskvårdsbidrag
* Utvecklingsplan
* Hälsoförsäkring + pension
* Förskottssemester


**Start** 
 : Omgående med hänsyn till uppsägningstid och när säkerhetskontroll är genomförd. Uppdraget är på heltid och är tillsvidare.
   

  

**Plats** 
 : Stockholm
   

  

**Ansökan** 
 : Vi rekryterar löpande. Så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

*Humanit arbetar tillsammans med Great Place To Work för att vi skall bli Sveriges bästa arbetsplats.*
**Och förresten:**
*Som en aktiv del i ett samhälle med kulturell och social mångfald är Humanit’s ambition att präglas av inkludering och bred representation, samt vara en arbetsplats med lika möjligheter för alla. Humanit anställer, bibehåller, befordrar och i övrigt behandlar alla medarbetare och kandidater efter erfarenhet, kvalifikationer och kompetens, oavsett kön, religion, ursprung, ålder, sexuell läggning, könsidentitet eller funktionsvariationer.*

title: Content Creator
description:
Content Creator – Hotel C Stockholm
   

  

 Är du en kreativ själ med erfarenhet av foto, film och design – och vill arbeta brett med content i en inspirerande miljö? Nu söker vi en Content Creator till Hotel C Stockholm och ICEBAR Stockholm.
   

  

 I denna roll blir du en nyckelperson i vår marknadsföring, med fokus på produktion av innehåll. Vi söker dig som är idérik, självgående och har ett starkt öga för form, färg och storytelling – och som vill vara med och skapa innehåll som engagerar, inspirerar och stärker vårt varumärke.
   

  

 Om oss
   

  

 Hotel C Stockholm är det folkliga, festliga och familjära hotellet mitt i smeten. Hos oss är ingenting krångligt – vår kommunikation ska vara lika enkel att förstå och lätt att älska som hotellet självt.
   

  

 Med 367 hotellrum, en nyrenoverad konferensvåning, restaurang Swede Hollow och ett unikt samarbete med ICEHOTEL i Jukkasjärvi, genom vilket vi driver ICEBAR Stockholm, finns det gott om content att skapa för dig som antar utmaningen. Tycker du det verkar skoj att vara med och sprida vår varma, personliga och lekfulla röst – och göra Hotel C ännu mer älskat? Fortsätt läs!
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Det här är en operativ och kreativ roll med stort fokus på contentproduktion. Du ansvarar för att skapa material till våra kanaler – från idé till färdig leverans. Du kommer att arbeta nära både marknadschef, avdelningschefer och centrala marknadsfunktioner inom Strawberry. Det innebär en varierad vardag där du rör dig mellan olika delar av verksamheten och snabbt får en bred förståelse för både varumärke och drift.
   

  

 På C har vi en varm och snäll kultur där vi tror på frihet under ansvar, korta beslutsvägar och en miljö där idéer snabbt kan bli verklighet.
   

  

**Du Lyckas i Rollen När Du**
* Skapar engagerande innehåll i form av foto, video, design och text som stärker varumärket och konvertering
* Driver produktion från idé till leverans – för sociala medier, nyhetsbrev, kampanjer, e-post samt digitalt och tryckt material
* Säkerställer en konsekvent tonalitet och visuell identitet
* Anpassar innehåll efter målgrupp
* Tar initiativ, höjer den kreativa nivån, är flexibel och samarbetar smidigt med andra


 Det finns goda möjligheter att växa i rollen över tid. Ambitionen är att detta ska vara en långsiktig tjänst där du successivt kan ta ett större ansvar och utvecklas tillsammans med oss.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Har erfarenhet av fotografering, redigering samt enklare rörligt material/video
* Är trygg i verktyg som Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Premiere Pro, LightRoom, InDesign eller liknande)
* Har ett starkt visuellt öga och känsla för storytelling
* Är självgående, flexibel, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
* Trivs i en kreativ och snabbfotad miljö
* Är flytande i svenska och engelska


 Vad vi erbjuder
   

  

 Som heltidsanställd hos Hotel C Stockholm blir du en del av Strawberry och Nordic Hotels & Resorts med tillgång till en rad fina förmåner.
   

  

* En kreativ och varm arbetsmiljö där dina idéer får ta plats
* En varierad roll med högt tempo där ingen dag är den andra lik
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Fyra fria hotellnätter per år inom Strawberry
* Personalpriser på hotell och restauranger inom Strawberry


 Praktisk information
   

  

* Tillsvidareanställning (heltid) med 6 månaders provanställning
* Tjänsten är helt på plats på Hotel C Stockholm (vid Stockholm Centralstation)
* Du rapporterar till marknadschef
* Tillträde enligt överenskommelse


 Ansökan
   

  

 Låter det här som något för dig? Skicka in ditt CV, en kort presentation (personligt brev) och gärna också portfolio. Vid frågor, kontakta ida.sundstedt@hotelcstockholm.se.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! ✨

title: Nordics Sales Development Representative
description:
**Sales Development Representative – Nordics**
 London, Copenhagen, Aarhus, Stockholm or Oslo
   

  

**Puzzel: The Low-Down 🔍**
 Puzzel is a leading provider of cloud-based contact centre solutions, empowering businesses to deliver exceptional customer service. Our platform combines omnichannel contact centre, workforce management, and AI-driven analytics to optimize customer interactions and operational efficiency.
   

  

 With 25 years’ experience since our foundation in Norway, we’re already #1 in the Nordics; growing rapidly in the UK and we are already seeing some great success in the Netherlands since opening the entity in mid-2024, but our ambition is to become the clear European market-leader in the coming years 🚀
   

  

**Why we’re proud**
* Recognised as an Innovation and Growth Leader in the 2025 EMEA Customer Experience Platforms Frost Radar
* 2024 CX Awards Winner, ‘Best Mid-Market Contact Center Platform’
* Puzzel was recognised as the 'most innovative European-founded CCaaS provider' and top 3 globally by Frost & Sullivan in 2023
* Best Practices Company of the Year 2023
* Consistently high Glassdoor rating
* Puzzel places high importance on work-life balance and flexible working hours - as recognised by Flexa, placing 16th overall for work:life balance in 2025!
* We are working with Mercer on salary benchmarking, to ensure pay equality and market competitiveness


 Read more about us
 *here* 
 .
   

  

**What You'll Do 🏡💻**
 Due to internal promotion, we are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) who will support our existing team of 3 Account Executives, by partnering with them to map the market, understand target companies and buyer personas, and hopefully convert cold outreach into genuine interest from companies who are viable Puzzel customers.
   

  

**You Will**
* Engage with potential business customers through a variety of channels like LinkedIn, Phone, Email + other automated outreach tools to gain their initial interest and book demos for the Sales Executives, who will then go into more detail and hopefully close the deal!
* Learn how to sell AI driven technology
* MEDDPICC (Metrics, Identified Pain and Identifying Potential Champion) qualification combined with Challenger Sales methodology, to ensure that the prospects you are engaging with have the potential to convert into a closed deal.
* Understand our ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) and Go-To-Market strategy, to ensure you are targeting the right prospects.
* Partner closely with Sales Executives to create joint account plans, product demonstrations and close revenue for the company.
* Collaborate with Marketing to nurture leads through events, industry reports and outbound content.
* You should be a driven and confident individual, willing to learn from your setbacks. Previous B2B experience including outbound cold-calling is a must for this hire, even if not purely in a BDR/SDR role.
* You must be resilient and target and/or money motivated, but the rewards are plentiful, as is the opportunity for career development.


**The must haves 💪**
* You must have native-level fluency in Danish, Swedish or Norwegian + proficiency in English
* Driven, money-motivated and intelligent
* Commercial experience in a b2b setting, with experience and proven success in cold-calling and prospecting.


**The nice to haves ➕➕➕**
* CCaaS, CX or relatable SaaS industry experience
* SDR/BDR/Outbound B2B Sales experience
* Co-piloting SDR AI agents or AI platforms
* Gong or other cadence management systems
* Clay Hunter or similar scraping tools
* Salesforce
* LinkedIn Sales Navigator


 We will, however, consider those with limited experience with the right attitude and traits
 **.**
**Location 🌍**
 This role can be based in London, Copenhagen, Aarhus, Stockholm or Oslo, with expectation of 2-3 days/ week in the office.
   

  

**What’s In it for You? 💰**
* Competitive salary + (uncapped) commission.
* Flexible, hybrid approach to working; split your time between the office and home
* You get to be part of a fun, driven and supportive team
* Annual Summer and Christmas parties
* Excellent development opportunities and a great company culture


**What to expect from the interview process ❔**
* Screening call with Talent Acquisition
* 1st interview with SDR Director
* 2nd interview with wider commercial/marketing function
* Final panel interview with SDR Director, VP Sales + 1 more


**Puzzel Values 🎯**
* Built on Trust – trust is an intrinsic Nordic value, upon which Puzzel has been built. We trust each other and our customers and partners trust us.
* Stronger Together – working together in a genuinely collaborative way, with a shared purpose, we have an empowered organisation that is better equipped to delight customers and partners.
* Stay Hungry – have a continuous hunger to raise our game, innovate and be the best we can be professionally.


**Diversity & Inclusion 🌍**
 We want everyone at Puzzel to be their true, authentic selves at work irrespective of nationality, race, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical ability, age, or economic background.
   

  

 Whilst we are proud to already have a diverse workforce from across the globe, we are aware that things could always be improved – for example, we currently have a ratio of female 26:74 male employees, which whilst not uncommon for the tech industry (average in SaaS is 26% female), it’s far from ideal. So, what are we doing to improve this?
   

  

* Our Global Leadership Team (C-suite) has shifted from 100% male at the start of 2023 to 4 men: 5 women.
* We have increased our % of female hires from 23.6% in 2021 to 38.5% in 2023 and 41% in 2024!
* We are partnering with the likes of Flexa, who have significantly higher-than-average talent pools of candidates from diverse backgrounds.
* We are working with State Employment initiatives in Norway and Sweden to bring candidates through internship/apprenticeship routes and are investigating similar initiatives in the UK and Bulgaria.
* By raising awareness and transparency, we are hoping to further attract a diverse workforce.


 We are continuously striving to foster an inclusive and diverse environment, where everyone is celebrated for who they are. If there is anything we can do to support you in the interview process, or beyond, please let us know.
   

  

**One Last Thing ☝🏻**
 Even if you feel you are only a 75% match for this role, we still want to hear from you. This list is purely indicative. Skills can always be learnt.
   

  

 Please note that we are not able to provide sponsorship for this role, so you must have eligibility to work in the country you are applying for.
   

  

*By applying you accept the terms of our Privacy Notice which can be found on our website. Puzzel are not considering candidates that do not have a work permit in the country we are hiring in.*

title: Director, Product Operations
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 175,000 businesses - including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others - rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 



 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 



 At Sinch we "Dream Big", "Win Together", "Keep it simple", and "Make it Happen". These values are our foundation!
 



**Description**
 We are looking for a strategic and hands-on Director, Product Operations, to build and lead the Product Operations function at the heart of our product organization. Your mission is to systematize our product development lifecycle and enable our product teams to better serve our customers and markets with innovative and valuable products, delivered at speed.
 



 You will be a key driver in our transformation into a product-centric organization, establishing the processes, systems, and best practices needed to scale effectively, in collaboration with key stakeholders.
 



 This is a high-impact role to level up our operational maturity, empower our people and teams, and enable growth and speed. You'll have an inspiring and challenging mission and contribute to levelling up our capabilities.
 



**Responsibilities:**
 \* Build, lead, and nurture a high-performing Product Operations team, and establish and improve core functions including e.g. Processes, Pricing, Tooling, Product Analytics, and Project Management.
   

 \* Improve our engine by strengthening our product development and operations processes to ensure they are efficient, effective, and scalable.
   

 \* Drive transformation to accelerate our adoption of a modern product culture and an AI-native mindset in an empowered, outcome-driven setting, in close collaboration with product leadership and other stakeholders.
   

 \* Enable improved business agility, customer focus, and how to accelerate sustainable and continuous growth. This could e.g. be in the shape of processes, frameworks, and decision-support tools.
   

 \* Define and own our tooling stack, core processes, and workflows, incl. budget. Select the right tools and automation for the job, drive adoption, and provide a smooth and effective experience for our teams.
   

 \* Provide process and execution frameworks for product discovery, planning, and delivery that span multiple teams and functions. This could e.g. be in the shape of project and planning management, or GTM readiness motions, in collaboration with stakeholders.
 



 This role is based at SINCH HQ in Stockholm, Sweden and reports to the Chief of Staff for Product.
 



**Requirements:**
 \* You have 10+ years of relevant experience in Product Operations and/or digital Product Development from a global technology organization.
   

 \* Experience leading and building high performing teams, ideally in a hybrid and multi-cultural environment. You are a collaborative and humble leader who leads through inclusion, engagement, and transparency. You have the courage to challenge the status quo while actively listening and learning from others.
   

 \* Experience driving change and transformation in a large-scale, global technology organization, ideally one that has undergone a transformation towards a product-led operating model, while rapidly growing. You have a strong instinct for what is required to succeed in a fast-growing and competitive marketplace, and you embrace and leverage modern technologies and methodologies to accelerate outcomes.
   

 \* Proven understanding of modern product development methodologies and expertise in designing and implementing scalable operational systems and processes that are fit-for-purpose.
   

 \* You are pragmatic and resilient with a positive, can-do attitude, a growth mindset, and a genuine passion for collaborating with others.
   

 \* Fluency in English, both spoken and written.
 



 Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English.
 



 At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. We are not supporting relocation at this time.
 



 Applicants must:
   

 \* Hold Swedish or EU/EEA citizenship.
   

 \* Have a valid Swedish work permit.
 



**Our hiring process**
 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 



 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Security Engineer, Proactive Security - Infrastructure and Cloud
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 At Wolt, as a part of Doordash, we’re building the industry’s most scalable and reliable delivery platform to support our three-sided marketplace of consumers, merchants, and courier partners.
   

  

 What makes our team unique
   

  

* Our global Security team aspires to be the world’s most admired security team, with members across EU, UK and North America (operating as Wolt, Deliveroo and Doordash).
* We’re shaping our next generation infrastructure that is hardened from the ground up. This is a rare opportunity - no legacy tech or off-the-shelf product solutions. There is a lot to do around this new development as well as our “classic” platforms of the three companies.
* The greater team is not just information security - we’re more holistic, and also physical security and safety are a part of our global operations.


 Day-to-day in this role you’ll:
   

  

* Identify and prioritize risk-reducing and engineering-enabling improvements, and then implement and build them, for our infrastructure and cloud security. This may involve the cloud, access controls, the management plane, or just about any other part of infrastructure we have, across any of our platforms. Implementation and building may range from configuring services as infrastructure as code to actual coding of new features.
* Solve security-related questions and implement requests related to our infrastructure security, including reactive fixes related to vulnerabilities or design flaws.
* Guide our engineering teams related to security, privacy and technical compliance.


 Over time, your role can evolve depending on your interests and skills. Our company is a large place and there’s a lot to do!
   

  

 This position is ideal for someone who would describe themselves as a cloud sysadmin, having an SRE role, or being a DevOps engineer. You are likely to have at least 5 years of full-time experience working in information technology.
   

  

 As the Security team sometimes needs to address high-priority security issues as well as ensure the availability of the components we have built, this position includes an on-call duty. On-call compensation and terms will be agreed separately in accordance with the local employment law.
   

  

 Our humble expectations
   

  

* Have hands-on experience with AWS, Kubernetes and how modern microservice architectures work. This is a “must” requirement.
* Are quick to form good working relationships with engineers who are building our platforms, as well as their engineering and product management.
* Are quick to learn nuances in a wide variety of additional services that relate to running a low-latency, high-availability infrastructure.
* Are fluent in at least one programming language, even if this comes from a hobby background.
* Have a strong work ethic, are organized and follow things through.
* Can communicate clearly and provide good visibility to issues as they progress.
* Can see through issues that have many aspects and different - often also non-technical and business-related - considerations.
* Are not scared of submitting and reviewing Pull Requests.
* And as Wolt’s company language is English, you’d need to be fluent in both spoken and written English.


 This position is open in our Wolt hubs in Berlin, Germany, or Helsinki, Finland, and will be a part of the Global Security Engineering team.
   

  

 Next steps
   

  

 The position will be filled as soon as we find the right person, so make sure to apply as soon as you realize you really want to join us!
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Security Compliance Manager – Nexus Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**Security Compliance Manager – Nexus Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)**
**Introduction**
 We are looking for a Security Compliance Manager to strengthen our security governance, regulatory compliance efforts, and customer‑driven security assurance within Nexus. In this role, you will work closely with product, delivery, sales, customer and central GRC teams to ensure adherence to regulatory frameworks, customer requirements, and corporate policies.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Regulatory & Customer Compliance**
* Coordinate compliance activities for DORA, NIS2 and customer‑specific frameworks.
* Ensure internal teams implement required controls and follow compliance obligations.
* Track compliance status, deviations and corrective actions.
* Participate in Indtech security and compliance forums.


**Security Documentation, RFI/RFP Support & Bid Reviews**
* Provide security documentation for RFI/RFP processes.
* Conduct security reviews of bids.
* Collaborate with sales and product teams on security requirements.


**Audit Management (ISO, ISAE, Customer Audits)**
* Support ISO 27001, ISAE 3402 and customer audits.
* Prepare audit evidence and track findings.
* Ensure findings are closed with responsible teams.


**Supplier Security & Third‑Party Management**
* Conduct supplier security assessments.
* Follow up supplier documentation and findings.
* Support Sourcing (procurement) in supply chain compliance.


**Procedures, Training & Governance**
* Develop and maintain security procedures and governance documents.
* Conduct internal security and compliance training.
* Maintain policy and control documentation overview.


**Annual Security Plan & Continuous Improvement**
* Maintain the annual security plan.
* Monitor maturity development and compliance performance.
* Identify and drive improvement initiatives.


**Qualification Requirements**
**Education & Experience**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in IT/security/compliance or equivalent experience.
* Experience in security compliance, governance or regulatory frameworks.
* Knowledge of ISO 27001, ISAE 3402, DORA, NIS2.
* Experience in audits and stakeholder management.


**Skills & Competence**
* Strong understanding of information security controls.
* Ability to interpret regulatory and customer requirements.
* Strong communication and documentation skills.
* Structured, analytical and proactive.


**Personal Attributes**
* High integrity and responsibility.
* Independent and solution‑oriented.
* Comfortable working with many stakeholders simultaneously.


**Why Join Us**
 In this role, you will strengthen Nexus’ compliance maturity and work closely with operational, product and corporate teams to ensure trust, transparency and security across the organization.
   

  

**About Indtech Nexus**
 Nexus supports its customers in business process automation by exchanging and sharing business information with their business partners. We have two service areas: Business Information eXchange (BIX) and Multichannel.
   

  

 Nexus has a large existing customer base in the Nordics and is a growing business unit within Tietoevry Industry. With a unique combination of global capabilities and local presence, Nexus currently serves more than 4000 customers in 50+ countries around the world - creating a digital advantage for millions every day.
   

  

**Join us and make your mark!**
 We look forward to your application!
   

  

 Please attach your CV or LinkedIn-profile and we’ll reach out to you. Interviews will be held on a continuous basis, so we encourage you to apply today.
   

  

 If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact Ann Kristin Bøhlum, Head of Data Security & Support, via e-mail ann-kristin.bohlum@tieto.com
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Associate ITIL Problem Process Management Officer - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support.
   

  

 The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for Group Information Systems Directorate (GIS), Core Platforms & Resilience Department (CPR), Platform Engineering & Operations Division (PEO), IT Operations & Service Management Unit (IOSM), at its headquarters in Luxembourg, an
 **Associate** 
****ITIL Problem Process Management Officer\*****
**.**
**This is a full-time temporary position at grade 4.**
**The term of this contract will be** 
**12 months.**
* Internal benchmark Associate Engineer IT Technology & Infrastructure


***Panel interviews are anticipated for June 2026***
 Purpose
   

  

 You will play a key role in strengthening the Bank’s IT resilience by driving modern ITIL practices across our IT organisation. By shaping and championing best‑in‑class IT Service Management processes, you will help ensure the reliability, availability and integrity of the EIB’s information and communication systems supporting our mission with secure and high‑performing technology.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Operations & ITIL Processes Unit, responsible for providing IT services for Operation and Operational Processes.
   

  

 Given the operational risk linked to some processes, it is required that all team members can act as back-up for other team members, both for ITIL and non-ITIL processes.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

**Development and Implementation of ITIL Processes**
* Propose, develop, and enhance IT processes and services within Problem Management under ITIL Process Management.
* Drive the evolution and continuous improvement of the Problem Management process.
* Actively contribute to process implementation to reduce incident recurrence and improve service stability.


**Strategic Alignment and Project Coordination**
* Steer Problem Management processes towards future objectives in line with IT strategy.
* Coordinate and evaluate strategic and complex projects related to root cause analysis and defect
* Coordinate consultants assigned to projects or major problems, promoting teamwork and collaboration.


**Process Execution and Service Integration**
* Oversee end-to-end execution of the Problem Management process, including proactive and reactive problem handling.
* Integrate best practices and drive continuous performance improvement in root cause analysis.
* Establish, review, and maintain operational methods, procedures, facilities, and tools for problem resolution.


**Expert Advice and Stakeholder Communication**
* Provide advice and recommendations on problem resolution and defect prevention.
* Remain up to date with developments and best practices in Problem Management and ITIL.


**Performance Management and Continuous Improvement**
* Align Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) with Critical Success Factors (CSFs) and Service Level Targets (SLTs) for Problem Management.
* Ensure objectives are achieved through coordination with other ITIL Process Managers.


**Problem Management and Review**
* Maintain and enhance the Problem Management process in collaboration with senior management.
* Identify, initiate, schedule, and conduct problem reviews and root cause analysis sessions.
* Provide guidance to Problem Process Coordinators.


**Audit Management**
* Serve as the single point of contact for all ITSM-related internal and external audit requests concerning Problem Management.
* Coordinate evidence collection, documentation, and responses with process owners and auditors.


**Risk Management**
* Identify, assess, and document operational risks related to recurring incidents and systemic issues.
* Maintain and update risk registers, ensuring effective risk monitoring and mitigation.


**Governance & Continuous Improvement**
* Develop and maintain control frameworks aligned with ITIL best practices for Problem Management.
* Conduct periodic process reviews to ensure ongoing compliance and risk control effectiveness.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in Computer Science, Information Systems or similar relevant fields
* At least 3 years of relevant experience in IT, including experience in working with or leading technical teams in the context of IT Service Management.
* Up-to-date knowledge of market trends and developments in the IT sector, especially ITIL, Cloud, Agile, and DevOps.
* Broad understanding of IT infrastructure, IT applications, and architecture.
* Familiarity with IT infrastructure and BMC Helix would be an advantage.
* ITIL Foundation Certification would be an advantage.
* ITIL Specialist: Create, Deliver & Support certification or similar would be a distinct advantage.
* Experience in working with multicultural project teams.
* Excellent knowledge of English and/or French (\*\*\*), with a good command of the other. (Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage).


 Competencies
   

  

**Find Out More About EIB Core Behavioural Skills Here**
*(\*\*\*) Unless stated explicitly as a required qualification, a good command of French is not a pre-requisite for hire. As both English and French are however official working languages of the EIB, proficiency in both languages is a pre-requisite for your future career development. Any language clause in your contract must be fulfilled in order for you to be eligible for a promotion (either via the annual appraisal cycle or via an internal selection process). Proficiency is understood to mean the attainment of* 
*level 5 of the Inter Institutional language courses, corresponding to B1.2 of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFRL). The Bank offers appropriate training support.*
 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position, you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

 Deadline for applications:
 **9th May 2026**

title: Sr. AI Program Manager
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 175,000 businesses - including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others - rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 







 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 







 At Sinch we "Dream Big", "Win Together", "Keep it simple", and "Make it Happen". These values are our foundation!
 







**Description** 




 We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Sr. AI Program Manager to lead the successful integration and rollout of cutting-edge AI tools within our Technology organization, as well as support the formation of related governance and processes needed for Sinch as a whole.
 







 This pivotal role will be at the forefront of our AI strategy, both within the Technology organization and the broader company, responsible for driving adoption, fostering a culture of innovation, and ensuring the safe and scalable use of artificial intelligence.
 







**Key Responsibilities** 



* Strategy and Execution: Support the formulation and execution of the overarching adoption and rollout strategy for AI tools and technologies across the organization.
* AI Champions Program: Continue to evolve and manage our AI Champions program to educate employees, foster innovation, and inform the strategic rollout of new AI tools.
* Community Facilitation: Facilitate engaging AI Champion sharing sessions and manage communication channels (e.g., Slack) to encourage knowledge sharing and collaboration.
* Governance and Financial Operations: Partner with Finance, Security, and IT to define and evolve governance, financial processes, and policies for AI usage, including cost allocation and capitalization.
* User Enablement: Identify common user profiles within the organization and create comprehensive documentation detailing suggested AI tools and best practices to accelerate onboarding and adoption for new users.
* Platform Management: Own and manage user access for the Technology department in our key AI tool platforms, including Cursor, Claude, and future platforms.







 The role is based at SINCH HQ in Stockholm, Sweden and reports to the Chief of Staff in the Technology organization.
 











**Requirements:** 




 To be successful in the role you are a strategic thinker with a passion for technology and a proven ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams, including security, data, IT, legal, and finance, to establish robust AI governance and processes.
 






* Proven experience in program or project management, particularly in technology adoption, change management, or digital transformation capacity, from a global complex organization.
* Strong understanding of AI concepts, tools, and the overall landscape of artificial intelligence.
* Experience in user lifecycle management for enterprise software platforms.
* Demonstrated ability to work effectively with diverse, cross-functional teams, including technical and non-technical stakeholders from Security, Legal, and Finance.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and facilitation skills, with experience in community management being a plus.
* A strategic mindset with the ability to translate high-level goals into actionable execution plans.







 Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English.
 







 At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation at this time.
 







 Applicants must:
 


* Hold Swedish or EU/EEA citizenship.
* Have a valid Swedish work permit.







**Our hiring process** 




 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 



 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Senior Full stack Engineer – B2B SaaS (New Platform Build)** 




  





 We’re working with a
 **profitable, product-led SaaS company** 
 in the B2B logistics space that is entering a major
 **“2.0” growth phase** 
 . The business has thousands of active customers, strong organic revenue, and long-standing partnerships with major international shipping and freight providers.
 



  





 They are now building a
 **brand-new platform from scratch** 
 , scheduled to launch later this year, and have paused feature development on their existing (already profitable) system to fully focus on the new build. This is a rare opportunity to join an
 **early-stage platform rebuild** 
 within a financially stable, mature company.
 



  





**The Role** 




 We’re looking for
 **hands-on Senior Full stack Engineers** 
 who enjoy building, owning, and scaling real products. You’ll work closely with product, UX, QA, and fellow engineers, taking responsibility across backend services, APIs, and frontend delivery.
 



  





 The product is
 **backend-heavy** 
 , but full stack capability is essential.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Doing** 




  




* Playing a key role in designing and building a brand-new SaaS platform
* Developing scalable backend services using
 **TypeScript and Node.js**
* Designing and implementing
 **REST APIs** 
 for core product functionality
* Contributing to frontend development using modern frameworks
* Collaborating in cross-functional product teams
* Writing automated tests to ensure performance, reliability, and maintainability
* Taking part in technical discussions and influencing engineering best practices
* Working in a fast-paced, pragmatic, delivery-focused environment



  





**Product Teams** 




  





 You’ll join one of several product-focused squads, such as:
 


* **Shipment & Carrier Systems** 
 (booking, pricing, carrier integrations)
* **Integrations & Extensions** 
 (e-commerce platforms, ERPs, customer systems)
* **Frontend & User Access**
* **Payments, Pricing & Billing**



  





 Each team is small, autonomous, and ownership-driven.
 



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* ~7+ years professional software development experience
* Strong experience with
 **JavaScript / TypeScript** 
 (5+ years)
* Solid
 **Node.js** 
 experience (Express or similar)
* Experience building and consuming
 **REST APIs**
* Cloud experience (preferably
 **AWS** 
 )
* Experience with at least one modern frontend framework (React, Vue, Angular, Svelte)
* Experience working with
 **SQL and NoSQL** 
 databases



  





**Nice to have:** 



* CI/CD, Docker, Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, Pulumi, etc.)
* Experience building scalable, secure systems
* Some DevOps / infrastructure exposure



  





**The Kind of Engineer They Want** 



* Self-starting, high-pace, delivery-focused
* Comfortable taking ownership and making decisions
* Someone who can
 **reduce load on tech leads** 
 , not increase it
* Pragmatic builders who enjoy shipping features and improving systems
* Scale-up / product mindset over corporate bureaucracy



  





 They value
 **impact and pace over years on paper** 
 a strong, driven engineer with ~5–7 years in the right environments will outperform someone with 20 years who needs hand-holding.
 



  





**Location & Working Model** 



* Offices in
 **Stockholm** 
 and
 **Jönköping**
* Hybrid preferred
* Open to remote within Sweden for the right person
* English-speaking environment



  





**Package** 



* Permanent role
* Highly Competitive Salary
* Performance-based bonus (company-revenue dependent)
* Standard pension with employer top-up
* Wellness allowance (~4,000 SEK/year)
* 5 weeks’ vacation (negotiable)



  





**Why This Role?** 



* Very stable company with
 **organic growth**
* Profitable product,
 **not VC-dependent**
* Brand-new platform build with huge technical impact
* High ownership, autonomy, and trust
* Tons of feature development and real engineering challenges

title: Senior Fullstack Developer
description:
**Senior Full‑Stack Developers (.NET / Node.js) - Stockholm** 




  





 We’re working with a well‑established consumer‑facing company with a large digital presence and long‑term focus on building a scalable, cloud‑first web platform. As part of continued expansion and future planning, they’re now hiring Senior Full‑Stack Developers to strengthen a core platform team.
 



  





 This is a permanent role in Stockholm, joining experienced teams with strong technical ownership and a modern engineering culture.
 



 📍 Location: Stockholm
 



 🏠 Hybrid: 2 days remote per week
 



  





 💻
 **What you’ll be working on** 




  





 You’ll join a foundational “platform” team responsible for the core services and building blocks that power a large web ecosystem.
 



  





 Rather than working directly on end‑user features, the focus is on:
 


* Building reusable backend and full‑stack components in C#/.NET and Node.js
* Working fully in Azure, with responsibility for deployments and infrastructure
* Developing services and integrations around a CMS‑driven web platform
* Creating scalable, composable solutions (“Lego bricks”) used by multiple frontend teams
* Extending and adapting existing platforms so both developers and content editors can work efficiently
* Influencing architecture, tooling, and technical standards over time



  





 ✅
 **What we’re looking for** 




 Must‑have:
 


* 7+ years’ experience with .NET/C# and/or Node.js
* Experience with Azure, SQL, React, and TypeScript
* Strong DevOps mindset (CI/CD, cloud infrastructure, IaC)
* Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience)
* Fluent Swedish (written and spoken)



**Nice‑to‑have:** 



* Experience with headless or enterprise CMS platforms (e.g. Umbraco)
* TDD, pair/mob programming, or AI / generative AI initiatives
* Infrastructure‑as‑Code (Bicep, Terraform)
* Background in consultancy or product‑focused environments



  





 🌟
 **Why consider this role?** 



* Very strong engineering culture with low turnover and experienced colleagues
* High degree of technical ownership - teams decide how and when to deploy
* Modern Azure‑first architecture using .NET and Node.js
* Opportunity to influence platform architecture and long‑term direction
* Learning‑focused environment with cross‑team collaboration and AI education initiatives
* Competitive compensation and benefits, including generous holiday allowance and pension



  





***Please apply using the Easy Apply function.***




  





***Application deadline is 08/05/2026, but applications will be processed on an ongoing basis so please apply ASAP if you are interested.***




  





***Any questions, please email t.collard-gentle@tenthrevolution.com***

title: Snowflake Developer
description:
**Snowflake Developer – Job Description** 




 A Snowflake Developer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining data solutions using the Snowflake cloud data platform. This role involves building scalable data pipelines, optimizing data storage, and ensuring efficient data processing to support analytics and business intelligence.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and implement data solutions using
 **Snowflake Data Cloud**
* Develop, test, and maintain
 **ETL/ELT pipelines**
* Load and transform data from various sources (APIs, databases, flat files)
* Optimize Snowflake performance (query tuning, clustering, partitioning)
* Write complex
 **SQL queries** 
 , stored procedures, and scripts

 **Snowflake**

 **SQL**
